hok_text_tailo: Jī. Sing-ua̍h Tuì-uē
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ji7.sing1-uah8 tui3-ue7
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 二.生活對話
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Jī.Seng-oa̍h Tùi-ōe
en_text: 2. Daily conversation

hok_text_tailo: Tshiánn-mn̄g, tsit pún tsheh guā-tsē tsînn?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshiann2-mng7,tsit4 pun2 tsheh4 gua7-tse7 tsinn5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 請問，這本冊偌濟錢？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chhiáⁿ-mn̄g,chit pún chheh gōa-chē chîⁿ?
en_text: I would like to know how much is this book?

hok_text_tailo: Sī, bîn-á-tsài tsha-put-to ū nn̄g-pah ê beh lâi lán ha̍k-hāu, lí tsai-iánn--bô?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: si7,bin5-a2-tsai3 tsha1-put4-to1 u7 nng7-pah4 e5 beh4 lai5 lan2 hak8-hau7,li2 tsai1-iann2--bo5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 是，明仔載差不多有兩百个beh來咱學校，你知影--無？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Sī,bîn-á-chài chha-put-to ū nn̄g-pah ê beh lâi lán ha̍k-hāu,lí chai-iáⁿ--bô?
en_text: Yes, there will be about 200 of them coming to our school tomorrow. Are you aware?

hok_text_tailo: M̄-tsai. In beh lâi tshòng siánn-mih?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: m7-tsai1.in1 beh4 lai5 tshong3 siann2-mih4?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: M̄知。In beh來創啥物？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: M̄-chai.In beh lâi chhòng siáⁿ-mih?
en_text: I don't know. Why are they coming?

hok_text_tailo: In beh lâi khuànn lán ha̍k-hāu. In tāi-pōo-hūn sī ha̍k-sing, ū kuí uī-á sī lāu-su.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: in1 beh4 lai5 khuann3 lan2 hak8-hau7.in1 tai7-poo7-hun7 si7 hak8-sing1,u7 kui2 ui7-a2 si7 lau7-su1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: In beh來看咱學校。In大部份是學生，有幾位仔是老師。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: In beh lâi khòaⁿ lán ha̍k-hāu.In tāi-pō͘-hūn sī ha̍k-seng,ū kúi ūi-á sī lāu-su.
en_text: They want to visit our school. The majority are students, and a few of them are teachers.

hok_text_tailo: Guá m̄ tsai-iánn. Lí mn̄g Lâu lāu-su, hó--bô?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: gua2 m7 tsai1-iann2.li2 mng7 lau5 lau7-su1,ho2--bo5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 我m̄知影。你問劉老師，好--無？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Góa m̄ chai-iáⁿ.Lí mn̄g Lâu lāu-su,hó--bô?
en_text: I don't have the answer. How about asking teacher Lâu?

hok_text_tailo: Lâu lāu-su, lí tsai-iánn tsit pún tsheh guā-tsē tsînn--bô?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau5 lau7-su1,li2 tsai1-iann2 tsit4 pun2 tsheh4 gua7-tse7 tsinn5--bo5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 劉老師，你知影這本冊偌濟錢--無？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lâu lāu-su,lí chai-iáⁿ chit pún chheh gōa-chē chîⁿ--bô?
en_text: Teacher Lâu, do you know how much this book is?

hok_text_tailo: Tāi-khài kuí tsa̍p khoo-á niā-niā.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai7-khai3 kui2 tsap8 khoo1-a2 nia7-nia7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 大概幾十khoo仔niā-niā。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tāi-khài kúi cha̍p kho͘-á niā-niā.
en_text: It is only about tens of dollars.

hok_text_tailo: Lâu lāu-su, tshiánn-mn̄g, lán ha̍k-hāu ū kuí ê lāu-su?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau5 lau7-su1,tshiann2-mng7,lan2 hak8-hau7 u7 kui2 e5 lau7-su1?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 劉老師，請問，咱學校有幾个老師？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lâu lāu-su,chhiáⁿ-mn̄g,lán ha̍k-hāu ū kúi ê lāu-su?
en_text: Mr. Lâu, how many teachers are there in our school?

hok_text_tailo: Tsha-put-to jī-tsa̍p ê. Ū--ê sī guā-kok-lâng, in sī teh kà Ing-gí--ê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsha1-put4-to1 ji7-tsap8 e5.u7--e5 si7 gua7-kok4-lang5,in1 si7 teh4 ka3 ing1-gi2--e5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 差不多二十个。有--的是外國人，in是teh教英語--的。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chha-put-to jī-cha̍p ê.Ū--ê sī gōa-kok-lâng,in sī teh kà Eng-gí--ê.
en_text: Almost twenty people. Some of them are foreigners, they teach English.

hok_text_tailo: Ha̍k-sing tāi-pōo-hūn sī Bí-kok-lâng, sī--bô?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hak8-sing1 tai7-poo7-hun7 si7 bi2-kok4-lang5,si7--bo5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 學生大部份是美國人，是--無？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ha̍k-seng tāi-pō͘-hūn sī Bí-kok-lâng,sī--bô?
en_text: Most of the students are American, aren't they?

hok_text_tailo: Sī, m̄-koh hit nn̄g ê sī Ing-kok-lâng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: si7,m7-koh4 hit4 nng7 e5 si7 ing1-kok4-lang5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 是，m̄-koh彼兩个是英國人。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Sī,m̄-koh hit nn̄g ê sī Eng-kok-lâng.
en_text: Yes, but those two persons are English.

hok_text_tailo: Tsit nn̄g ê ha̍k-sing sī Tik-kok-lâng, sī--bô?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsit4 nng7 e5 hak8-sing1 si7 tik4-kok4-lang5,si7--bo5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這兩个學生是德國人，是--無？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chit nn̄g ê ha̍k-seng sī Tek-kok-lâng,sī--bô?
en_text: These two students are Germans, right?

hok_text_tailo: Sann. Bûn-tsiong it
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: sann1.bun5-tsiong1 it4
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 三. 文章一
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Saⁿ.Bûn-chiong it
en_text: Three. Article One.

hok_text_tailo: siû-tsuí phah-phōng-siû
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siu5-tsui2 phah4-phong7-siu5
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 泅水拍滂泅
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siû-chúi phah-phōng-siû
en_text: Swimming with splashes.

hok_text_tailo: “sánn-mih leh bô tshīng-sann?! siû-tsuí lóng mā tio̍h tshīng iû-íng-sann, iû-íng-khòo khì tī iû-íng-tî siû--ah...”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “sann2-mih4 leh4 bo5 tshing7-sann1?! siu5-tsui2 long2 ma7 tioh8 tshing7 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2-khoo3 khi3 ti7 iu5-ing2-ti5 siu5--ah4...”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「啥物咧無穿衫？！泅水攏嘛著穿游泳衫、游泳褲去佇游泳池泅--啊……」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “sáⁿ-mih leh bô chhēng-saⁿ?! siû-chúi lóng mā tio̍h chhēng iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng-khò͘ khì tī iû-éng-tî siû--ah...”
en_text: “What naked?! People wear swimsuits and swim trunks to swim!”

hok_text_tailo: suah hōo in ta̍k ê lâng bīn-sik kuài-kuài, ū lâng siann khê tò mn̄g: “siánn-mih sī iû-íng-tî? ah iû-íng-sann, iû-íng-khòo sī senn-tsò siánn-mih-khuán?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: suah4 hoo7 in1 tak8 e5 lang5 bin7-sik4 kuai3-kuai3, u7 lang5 siann1 khe5 to3 mng7: “siann2-mih4 si7 iu5-ing2-ti5? ah4 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2-khoo3 si7 senn1-tso3 siann2-mih4-khuan2?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 煞予in逐个人面色怪怪，有人聲khê倒問：「啥物是游泳池？啊游泳衫、游泳褲是生做啥物款？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: soah hō͘ in ta̍k ê lâng bīn-sek koài-koài, ū lâng siaⁿ khê tò mn̄g: “siáⁿ-mih sī iû-éng-tî? ah iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng-khò͘ sī seⁿ-chò siáⁿ-mih-khoán?”
en_text: All of them looked confused. Someone in the crowd asked, 'What is a swimming pool? What are swimsuits and swim trunks used for?'

hok_text_tailo: kì-tî-tiong, Gî-lân pēnn-īnn Tiong-san sok-sià-lāi ê înn-hîng tsuí-tî, ū pa-pa kā guá khoo tshiū-ling-khoo phah-pōng-siû ê ìn-sióng;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ki3-ti5-tiong1, gi5-lan5 penn7-inn7 tiong1-san1 sok4-sia3-lai7 e5 inn5-hing5 tsui2-ti5, u7 pa1-pa1 ka7 gua2 khoo1 tshiu7-ling1-khoo1 phah4-pong7-siu5 e5 in3-siong2;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 記持中，宜蘭病院中山宿舍內的圓形水池，有爸爸共我箍樹奶箍拍滂泅的印象；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kì-tî-tiong, Gî-lân pēⁿ-īⁿ Tiong-san sok-sià-lāi ê îⁿ-hêng chúi-tî, ū pa-pa kā góa kho͘ chhiū-leng-kho͘ phah-pōng-siû ê ìn-sióng;
en_text: I vaguely remember that dad and I played in the circular pool in the Tiong-san hostel of Gî-lân Hospital.

hok_text_tailo: pa-pa nā khui-tshuì kóng beh khì siû-tsuí phah-phōng-siû, guán tsia-ê gín-á tio̍h ē huann-hí kah tuā, sè-siann kiò, ma-ma tio̍h ē kiò guán kín tàu tshuân iû-íng-sann, iû-íng khòo, sio̍k-pháng, líng kún-tsuí, sui̋-tóo, kué-tsí...
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: pa1-pa1 na7 khui1-tshui3 kong2 beh4 khi3 siu5-tsui2 phah4-phong7-siu5, guan2 tsia1-e5 gin2-a2 tioh8 e7 huann1-hi2 kah4 tua7,se3-siann1 kio3, ma1-ma1 tioh8 e7 kio3 guan2 kin2 tau3 tshuan5 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2 khoo3,siok8-phang2,ling2 kun2-tsui2,sui9-too2,kue2-tsi2...
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 爸爸若開喙講欲去泅水拍滂泅，阮遮的囡仔就會歡喜甲大、細聲叫，媽媽就會叫阮緊鬥攢游泳衫、游泳褲、sio̍k-pháng、冷滾水、sui̋-tóo、果子……
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: pa-pa nā khui-chhùi kóng beh khì siû-chúi phah-phōng-siû, goán chia-ê gín-á tio̍h ē hoaⁿ-hí kah tōa,sè-siaⁿ kiò, ma-ma tio̍h ē kiò goán kín tàu chhoân iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng khò͘,sio̍k-pháng,léng kún-chúi,sŭi-tó͘,kóe-chí...
en_text: As kids, we would cheer loudly in joy whenever dad suggested going for a swim. Mom would then hurry us to prepare the swimming attire, bread, water, bottles, and fruits.

hok_text_tailo: ah tshù-pinn-keh-piah ê gín-á-phuānn ke-kiám ē ū lâng tsáu-lâi gún tau ê mn̂g-kha-kháu, thàm-thâu khuànn guán tsi̍t-ke-hué-á ê bô-îng, huann-hí!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ah4 tshu3-pinn1-keh4-piah4 e5 gin2-a2-phuann7 ke1-kiam2 e7 u7 lang5 tsau2-lai5 gun2 tau1 e5 mng5-kha1-khau2, tham3-thau5 khuann3 guan2 tsit8-ke1-hue2-a2 e5 bo5-ing5,huann1-hi2!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啊厝邊隔壁的囡仔伴加減會有人走來阮兜的門跤口，探頭看阮一家伙仔的無閒、歡喜！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ah chhù-piⁿ-keh-piah ê gín-á-phōaⁿ ke-kiám ē ū lâng cháu-lâi gún tau ê mn̂g-kha-kháu, thàm-thâu khòaⁿ goán chi̍t-ke-hóe-á ê bô-êng,hoaⁿ-hí!
en_text: Our neighbours’ kids would drop by our house intentionally to see what are we cheering about.

hok_text_tailo: tsit ê iû-íng-tî sī ma-ma ē lo̍h-tsuí o̍h siû, phû ē khí--lâi ê sóo-tsāi, mā sī guá o̍h thiàu-tsuí, siû tshut tshing bí kah khîn liān lia̍h-ko-siû ê ki-tē.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsit4 e5 iu5-ing2-ti5 si7 ma1-ma1 e7 loh8-tsui2 oh8 siu5,phu5 e7 khi2--lai5 e5 soo2-tsai7, ma7 si7 gua2 oh8 thiau3-tsui2,siu5 tshut4 tshing1 bi2 kah4 khin5 lian7 liah8-ko1-siu5 e5 ki1-te7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這个游泳池是媽媽會落水學泅、浮會起--來的所在，嘛是我學跳水、泅出千米佮勤練掠篙泅的基地。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chit ê iû-éng-tî sī ma-ma ē lo̍h-chúi o̍h siû,phû ē khí--lâi ê só͘-chāi, mā sī góa o̍h thiàu-chúi,siû chhut chheng bí kah khîn liān lia̍h-ko-siû ê ki-tē.
en_text: This swimming pool is where mom learned how to swim, and it is also my base for learning how to dive, and that is where I swam my first kilometer and practiced my freestyle swim stroke.

hok_text_tailo: hioh-jua̍h lé-pài ê sî, guán mā ē khì Hok-liông hái-tsuí-i̍k-tiûnn sńg-tsuí, khuànn liû-hîng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hioh4-juah8 le2-pai3 e5 si5, guan2 ma7 e7 khi3 hok4-liong5 hai2-tsui2-ik8-tiunn5 sng2-tsui2,khuann3 liu5-hing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 歇熱禮拜的時，阮嘛會去福隆海水浴場耍水、看流行。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hioh-joa̍h lé-pài ê sî, goán mā ē khì Hok-liông hái-chúi-e̍k-tiûⁿ sńg-chúi,khòaⁿ liû-hêng.
en_text: We would go to Hok-liông seaside resort to play during the weekends and summer breaks.

hok_text_tailo: lóng sī uì tsia o̍h--lâi, bat--lâi--ê!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: long2 si7 ui3 tsia1 oh8--lai5,bat4--lai5--e5!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 攏是對遮學--來、捌--來--的！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lóng sī ùi chia o̍h--lâi,bat--lâi--ê!
en_text: I have all learned and known from here.

hok_text_tailo: “siû-tsuí ê iàu-líng sī m̄ kiann tsuí, tio̍h sing o̍h tshàng-tsuí-bī...”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “siu5-tsui2 e5 iau3-ling2 si7 m7 kiann1 tsui2, tioh8 sing1 oh8 tshang3-tsui2-bi7...”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「泅水的要領是毋驚水，就先學藏水沬……」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “siû-chúi ê iàu-léng sī m̄ kiaⁿ chúi, tio̍h seng o̍h chhàng-chúi-bī...”
en_text: The most important thing about swimming is to overcome the fear of water, and learning to hold your breath under water is the first step.

hok_text_tailo: siūnn-khí gín-á sî-tāi, pa-pa kà guán o̍h siû-tsuí ê tsióng-tsióng, sim-kuann-thâu kam-tinn ê tsuânn-tsuí tio̍h ûn-ûn-á ik--tshut-lâi...

en_text: Reminiscing on my childhood, the time when my father used to teach me to swim, my heart was overwhelmed with bittersweetness.

en_text: There is a one-foot-and-a-half wide cement ditch in the four circles about one-and-a-half-meter away from the pool. It is a place for people to warm up before entering the pool, for children to play in, and for adults who were not swimming to soak their feet and feel the water.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 半晡仔後，趣味閣鬧熱的齣頭才欲開始，一陣庄跤戇佮都市倯來到田中央（真正的田地的內面），欲創啥？

en_text: The interesting activities started midway through the day. A bunch of kids gathered at the centre of the field. What do they intend to do?

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這是阮遮的腔口，一般攏講做「炕窯」--啦，就是欲來炕窯pû番薯--啦。

en_text: That is our accent, and we usually call the earth kiln 'khòng-iô' which we use the kiln to roast sweet potatoes.

hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ui7-tioh8 tsiat4-sing2 si5-kan1, io5,tsa2 to7 thiap8 ho2-se3, kan1-tann1 thiann1-hau7 gin2-a2 khioh4-tsha5 hiann5-hue2, koh4 lai5 tioh8 si7 tsiong7 han1-tsi5,oo7-a2 khng3-khng3 jip8-khi3 pu5,bun7,hip4, tan2-hau7 na7 sik8 tsiah4 oo2 khi2-lai5 tsiah8.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 為著節省時間，窯，早就疊好勢，kan-tann聽候囡仔抾柴燃火，閣來就是tsiōng番薯、芋仔囥囥入去pû、悶、翕，等候若熟才挖起來食。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ūi-tio̍h chiat-séng sî-kan, iô,chá tō thia̍p hó-sè, kan-taⁿ thiaⁿ-hāu gín-á khioh-chhâ hiâⁿ-hóe, koh lâi tio̍h sī chiōng han-chî,ō͘-á khǹg-khǹg ji̍p-khì pû,būn,hip, tán-hāu nā se̍k chiah ó͘ khí-lâi chia̍h.
en_text: The kiln was piled early to save time. The kids would gather and burn the firewood. Then, we bury the sweet potatoes and yam for them to bake and braise. Once they are cooked, we can dig them up and eat them.

hok_text_tailo: kiat-sok liáu tsin ū ì-gī ê tsi̍t kang, “siânn-hiong kau-liû”, “too-tshī-sông kah tsng-kha-gōng” kâng tsi̍t iūnn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: kiat4-sok4 liau2 tsin1 u7 i3-gi7 e5 tsit8 kang1, “siann5-hiong1 kau1-liu5”, “too1-tshi7-song5 kah4 tsng1-kha1-gong7”kang5 tsit8 iunn7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 結束了真有意義的一工，「城鄉交流」，「都市倯佮庄跤戇」仝一樣。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kiat-sok liáu chin ū ì-gī ê chi̍t kang, “siâⁿ-hiong kau-liû”, “to͘-chhī-sông kah chng-kha-gōng”kâng chi̍t iūⁿ.
en_text: The meaningful activities for the city dwellers-villagers exchange have ended. Naive city dwellers or knowledgeable villagers, kids will be kids.

hok_text_tailo: siánn-mih sī sông, bô king-giām tio̍h sông, siánn-mih sī gōng, m̄ o̍h tio̍h gōng, “siânn-hiong kau-liû” ē-tàng hōo gín-á o̍h-tio̍h bô kâng ê tì-sik king-giām, ta̍t-tit kàu-io̍k-tsiá ê tiōng-sī.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siann2-mih4 si7 song5, bo5 king1-giam7 tioh8 song5, siann2-mih4 si7 gong7, m7 oh8 tioh8 gong7, “siann5-hiong1 kau1-liu5”e7-tang3 hoo7 gin2-a2 oh8-tioh8 bo5 kang5 e5 ti3-sik4 king1-giam7, tat8-tit4 kau3-iok8-tsia2 e5 tiong7-si7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啥物是倯，無經驗就倯，啥物是戇，毋學就戇，「城鄉交流」會當予囡仔學著無仝的智識經驗，值得教育者的重視。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siáⁿ-mih sī sông, bô keng-giām tio̍h sông, siáⁿ-mih sī gōng, m̄ o̍h tio̍h gōng, “siâⁿ-hiong kau-liû”ē-tàng hō͘ gín-á o̍h-tio̍h bô kâng ê tì-sek keng-giām, ta̍t-tit kàu-io̍k-chiá ê tiōng-sī.
en_text: What does it mean to be naive? Insufficient experience. What about unknowledgeable? Insufficient information. The exchange serves to bridge the gap between the two groups. Through this, children can experience new things. This demands attention from the educators.

hok_text_tailo: Bûn-tsiong sì
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: bun5-tsiong1 si3
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 文章四
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Bûn-chiong sì
en_text: Article 4

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-bûn tsok-ka kah “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1 kah4“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 台文作家佮《台文通訊》
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-bûn chok-ka kah“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”
en_text: Taiwanese writers and 'Taiwanese Hokkien Newsletter”

hok_text_tailo: hōo Tâi-gí hue-ho̍k uân-tsuân ê sènn-miā-la̍t, mā tsō-tsiū tsin tsē Tâi-bûn tsok-ka, ti̍t-tsiap khai-tshòng tsiàn-āu ê Tâi-gí bûn-ha̍k ūn-tōng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hoo7 tai5-gi2 hue1-hok8 uan5-tsuan5 e5 senn3-mia7-lat8, ma7 tso7-tsiu7 tsin1 tse7 tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1, tit8-tsiap4 khai1-tshong3 tsian3-au7 e5 tai5-gi2 bun5-hak8 un7-tong7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 予台語恢復完全的性命力，嘛造就真濟台文作家，直接開創戰後的台語文學運動。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hō͘ Tâi-gí hoe-ho̍k oân-choân ê sèⁿ-miā-la̍t, mā chō-chiū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka, ti̍t-chiap khai-chhòng chiàn-āu ê Tâi-gí bûn-ha̍k ūn-tōng.
en_text: Restoring the Taiwanese language to its full vitality also produced many Taiwanese writers, directly sparking the post-war Taiwanese literature movement.

hok_text_tailo: tī tsit tsióng kuè-tîng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” pān-ián sian-hong-tsiá ê kak-sik, tong-tshoo ê huat-khí-tsiá ê uán-kiàn kah î-tshî kàu-tann jī-tsa̍p nî sóo-ū tsham-ú-tsiá ê khóo-sim hù-tshut, lóng tsin ta̍t-tit lán kìng-phuè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti7 tsit4 tsiong2 kue3-ting5-tiong1, “tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”pan7-ian2 sian1-hong1-tsia2 e5 kak4-sik4, tong1-tshoo1 e5 huat4-khi2-tsia2 e5 uan2-kian3 kah4 i5-tshi5 kau3-tann1 ji7-tsap8 ni5 soo2-u7 tsham1-u2-tsia2 e5 khoo2-sim1 hu3-tshut4, long2 tsin1 tat8-tit4 lan2 king3-phue3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 佇這種過程中，《台文通訊》扮演先鋒者的角色，當初的發起者的遠見佮維持到今二十年所有參與者的苦心付出，攏真值得咱敬佩。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tī chit chióng kòe-têng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”pān-ián sian-hong-chiá ê kak-sek, tong-chho͘ ê hoat-khí-chiá ê oán-kiàn kah î-chhî kàu-taⁿ jī-cha̍p nî só͘-ū chham-ú-chiá ê khó͘-sim hù-chhut, lóng chin ta̍t-tit lán kèng-phòe.
en_text: In this process, the 'Taiwanese Newsletter' played the role of a pioneer. The vision of the founder and the perseverance of all participants in putting in their efforts for 20 years are worthy of our admiration.

hok_text_tailo: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng tsing-tshú kóng Tâi-gú ê kuân-lī, huàn tshínn bó-gí ì-sik liáu-āu, tsiah liân-tài tsiap-suà it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi “Tâi-uân uē-bûn lūn-tsiàn” buē uân-sîng ê gī-tê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: it4-tit8 kau3 it4 kiu2 pat4 khong3 ni5-tai7 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 tsing1-tshu2 kong2 tai5-gu2 e5 kuan5-li7, huan3 tshinn2 bo2-gi2 i3-sik4 liau2-au7, tsiah4 lian5-tai3 tsiap4-sua3 it4 kiu2 sam1 khong3 ni5-tai7“tai5-uan5 ue7-bun5 lun7-tsian3”bue7 uan5-sing5 e5 gi7-te5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 一直到一九八零年代台語文運動爭取講台語的權利，喚醒母語意識了後，才連帶接紲一九三零年代「台灣話文論戰」未完成的議題。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng cheng-chhú kóng Tâi-gú ê koân-lī, hoàn chhíⁿ bó-gí ì-sek liáu-āu, chiah liân-tài chiap-sòa it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi“Tâi-oân ōe-bûn lūn-chiàn”bōe oân-sêng ê gī-tê.
en_text: It was until the 1980s that the Taiwanese Hokkien Movement secured the right to speak Taiwanese Hokkien. That was the awakening of the mother tongue and spurred the continuation of the discussion of the Taiwanese Language debate.

hok_text_tailo: tuì Tâi-gú bûn-ha̍k ê luē-hâm kap hîng-sik lâi tsò phîng-kè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tui3 tai5-gu2 bun5-hak8 e5 lue7-ham5 kap4 hing5-sik4 lai5 tso3 phing5-ke3.

hok_text_tailo: “Tâi-bûn pit-huē” ê sîng-guân ū tsin tsē Tâi-bûn tsok-ka sī ti̍t-tsiap hi̍k-tsiá sī kan-tsiap siū-tio̍h “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” ê íng-hióng kah tsō-tsiū, tī “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” jī-tsa̍p tsiu-nî ê ji̍t-tsí, sîng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kap tsiok-hok.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “tai5-bun5 pit4-hue7”e5 sing5-guan5 u7 tsin1 tse7 tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1 si7 tit8-tsiap4 hik8-tsia2 si7 kan1-tsiap4 siu7-tioh8“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”e5 ing2-hiong2 kah4 tso7-tsiu7, ti7“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”ji7-tsap8 tsiu1-ni5 e5 jit8-tsi2, sing5-sim1 hian3-siong7 gun2 e5 kam2-sia7 kap4 tsiok4-hok4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「台文筆會」的成員有真濟台文作家是直接或者是間接受著《台文通訊》的影響佮造就，佇《台文通訊》二十週年的日子，誠心獻上阮的感謝佮祝福。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Tâi-bûn pit-hōe”ê sêng-goân ū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka sī ti̍t-chiap he̍k-chiá sī kan-chiap siū-tio̍h“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”ê éng-hióng kah chō-chiū, tī“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”jī-cha̍p chiu-nî ê ji̍t-chí, sêng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kap chiok-hok.
en_text: Many Taiwanese writers from the Taiwanese Writers Society are directly or indirectly influenced by the Taiwanese Newsletter. On this day, the 20th anniversary of the Taiwanese Newsletter, the writers thanked the publication and gave their blessings.

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “siáⁿ-mih leh bô chhēng-saⁿ?! siû-chúi lóng mā tio̍h chhēng iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng-khò͘ khì tī iû-éng-tî siû--ah...”

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: soah hō͘ in ta̍k ê lâng bīn-sek koài-koài, ū lâng siaⁿ khê tò mn̄g: “siáⁿ-mih sī iû-éng-tî? ah iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng-khò͘ sī siⁿ-chò siáⁿ-mih-khoán?”

hok_text_tailo: kì-tî-tiong, Gî-lân pēnn-īnn Tiong-san sok-sià-lāi ê înn-hîng tsuí-tî, ū pa-pa kā guá khoo tshiū-ling-khoo phah-phōng-siû ê ìn-siōng;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ki3-ti5-tiong1, gi5-lan5 penn7-inn7 tiong1-san1 sok4-sia3-lai7 e5 inn5-hing5 tsui2-ti5, u7 pa1-pa1 ka7 gua2 khoo1 tshiu7-ling1-khoo1 phah4-phong7-siu5 e5 in3-siong7;

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 爸爸若開喙講欲去泅水拍滂泅，阮遮的囡仔就會歡喜甲大、細聲叫，媽媽就會叫阮緊鬥攢游泳衫、游泳褲、sio̍k-pháng、冷滾水、sui̋-tóo、果子……
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: pa-pa nā khui-chhùi kóng beh khì siû-chúi phah-phōng-siû, gún chia-ê gín-á tō ē hoaⁿ-hí kah tōa,sè-siaⁿ kiò, ma-ma tio̍h ē kiò gún kín tàu chhoân iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng khò͘,sio̍k-pháng,léng kún-chúi,sŭi-tó͘,kóe-chí...
en_text: As kids, we would cheer loudly in joy whenever dad suggested going for a swim. Mom would then hurry us to prepare the swimming attire, bread, water, bottles, and fruits.

A place for adults who play in the pool to soak their feet and touch the water.

en_text: In order to save time, the earth kiln was folded very early, just wait for the children to pick up firewood and burn the fire, and then put the sweet potatoes and taro into the earth kiln to cook until they are cooked, and then dig up and eat when they are cooked.

en_text: What does it mean to be naive? Insufficient experience. What about unknowledgeable? Insufficient information. The exchange serves to bridge the gap between the two groups. Through this, children can experience new things. This demands attention from the educators.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 予台語恢復完全的性命力，嘛造就真濟台文作家，直接開創戰後的台語文學運動。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hō͘ Tâi-gí khoe-ho̍k oân-choân ê sèⁿ-miā-le̍k, mā chō-chiū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka, ti̍t-chiap khai-chhòng chiàn-āu ê Tâi-gí bûn-ha̍k ūn-tōng.
en_text: To restore the vitality of the Taiwanese Hokkien, it can also cultivate many Taiwanese writers and directly create the Taiwanese literature movement after World War II.

hok_text_tailo: tī tsit tsióng kuè-tîng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” pān-ián sian-hong-tsiá ê kak-sik, tong-tshoo ê huat-khí-tsiá ê uán-kiàn kah uî-tshî kàu-tann jī-tsa̍p nî sóo-ū tsham-ú-tsiá ê khóo-sim hù-tshut, lóng tsin ta̍t-tit lán kìng-puē.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti7 tsit4 tsiong2 kue3-ting5-tiong1, “tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”pan7-ian2 sian1-hong1-tsia2 e5 kak4-sik4, tong1-tshoo1 e5 huat4-khi2-tsia2 e5 uan2-kian3 kah4 ui5-tshi5 kau3-tann1 ji7-tsap8 ni5 soo2-u7 tsham1-u2-tsia2 e5 khoo2-sim1 hu3-tshut4, long2 tsin1 tat8-tit4 lan2 king3-pue7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 佇這種過程中，《台文通訊》扮演先鋒者的角色，當初的發起者的遠見佮維持到今二十年所有參與者的苦心付出，攏真值得咱敬佩。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tī chit chióng kòe-têng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”pān-ián sian-hong-chiá ê kak-sek, tong-chho͘ ê hoat-khí-chiá ê oán-kiàn kah ûi-chhî kàu-taⁿ jī-cha̍p nî só͘-ū chham-ú-chiá ê khó͘-sim hù-chhut, lóng chin ta̍t-tit lán kèng-pōe.
en_text: In this process, the 'Taiwanese Newsletter' played the role of a pioneer. The vision of the founder and the perseverance of all participants in putting in their efforts for 20 years are worthy of our admiration.

hok_text_tailo: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng tsing-tshú kóng Tâi-gú ê khuân-lī, huàn tshénn bó-gí ì-sik liáu-āu, tsiah liân-tài tsiap-suà it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi “Tâi-uân uē-bûn lūn-tsiàn” bē uân-sîng ê gī-tê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: it4-tit8 kau3 it4 kiu2 pat4 khong3 ni5-tai7 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 tsing1-tshu2 kong2 tai5-gu2 e5 khuan5-li7, huan3 tshenn2 bo2-gi2 i3-sik4 liau2-au7, tsiah4 lian5-tai3 tsiap4-sua3 it4 kiu2 sam1 khong3 ni5-tai7“tai5-uan5 ue7-bun5 lun7-tsian3”be7 uan5-sing5 e5 gi7-te5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 一直到一九八零年代台語文運動爭取講台語的權利，喚醒母語意識了後，才連帶接紲一九三零年代「台灣話文論戰」未完成的議題。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng cheng-chhú kóng Tâi-gú ê khoân-lī, hoàn chhéⁿ bó-gí ì-sek liáu-āu, chiah liân-tài chiap-sòa it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi“Tâi-oân ōe-bûn lūn-chiàn”bē oân-sêng ê gī-tê.
en_text: It was not until the Taiwanese language movement in the 1980s, which fought for the right to speak Taiwanese and awakened a mother tongue awareness, that the unresolved issue of the 'Taiwanese Language Debate' from the 1930s could be continued.

hok_text_tailo: tuì Tâi-gú bûn-ha̍k ê luē-hâm kap hîng-sik lâi tsò phîng-kè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tui3 tai5-gu2 bun5-hak8 e5 lue7-ham5 kap4 hing5-sik4 lai5 tso3 phing5-ke3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 對台語文學的內涵佮形式來做評價。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tùi Tâi-gú bûn-ha̍k ê lōe-hâm kap hêng-sek lâi chò phêng-kè.
en_text: To provide comments on the Taiwanese Hokkien literature meanings and styles.

hok_text_tailo: “Tâi-bûn pit-huē” ê sîng-guân ū tsin tsē Tâi-bûn tsok-ka sī ti̍t-tsiap hi̍k-tsiá sī kan-tsiap siū-tio̍h “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” ê íng-hióng kah tsō-tsiū, tī “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” jī-tsa̍p tsiu-nî ê ji̍t-tsí, sîng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kah tsiok-hok.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “tai5-bun5 pit4-hue7”e5 sing5-guan5 u7 tsin1 tse7 tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1 si7 tit8-tsiap4 hik8-tsia2 si7 kan1-tsiap4 siu7-tioh8“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”e5 ing2-hiong2 kah4 tso7-tsiu7, ti7“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”ji7-tsap8 tsiu1-ni5 e5 jit8-tsi2, sing5-sim1 hian3-siong7 gun2 e5 kam2-sia7 kah4 tsiok4-hok4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「台文筆會」的成員有真濟台文作家是直接或者是間接受著《台文通訊》的影響佮造就，佇《台文通訊》二十週年的日子，誠心獻上阮的感謝佮祝福。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Tâi-bûn pit-hōe”ê sêng-goân ū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka sī ti̍t-chiap he̍k-chiá sī kan-chiap siū-tio̍h“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”ê éng-hióng kah chō-chiū, tī“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”jī-cha̍p chiu-nî ê ji̍t-chí, sêng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kah chiok-hok.
en_text: Many Taiwanese writers from the Taiwanese Writers Society are directly or indirectly influenced by the Taiwanese Newsletter. On this day, the 20th anniversary of the Taiwanese Newsletter, the writers thanked the publication and gave their blessings.

hok_text_tailo: ( tsok-tsiá sī Tâi-bûn pit-huē ê lí-sū-tiúnn, Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē ê táng-sū: tsit phinn sī uì “khai-khún, iā-tsíng, senn-thuànn ─ Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē tsa̍p-gōo tsiu-nî ti̍k khan” tiah--tshut-lâi--ê. )
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: (tsok4-tsia2 si7 tai5-bun5 pit4-hue7 e5 li2-su7-tiunn2, li2 kang1 khiok4 tai5-gu2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 e5 tang2-su7: tsit4 phinn1 si7 ui3“khai1-khun2,ia7-tsing2,senn1-thuann3─li2 kang1 khiok4 tai5-gi2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 tsap8-goo7 tsiu1-ni5 tik8 khan1”tiah4--tshut4-lai5--e5.)
hok_text_hanlo_tai: （作者是台文筆會的理事長、李江却台語文教基金會的董事：這篇是對《開墾、掖種、生湠─李江却台語文教基金會十五周年特刊》摘--出-來--的。）
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: (chok-chiá sī Tâi-bûn pit-hōe ê lí-sū-tiúⁿ, Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe ê táng-sū: chit phiⁿ sī ùi“khai-khún,iā-chéng,seⁿ-thòaⁿ─Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe cha̍p-gō͘ chiu-nî te̍k khan”tiah--chhut-lâi--ê.)
en_text: (The author is the chairman of the Taiwanese Writers Club and the director of the Lí Kang Khiok Taiwanese Cultural and Educational Foundation. This excerpt is taken from 'Cultivating, Planting, and Proliferating - The Special Issue of the 15th Anniversary of the Lí Kang Khiok Taiwanese Language Education Foundation'.)

hok_text_tailo: suah hōo in ta̍k ê lâng bīn-sik kuài-kuài, ū lâng siann khê tò mn̄g: “siánn-mih sī iû-íng-tî? ah iû-íng-sann, iû-íng-khòo sī senn-tsò siánn khuán?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: suah4 hoo7 in1 tak8 e5 lang5 bin7-sik4 kuai3-kuai3, u7 lang5 siann1 khe5 to3 mng7: “siann2-mih4 si7 iu5-ing2-ti5? ah4 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2-khoo3 si7 senn1-tso3 siann2 khuan2?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 煞予in逐个人面色怪怪，有人聲khê倒問：「啥物是游泳池？啊游泳衫、游泳褲是生做啥款？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: soah hō͘ in ta̍k ê lâng bīn-sek koài-koài, ū lâng siaⁿ khê tò mn̄g: “siáⁿ-mih sī iû-éng-tî? ah iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng-khò͘ sī seⁿ-chò siáⁿ khoán?”
en_text: This incident made each of them look strange, and someone asked: What is a swimming pool? What do swimsuits and swimming trunks look like?

hok_text_tailo: kì-tî-tiong, Gî-lân pēnn-īnn Tiong-san sok-sià-lāi ê înn-hîng tsuí-tî, ū pa-pa kā guá khoo tshiū-ling-khoo phah-phōng-siû ê ìn-sióng;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ki3-ti5-tiong1, gi5-lan5 penn7-inn7 tiong1-san1 sok4-sia3-lai7 e5 inn5-hing5 tsui2-ti5, u7 pa1-pa1 ka7 gua2 khoo1 tshiu7-ling1-khoo1 phah4-phong7-siu5 e5 in3-siong2;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 記持中，宜蘭病院中山宿舍內的圓形水池，有爸爸共我箍樹奶箍拍滂泅的印象；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kì-tî-tiong, Gî-lân pēⁿ-īⁿ Tiong-san sok-sià-lāi ê îⁿ-hêng chúi-tî, ū pa-pa kā góa kho͘ chhiū-leng-kho͘ phah-phōng-siû ê ìn-sióng;
en_text: In my memory, in the circular pool in the Tiong-san dormitory of Gî-lân Hospital, I have the impression that my father gave me the impression of playing with water and splashing with a rubber ring.

hok_text_tailo: pa-pa nā khui-tshuì kóng beh khì siû-tsuí phah-phōng-siû, gún tsia-ê gín-á tio̍h ē huann-hí kah tuā, sè-siann kiò, ma-ma tio̍h ē kiò gún kín tàu tshuân iû-íng-sann, iû-íng khòo, sio̍k-pháng, líng kún-tsuí, sui̋-tóo, kué-tsí...
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: pa1-pa1 na7 khui1-tshui3 kong2 beh4 khi3 siu5-tsui2 phah4-phong7-siu5, gun2 tsia1-e5 gin2-a2 tioh8 e7 huann1-hi2 kah4 tua7,se3-siann1 kio3, ma1-ma1 tioh8 e7 kio3 gun2 kin2 tau3 tshuan5 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2 khoo3,siok8-phang2,ling2 kun2-tsui2,sui9-too2,kue2-tsi2...
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 爸爸若開喙講欲去泅水拍滂泅，阮遮的囡仔就會歡喜甲大、細聲叫，媽媽就會叫阮緊鬥攢游泳衫、游泳褲、sio̍k-pháng、冷滾水、sui̋-tóo、果子……
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: pa-pa nā khui-chhùi kóng beh khì siû-chúi phah-phōng-siû, gún chia-ê gín-á tio̍h ē hoaⁿ-hí kah tōa,sè-siaⁿ kiò, ma-ma tio̍h ē kiò gún kín tàu chhoân iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng khò͘,sio̍k-pháng,léng kún-chúi,sŭi-tó͘,kóe-chí...
en_text: Every time dad mentioned going to swim, all of us kids would cheer loudly, and mom would hasten our preparations for the swim – swimsuits, swim trunks, floats, cold water, water bottles, fruits,

hok_text_tailo: ah tshù-pinn-keh-piah ê gín-á-phuānn ke-kiám ē ū lâng kiânn-lâi gún tau ê mn̂g-kha-kháu, thàm-thâu khuànn gún tsi̍t-ke-hué-á ê bô-îng, huann-hí!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ah4 tshu3-pinn1-keh4-piah4 e5 gin2-a2-phuann7 ke1-kiam2 e7 u7 lang5 kiann5-lai5 gun2 tau1 e5 mng5-kha1-khau2, tham3-thau5 khuann3 gun2 tsit8-ke1-hue2-a2 e5 bo5-ing5,huann1-hi2!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啊厝邊隔壁的囡仔伴加減會有人行來阮兜的門跤口，探頭看阮一家伙仔的無閒、歡喜！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ah chhù-piⁿ-keh-piah ê gín-á-phōaⁿ ke-kiám ē ū lâng kiâⁿ-lâi gún tau ê mn̂g-kha-kháu, thàm-thâu khòaⁿ gún chi̍t-ke-hóe-á ê bô-êng,hoaⁿ-hí!
en_text: Some children from the neighborhood would come to the door of my house and peek in to see how busy and happy my family was.

hok_text_tailo: tsit ê iû-íng-tî sī ma-ma ē lo̍h-tsuí o̍h siû, phû ē khí--lâi ê sóo-tsāi, mā sī guá o̍h thiàu-tsuí, siû tshut tshing bí kah khûn liān lia̍h-ko-siû ê ki-tē.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsit4 e5 iu5-ing2-ti5 si7 ma1-ma1 e7 loh8-tsui2 oh8 siu5,phu5 e7 khi2--lai5 e5 soo2-tsai7, ma7 si7 gua2 oh8 thiau3-tsui2,siu5 tshut4 tshing1 bi2 kah4 khun5 lian7 liah8-ko1-siu5 e5 ki1-te7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這个游泳池是媽媽會落水學泅、浮會起--來的所在，嘛是我學跳水、泅出千米佮勤練掠篙泅的基地。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chit ê iû-éng-tî sī ma-ma ē lo̍h-chúi o̍h siû,phû ē khí--lâi ê só͘-chāi, mā sī góa o̍h thiàu-chúi,siû chhut chheng bí kah khûn liān lia̍h-ko-siû ê ki-tē.
en_text: This swimming pool is where mum learned how to swim. It is also the place where I learned to dive, do long-distance swimming and freestyle swimming.

hok_text_tailo: hioh-lua̍h lé-pài ê sî, gún mā ē khì Hok-liông hái-tsuí-i̍k-tiûnn sńg-tsuí, khuànn liû-hîng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hioh4-luah8 le2-pai3 e5 si5, gun2 ma7 e7 khi3 hok4-liong5 hai2-tsui2-ik8-tiunn5 sng2-tsui2,khuann3 liu5-hing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 歇熱禮拜的時，阮嘛會去福隆海水浴場耍水、看流行。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hioh-loa̍h lé-pài ê sî, gún mā ē khì Hok-liông hái-chúi-e̍k-tiûⁿ sńg-chúi,khòaⁿ liû-hêng.
en_text: We would go to Hok-liông seaside resort to play during the weekends and summer breaks.

hok_text_tailo: lóng sī uì tsia o̍h--lâi, bat--lâi--ê!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: long2 si7 ui3 tsia1 oh8--lai5,bat4--lai5--e5!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 攏是對遮學--來、捌--來--的！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lóng sī ùi chia o̍h--lâi,bat--lâi--ê!
en_text: I learned everything from here.

hok_text_tailo: “siû-tsuí ê  iàu-niá sī m̄ kiann tsuí, tio̍h sing o̍h tshàng-tsuí-bī...”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “siu5-tsui2 e5 iau3-nia2 si7 m7 kiann1 tsui2, tioh8 sing1 oh8 tshang3-tsui2-bi7...”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「泅水的要領是毋驚水，就先學藏水沬……」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “siû-chúi ê iàu-niá sī m̄ kiaⁿ chúi, tio̍h seng o̍h chhàng-chúi-bī...”
en_text: The most important thing about swimming is not to be afraid of water. First, learn to hold your breath under the water...

hok_text_tailo: siūnn-khí gín-á sî-tāi, pa-pa kà gún o̍h siû-tsuí ê tsióng-tsióng, sim-kuann-thâu kam-tinn ê tsuânn-tsuí tio̍h ûn-ûn-á ik--tshut-lâi...
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siunn7-khi2 gin2-a2 si5-tai7, pa1-pa1 ka3 gun2 oh8 siu5-tsui2 e5 tsiong2-tsiong2, sim1-kuann1-thau5 kam1-tinn1 e5 tsuann5-tsui2 tioh8 un5-un5-a2 ik4--tshut4-lai5...
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 想起囡仔時代，爸爸教阮學泅水的種種，心肝頭甘甜的泉水就勻勻仔溢--出-來……
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siūⁿ-khí gín-á sî-tāi, pa-pa kà gún o̍h siû-chúi ê chióng-chióng, sim-koaⁿ-thâu kam-tiⁿ ê chôaⁿ-chúi tio̍h ûn-ûn-á ek--chhut-lâi...
en_text: Thinking about my childhood, those moments when my father taught me to swim, I felt a sweet water spring in my heart flowing out little by little.

hok_text_tailo: koh ū bô kâng ê sik-tsuí hun-tsuí-tō suànn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: koh4 u7 bo5 kang5 e5 sik4-tsui2 hun1-tsui2-to7 suann3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣有無仝的色水分水道線。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: koh ū bô kâng ê sek-chúi hun-chúi-tō sòaⁿ.
en_text: Different colours segregate the waterways.

hok_text_tailo: tî-á-pinn bí-puànn-guā sì-khoo uî-khoo ū tshioh-puànn khuah ê âng-mn̂g-thôo tsuí-kau, sī hōo beh lo̍h-tsuí tsìn-tsîng ê lâng hòo-tsuí pī sin, iah-sī sè-hàn gín-á sńg-tsuí, bô lo̍h-tsuí ê tuā-lâng tsìm kha, bak tsuí ê sóo-tsāi;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti5-a2-pinn1 bi2-puann3-gua7 si3-khoo1 ui5-khoo1 u7 tshioh4-puann3 khuah4 e5 ang5-mng5-thoo5 tsui2-kau1, si7 hoo7 beh4 loh8-tsui2 tsin3-tsing5 e5 lang5 hoo3-tsui2 pi7 sin1, iah4-si7 se3-han3 gin2-a2 sng2-tsui2,bo5 loh8-tsui2 e5 tua7-lang5 tsim3 kha1,bak4 tsui2 e5 soo2-tsai7;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 池仔邊米半外四箍圍箍有尺半闊的紅毛塗水溝，是予欲落水進前的人戽水備身，抑是細漢囡仔耍水、無落水的大人浸跤、沐水的所在；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tî-á-piⁿ bí-pòaⁿ-gōa sì-kho͘ ûi-kho͘ ū chhioh-pòaⁿ khoah ê âng-mn̂g-thô͘ chúi-kau, sī hō͘ beh lo̍h-chúi chìn-chêng ê lâng hò͘-chúi pī sin, iah-sī sè-hàn gín-á sńg-chúi,bô lo̍h-chúi ê tōa-lâng chìm kha,bak chúi ê só͘-chāi;
en_text: There is a one-foot-and-a-half wide cement ditch in the four circles about one-and-a-half-meter away from the pool. It is a place for people to warm up before entering the pool, for children to play in, and for adults who were not swimming to soak their feet and feel the water.

hok_text_tailo: too-tshī-sông, tsng-kha-gōng
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: too1-tshi7-song5,tsng1-kha1-gong7
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 都市倯，庄跤戇
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: to͘-chhī-sông,chng-kha-gōng
en_text: They are naive city dwellers and unknowledgeable villagers.

hok_text_tailo: Tshân-tiong-ng?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshan5-tiong1-ng1?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 田中央？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chhân-tiong-ng?
en_text: In the middle of the field?

hok_text_tailo: ah ha̍k-hāu m̄ khí tī “tshân-tē ê tiong-ng”?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ah4 hak8-hau7 m7 khi2 ti7“tshan5-te7 e5 tiong1-ng1”?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啊學校毋起佇「田地的中央」？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ah ha̍k-hāu m̄ khí tī“chhân-tē ê tiong-ng”?
en_text: Ah, is the school not built 'in the middle of the field'?

hok_text_tailo: ah in hia-ê gín-á khó-lîng tsin sông--ooh, tsng-kha-lâng it-tīng bô lán too-tshī-lâng hiah khiáu.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ah4 in1 hia1-e5 gin2-a2 kho2-ling5 tsin1 song5--ooh4, tsng1-kha1-lang5 it4-ting7 bo5 lan2 too1-tshi7-lang5 hiah4 khiau2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啊in遐的囡仔可能真倯--喔，庄跤人一定無咱都市人遐巧。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ah in hia-ê gín-á khó-lêng chin sông--o͘h, chng-kha-lâng it-tēng bô lán to͘-chhī-lâng hiah khiáu.
en_text: The children over here are not knowledgeable. The villagers are not as smart as the city dwellers.

hok_text_tailo: ( lâi kàu Tshân-tiong-ng ê Tâi-pak gín-á, ū lâng án-ne gī-lūn. too-tshī-gōng )

hok_text_hanlo_tai: （來到田中央的台北囡仔，有人按呢議論。都市戇）
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: (lâi kàu Chhân-tiong-ng ê Tâi-pak gín-á, ū lâng án-ne gī-lūn. to͘-chhī-gōng)
en_text: (The children from Tâi-pak came to the village. Some of them commented — naive people from the city.)

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-pak gín-á lâi--looh, ta̍k-ke kuánn-kín lâi khuànn--ooh!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-pak4 gin2-a2 lai5--looh4, tak8-ke1 kuann2-kin2 lai5 khuann3--ooh4!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 台北囡仔來--囉，逐家趕緊來看--喔！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-pak gín-á lâi--lo͘h, ta̍k-ke kóaⁿ-kín lâi khòaⁿ--o͘h!
en_text: The Tâi-pak children have come, everyone come and meet them!

hok_text_tailo: Uâ á!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ua5 a2!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: Uâ á！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ôa á!
en_text: Wow!

hok_text_tailo: ū-kàu hó-tsia̍h, pí gún a-bú  bé--ê khah hó-tsia̍h!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: u7-kau3 ho2-tsiah8, pi2 gun2 a1-bu2 be2--e5 khah4 ho2-tsiah8!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有夠好食，比阮阿母買--的較好食！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ū-kàu hó-chia̍h, pí gún a-bú bé--ê khah hó-chia̍h!
en_text: It is so tasty, even tastier than the one my mother bought!

hok_text_tailo: lán hia lóng mā huà-ha̍k--ê, ta̍k hāng lóng mā tiān-náu, ueh! tông-o̍h!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lan2 hia1 long2 ma7 hua3-hak8--e5, tak8 hang7 long2 ma7 tian7-nau2, ueh4!tong5-oh8!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 咱遐攏嘛化學--的，逐項攏嘛電腦，喂！同學！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lán hia lóng mā hòa-ha̍k--ê, ta̍k hāng lóng mā tiān-náu, oeh!tông-o̍h!
en_text: All of us here majored in Chemistry. Everything is computerized here. Hey, classmate!

hok_text_tailo: lín kám ū tiān-náu?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lin2 kam2 u7 tian7-nau2?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 恁敢有電腦？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lín kám ū tiān-náu?
en_text: Do you have a computer?

hok_text_tailo: ( ū-iánn too-tshī-sông to tio̍h. )
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: (u7-iann2 too1-tshi7-song5 to1 tioh8.)
hok_text_hanlo_tai: （有影都市倯都著。）
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: (ū-iáⁿ to͘-chhī-sông to tio̍h.)
en_text: A true urban bumpkin.

hok_text_tailo: puànn-poo-á āu, tshù-bī koh lāu-jia̍t ê tshut-thâu tsiah beh khai-sí, tsi̍t-tsūn tsng-kha-gōng kah too-tshī-sông lâi kàu tshân-tiong-ng ( tsin-tsiànn ê tshân-tē ê lāi-bīn ), beh tshòng siánn?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: puann3-poo1-a2 au7, tshu3-bi7 koh4 lau7-jiat8 e5 tshut4-thau5 tsiah4 beh4 khai1-si2, tsit8-tsun7 tsng1-kha1-gong7 kah4 too1-tshi7-song5 lai5 kau3 tshan5-tiong1-ng1(tsin1-tsiann3 e5 tshan5-te7 e5 lai7-bin7), beh4 tshong3 siann2?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 半晡仔後，趣味閣鬧熱的齣頭才欲開始，一陣庄跤戇佮都市倯來到田中央（真正的田地的內面），欲創啥？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: pòaⁿ-po͘-á āu, chhù-bī koh lāu-jia̍t ê chhut-thâu chiah beh khai-sí, chi̍t-chūn chng-kha-gōng kah to͘-chhī-sông lâi kàu chhân-tiong-ng(chin-chiàⁿ ê chhân-tē ê lāi-bīn), beh chhòng siáⁿ?
en_text: The interesting activities started midway through the day. A bunch of kids gathered at the centre of the field. What do they intend to do?

hok_text_tailo: siánn-mih kop-ioh-á?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siann2-mih4 kop4-ioh4-a2?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: siánn-mih kop-ioh-á？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siáⁿ-mih kop-ioh-á?
en_text: What is a kop-ioh-á?

hok_text_tailo: tse sī gún tsia ê khiunn-kháu, it-puann lóng kóng-tsò “khòng-iô”--lah, tio̍h sī beh lâi khòng-iô pû han-tsî--lah.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tse1 si7 gun2 tsia1 e5 khiunn1-khau2, it4-puann1 long2 kong2-tso3“khong3-io5”--lah4, tioh8 si7 beh4 lai5 khong3-io5 pu5 han1-tsi5--lah4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這是阮遮的腔口，一般攏講做「炕窯」--啦，就是欲來炕窯pû番薯--啦。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: che sī gún chia ê khiuⁿ-kháu, it-poaⁿ lóng kóng-chò“khòng-iô”--lah, tio̍h sī beh lâi khòng-iô pû han-chî--lah.
en_text: It is the accent we use here. Usually, when we say 'khòng-iô', it means to bake sweet potatoes in kilns.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 為著節省時間，窯，早就疊好勢，kan-tann聽候囡仔抾柴燃火，閣來就是tsiōng番薯、芋仔囥囥入去pû、悶、翕，等候若熟才挖起來食。

en_text: The kiln was piled early to save time. The kids would gather and burn the firewood. Then, we bury the sweet potatoes and yam for them to bake and braise. Once they are cooked, we can dig them up and eat them.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啥物是倯，無經驗就倯，啥物是戇，毋學就戇，「城鄉交流」會當予囡仔學著無仝的智識經驗，值得教育者的重視。

en_text: What does it mean to be naive? Insufficient experience. What about unknowledgeable? Insufficient information. The exchange serves to bridge the gap between the two groups. Through this, children can experience new things. This demands attention from the educators.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-bûn tsok-ka kah “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1 kah4“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 台文作家佮《台文通訊》
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-bûn chok-ka kah“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”
en_text: Taiwanese writers and the book 'Tâi-bûn Thong-sìn'

hok_text_tailo: hōo Tâi-gí hue-ho̍k uân-tsuân ê sìnn-miā-li̍k, mā tsō-tsiū tsin tsē Tâi-bûn tsok-ka, ti̍t-tsiap khai-tshòng tsiàn-āu ê Tâi-gí bûn-ha̍k ūn-tōng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hoo7 tai5-gi2 hue1-hok8 uan5-tsuan5 e5 sinn3-mia7-lik8, ma7 tso7-tsiu7 tsin1 tse7 tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1, tit8-tsiap4 khai1-tshong3 tsian3-au7 e5 tai5-gi2 bun5-hak8 un7-tong7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 予台語恢復完全的性命力，嘛造就真濟台文作家，直接開創戰後的台語文學運動。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hō͘ Tâi-gí hoe-ho̍k oân-choân ê sìⁿ-miā-le̍k, mā chō-chiū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka, ti̍t-chiap khai-chhòng chiàn-āu ê Tâi-gí bûn-ha̍k ūn-tōng.
en_text: Restoring the Taiwanese language to its full vitality also produced many Taiwanese writers, directly sparking the post-war Taiwanese literature movement.

hok_text_tailo: tī tsit tsióng kuè-tîng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” pān-ián sian-hong-tsiá ê kak-sik, tong-tshoo ê huat-khí-tsiá ê uán-kiàn kah î-tshî kàu-tann jī-tsa̍p nî sóo-ū tsham-ú-tsiá ê khóo-sim hù-tshut, lóng tsin ta̍t-tit lán kìng-phuè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti7 tsit4 tsiong2 kue3-ting5-tiong1, “tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”pan7-ian2 sian1-hong1-tsia2 e5 kak4-sik4, tong1-tshoo1 e5 huat4-khi2-tsia2 e5 uan2-kian3 kah4 i5-tshi5 kau3-tann1 ji7-tsap8 ni5 soo2-u7 tsham1-u2-tsia2 e5 khoo2-sim1 hu3-tshut4, long2 tsin1 tat8-tit4 lan2 king3-phue3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 佇這種過程中，《台文通訊》扮演先鋒者的角色，當初的發起者的遠見佮維持到今二十年所有參與者的苦心付出，攏真值得咱敬佩。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tī chit chióng kòe-têng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”pān-ián sian-hong-chiá ê kak-sek, tong-chho͘ ê hoat-khí-chiá ê oán-kiàn kah î-chhî kàu-taⁿ jī-cha̍p nî só͘-ū chham-ú-chiá ê khó͘-sim hù-chhut, lóng chin ta̍t-tit lán kèng-phòe.
en_text: In this process, 'Tâi-bûn Thong-sìn' played the role of a pioneer. The vision of the original initiator and the painstaking efforts of all participants for the past 20 years are worthy of our admiration.

hok_text_tailo: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng tsing-tshú kóng Tâi-gú ê khuân-lī, huàn tshínn bó-gú ì-sik liáu-āu, tsiah liân-tài tsiap-suà it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi “Tâi-uân uē-bûn lūn-tsiàn” bē uân-sîng ê gī-tê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: it4-tit8 kau3 it4 kiu2 pat4 khong3 ni5-tai7 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 tsing1-tshu2 kong2 tai5-gu2 e5 khuan5-li7, huan3 tshinn2 bo2-gu2 i3-sik4 liau2-au7, tsiah4 lian5-tai3 tsiap4-sua3 it4 kiu2 sam1 khong3 ni5-tai7“tai5-uan5 ue7-bun5 lun7-tsian3”be7 uan5-sing5 e5 gi7-te5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 一直到一九八零年代台語文運動爭取講台語的權利，喚醒母語意識了後，才連帶接紲一九三零年代「台灣話文論戰」未完成的議題。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng cheng-chhú kóng Tâi-gú ê khoân-lī, hoàn chhíⁿ bó-gú ì-sek liáu-āu, chiah liân-tài chiap-sòa it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi“Tâi-oân ōe-bûn lūn-chiàn”bē oân-sêng ê gī-tê.
en_text: It was not until the Taiwanese language movement in the 1980s, which fought for the right to speak Taiwanese and awakened a mother tongue awareness, that the unresolved issue of the 'Taiwanese Language Debate' from the 1930s could be continued.

hok_text_tailo: tuì Tâi-gú bûn-ha̍k ê luē-hâm kap hîng-sik lâi tsò phîng-kè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tui3 tai5-gu2 bun5-hak8 e5 lue7-ham5 kap4 hing5-sik4 lai5 tso3 phing5-ke3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 對台語文學的內涵佮形式來做評價。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tùi Tâi-gú bûn-ha̍k ê lōe-hâm kap hêng-sek lâi chò phêng-kè.
en_text: To provide comments on the Taiwanese Hokkien literature meanings and styles.

hok_text_tailo: “Tâi-bûn pit-huē” ê sîng-guân ū tsin tsē Tâi-bûn tsok-ka sī ti̍t-tsiap hi̍k-tsiá sī kan-tsiap siū-tio̍h “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” ê íng-hióng kah tsō-tsiū, tī “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” jī-tsa̍p tsiu-nî ê li̍t-tsí, sîng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kah tsiok-hok.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “tai5-bun5 pit4-hue7”e5 sing5-guan5 u7 tsin1 tse7 tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1 si7 tit8-tsiap4 hik8-tsia2 si7 kan1-tsiap4 siu7-tioh8“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”e5 ing2-hiong2 kah4 tso7-tsiu7, ti7“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”ji7-tsap8 tsiu1-ni5 e5 lit8-tsi2, sing5-sim1 hian3-siong7 gun2 e5 kam2-sia7 kah4 tsiok4-hok4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「台文筆會」的成員有真濟台文作家是直接或者是間接受著《台文通訊》的影響佮造就，佇《台文通訊》二十週年的日子，誠心獻上阮的感謝佮祝福。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Tâi-bûn pit-hōe”ê sêng-goân ū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka sī ti̍t-chiap he̍k-chiá sī kan-chiap siū-tio̍h“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”ê éng-hióng kah chō-chiū, tī“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”jī-cha̍p chiu-nî ê li̍t-chí, sêng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kah chiok-hok.
en_text: Among the members of 'Taiwanese Hokkien Pen', many Taiwanese Hokkien authors were directly or indirectly under the influence and success of the 'Taiwanese Hokkien Writing Forum'. On this day of the 20th anniversary of the 'Taiwanese Hokkien Writing Forum', I would like to express my sincerest gratitude and wishes.

hok_text_tailo: ( tsok-tsiá sī Tâi-bûn pit-huē ê lí-sū-tiúnn, Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē ê táng-sū: tsit phinn sī uì “khai-khún, iā-tsíng, senn-thuànn ─ Lí Kang Khiok tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē tsa̍p-gōo tsiu-nî ti̍k khan” tiah--tshut-lâi--ê. )
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: (tsok4-tsia2 si7 tai5-bun5 pit4-hue7 e5 li2-su7-tiunn2, li2 kang1 khiok4 tai5-gu2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 e5 tang2-su7: tsit4 phinn1 si7 ui3“khai1-khun2,ia7-tsing2,senn1-thuann3─li2 kang1 khiok4 tai5-gi2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 tsap8-goo7 tsiu1-ni5 tik8 khan1”tiah4--tshut4-lai5--e5.)
hok_text_hanlo_tai: （作者是台文筆會的理事長、李江却台語文教基金會的董事：這篇是對《開墾、掖種、生湠─李江却台語文教基金會十五周年特刊》摘--出-來--的。）
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: (chok-chiá sī Tâi-bûn pit-hōe ê lí-sū-tiúⁿ, Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe ê táng-sū: chit phiⁿ sī ùi“khai-khún,iā-chéng,seⁿ-thòaⁿ─Lí Kang Khiok tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe cha̍p-gō͘ chiu-nî te̍k khan”tiah--chhut-lâi--ê.)
en_text: The author is chairman of the Taiwanese Pen and Lí Kang-khiok Taiwanese Hokkien Education Foundation. This article is an extract from the 15th-anniversary special publication.

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lâu lāu-su,chhiáⁿ-mn̄g,lán ha̍k-hāu ū kúi ūi lāu-su?
en_text: Teacher Lâu, how many teachers are there in our school?

hok_text_tailo: Tsha-put-to jī-tsa̍p ê. Ū--ê sī guā-kok-lâng, in sī teh kà Ing-gí--ê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsha1-put4-to1 ji7-tsap8 e5.u7--e5 si7 gua7-kok4-lang5,in1 si7 teh4 ka3 ing1-gi2--e5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 差不多二十个。有--的是外國人，in是teh教英語--的。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chha-put-to jī-cha̍p ê.Ū--ê sī gōa-kok-lâng,in sī teh kà Eng-gí--ê.
en_text: There are about 20 of them. Some of them are foreigners, and they are English teachers.

hok_text_tailo: Ha̍k-sing tuā-pōo-hūn sī Bí-kok-lâng, sī--bô?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hak8-sing1 tua7-poo7-hun7 si7 bi2-kok4-lang5,si7--bo5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 學生大部份是美國人，是--無？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ha̍k-seng tōa-pō͘-hūn sī Bí-kok-lâng,sī--bô?
en_text: Most of the students are Americans, right?

hok_text_tailo: Sī, m̄-koh hit nn̄g ê sī Ing-kok-lâng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: si7,m7-koh4 hit4 nng7 e5 si7 ing1-kok4-lang5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 是，m̄-koh彼兩个是英國人。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Sī,m̄-koh hit nn̄g ê sī Eng-kok-lâng.
en_text: Yes, but two of them are British.

hok_text_tailo: Tsit nn̄g ê ha̍k-sing sī Tik-kok-lâng, sī--bô?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsit4 nng7 e5 hak8-sing1 si7 tik4-kok4-lang5,si7--bo5?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這兩个學生是德國人，是--無？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chit nn̄g ê ha̍k-seng sī Tek-kok-lâng,sī--bô?
en_text: Are these two students German?

hok_text_tailo: Bûn-tsiong it
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: bun5-tsiong1 it4
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 文章一
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Bûn-chiong it
en_text: Article 1

hok_text_tailo: siû-tsuí phah-phōng-siû
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siu5-tsui2 phah4-phong7-siu5
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 泅水拍滂泅
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siû-chúi phah-phōng-siû
en_text: Swim and play with water.

hok_text_tailo: “siánn-mih teh bô tshīng-sann?! siû-tsuí lóng mā tio̍h tshīng iû-íng-sann, iû-íng-khòo khì tī iû-íng-tî siû--ah...”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “siann2-mih4 teh4 bo5 tshing7-sann1?! siu5-tsui2 long2 ma7 tioh8 tshing7 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2-khoo3 khi3 ti7 iu5-ing2-ti5 siu5--ah4...”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「啥物咧無穿衫？！泅水攏嘛著穿游泳衫、游泳褲去佇游泳池泅--啊……」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “siáⁿ-mih teh bô chhēng-saⁿ?! siû-chúi lóng mā tio̍h chhēng iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng-khò͘ khì tī iû-éng-tî siû--ah...”
en_text: What do you mean naked? You still need to wear swimsuits and swimming trunks in the pool...'

hok_text_tailo: suah hōo in ta̍k ê lâng bīn-sik kuài-kuài, ū lâng siann khê tò mn̄g: “siánn-mih sī iû-íng-tî? ah iû-íng-sann, iû-íng-khòo sī senn-tsò siánn-mih-khuán?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: suah4 hoo7 in1 tak8 e5 lang5 bin7-sik4 kuai3-kuai3, u7 lang5 siann1 khe5 to3 mng7: “siann2-mih4 si7 iu5-ing2-ti5? ah4 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2-khoo3 si7 senn1-tso3 siann2-mih4-khuan2?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 煞予in逐个人面色怪怪，有人聲khê倒問：「啥物是游泳池？啊游泳衫、游泳褲是生做啥物款？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: soah hō͘ in ta̍k ê lâng bīn-sek koài-koài, ū lâng siaⁿ khê tò mn̄g: “siáⁿ-mih sī iû-éng-tî? ah iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng-khò͘ sī seⁿ-chò siáⁿ-mih-khoán?”
en_text: All of them looked confused. Someone in the crowd asked, 'What is a swimming pool? What are swimsuits and swim trunks used for?'

hok_text_tailo: kì-tî-tiong, Gî-lân pēnn-īnn Tiong-san sok-sià-lāi înn-hîng tsuí-tî, ū pa-pa kā guá khoo tshiū-ling-khoo phah-phōng-siû ê ìn-sióng;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ki3-ti5-tiong1, gi5-lan5 penn7-inn7 tiong1-san1 sok4-sia3-lai7 inn5-hing5 tsui2-ti5, u7 pa1-pa1 ka7 gua2 khoo1 tshiu7-ling1-khoo1 phah4-phong7-siu5 e5 in3-siong2;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 記持中，宜蘭病院中山宿舍內圓形水池，有爸爸共我箍樹奶箍拍滂泅的印象；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kì-tî-tiong, Gî-lân pēⁿ-īⁿ Tiong-san sok-sià-lāi îⁿ-hêng chúi-tî, ū pa-pa kā góa kho͘ chhiū-leng-kho͘ phah-phōng-siû ê ìn-sióng;
en_text: In my memory, in the circular pool in the Tiong-san dormitory of Gî-lân Hospital, I have the impression that my father gave me the impression of playing with water and splashing with a rubber ring.

hok_text_tailo: kū-siânn tsùn-kau ( Pat-tshian-tāi-tshuan ) ê tang-pîng kah lâm-tuānn sui-jiân tī sing-ua̍h-tiong ê sin-khu-pinn, m̄-koh, pa-pa ma-ma put-tsún gún khì tsùn-kau hia sńg-tsuí, in-uī ke-kiám ū sí káu, sí niau kah tsi̍t-kuá bô tshing-khì, lâng bô-ài, pháinn--khì, hāi--khì, lah-sap ê mih-kiānn tī tsùn-kau-lāi phû-lâu.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ku7-siann5 tsun3-kau1(pat4-tshian1-tai7-tshuan1)e5 tang1-ping5 kah4 lam5-tuann7 sui1-jian5 ti7 sing1-uah8-tiong1 e5 sin1-khu1-pinn1, m7-koh4,pa1-pa1 ma1-ma1 put4-tsun2 gun2 khi3 tsun3-kau1 hia1 sng2-tsui2, in1-ui7 ke1-kiam2 u7 si2 kau2,si2 niau1 kah4 tsit8-kua2 bo5 tshing1-khi3,lang5 bo5-ai3,phainn2--khi3,hai7--khi3,lah4-sap4 e5 mih4-kiann7 ti7 tsun3-kau1-lai7 phu5-lau5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 舊城圳溝（八千代川）的東爿佮南段雖然佇生活中的身軀邊，毋過，爸爸媽媽不准阮去圳溝遐耍水，因為加減有死狗、死貓佮一寡無清氣、人無愛、歹--去、害--去、lah-sap的物件佇圳溝內浮流。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kū-siâⁿ chùn-kau(Pat-chhian-tāi-chhoan)ê tang-pêng kah lâm-tōaⁿ sui-jiân tī seng-oa̍h-tiong ê sin-khu-piⁿ, m̄-koh,pa-pa ma-ma put-chún gún khì chùn-kau hia sńg-chúi, in-ūi ke-kiám ū sí káu,sí niau kah chi̍t-kóa bô chheng-khì,lâng bô-ài,pháiⁿ--khì,hāi--khì,lah-sap ê mih-kiāⁿ tī chùn-kau-lāi phû-lâu.
en_text: Our parents do not allow us to play in the canal although we live near the east and south sides of the canal surrounding the old town (Peh-tshing-tāi-tshuan) because there are always dead cats and dogs, rubbish and dirty items and objects that people discarded floating around in the canal.

hok_text_tailo: pa-pa nā khui-tshuì kóng beh khì siû-tsuí phah-phōng-siû, gún tsia-ê gín-á tō ē huann-hí kah tuā, sè-siann kiò, ma-ma tio̍h ē kiò gún kín tàu tshuân iû-íng-sann, iû-íng khòo, sio̍k-pháng, líng kún-tsuí, sui̋-tóo, kué-tsí...
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: pa1-pa1 na7 khui1-tshui3 kong2 beh4 khi3 siu5-tsui2 phah4-phong7-siu5, gun2 tsia1-e5 gin2-a2 to7 e7 huann1-hi2 kah4 tua7,se3-siann1 kio3, ma1-ma1 tioh8 e7 kio3 gun2 kin2 tau3 tshuan5 iu5-ing2-sann1,iu5-ing2 khoo3,siok8-phang2,ling2 kun2-tsui2,sui9-too2,kue2-tsi2...
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 爸爸若開喙講欲去泅水拍滂泅，阮遮的囡仔就會歡喜甲大、細聲叫，媽媽就會叫阮緊鬥攢游泳衫、游泳褲、sio̍k-pháng、冷滾水、sui̋-tóo、果子……
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: pa-pa nā khui-chhùi kóng beh khì siû-chúi phah-phōng-siû, gún chia-ê gín-á tō ē hoaⁿ-hí kah tōa,sè-siaⁿ kiò, ma-ma tio̍h ē kiò gún kín tàu chhoân iû-éng-saⁿ,iû-éng khò͘,sio̍k-pháng,léng kún-chúi,sŭi-tó͘,kóe-chí...
en_text: As kids, we would cheer loudly in joy whenever dad suggested going for a swim. Mom would then hurry us to prepare the swimming attire, bread, water, bottles, and fruits.

hok_text_tailo: ah tshù-pinn-keh-piah ê gín-á-phuānn ke-kiám ē ū lâng tsáu-lâi gún tau ê mn̂g-kha-kháu, thàm-thâu khuànn gún tsi̍t-ke-hué-á ê bô-îng, huann-hí!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ah4 tshu3-pinn1-keh4-piah4 e5 gin2-a2-phuann7 ke1-kiam2 e7 u7 lang5 tsau2-lai5 gun2 tau1 e5 mng5-kha1-khau2, tham3-thau5 khuann3 gun2 tsit8-ke1-hue2-a2 e5 bo5-ing5,huann1-hi2!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啊厝邊隔壁的囡仔伴加減會有人走來阮兜的門跤口，探頭看阮一家伙仔的無閒、歡喜！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ah chhù-piⁿ-keh-piah ê gín-á-phōaⁿ ke-kiám ē ū lâng cháu-lâi gún tau ê mn̂g-kha-kháu, thàm-thâu khòaⁿ gún chi̍t-ke-hóe-á ê bô-êng,hoaⁿ-hí!
en_text: Neighbouring children sometimes come to the doorstep of my house to peek at the life and happiness of my family!

hok_text_tailo: tsit ê iû-íng-tî sī ma-ma ē lo̍h-tsuí o̍h siû, phû ē khí--lâi ê sóo-tsāi, mā sī guá o̍h thiàu-tsuí, siû tshut tshing bí kah khîn liān lia̍h-ko-siû ê ki-tē.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsit4 e5 iu5-ing2-ti5 si7 ma1-ma1 e7 loh8-tsui2 oh8 siu5,phu5 e7 khi2--lai5 e5 soo2-tsai7, ma7 si7 gua2 oh8 thiau3-tsui2,siu5 tshut4 tshing1 bi2 kah4 khin5 lian7 liah8-ko1-siu5 e5 ki1-te7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這个游泳池是媽媽會落水學泅、浮會起--來的所在，嘛是我學跳水、泅出千米佮勤練掠篙泅的基地。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chit ê iû-éng-tî sī ma-ma ē lo̍h-chúi o̍h siû,phû ē khí--lâi ê só͘-chāi, mā sī góa o̍h thiàu-chúi,siû chhut chheng bí kah khîn liān lia̍h-ko-siû ê ki-tē.
en_text: This swimming pool is where mum learned how to swim. It is also the place where I learned to dive, do long-distance swimming and freestyle swimming.

hok_text_tailo: hioh-jua̍h lé-pài ê sî, gún mā ē khì Hok-liông hái-tsuí-i̍k-tiûnn sńg-tsuí, khuànn liû-hîng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hioh4-juah8 le2-pai3 e5 si5, gun2 ma7 e7 khi3 hok4-liong5 hai2-tsui2-ik8-tiunn5 sng2-tsui2,khuann3 liu5-hing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 歇熱禮拜的時，阮嘛會去福隆海水浴場耍水、看流行。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hioh-joa̍h lé-pài ê sî, gún mā ē khì Hok-liông hái-chúi-e̍k-tiûⁿ sńg-chúi,khòaⁿ liû-hêng.
en_text: We would go to Hok-liông seaside resort to play during the weekends and summer breaks.

hok_text_tailo: lóng sī uì tsia o̍h--lâi, bat--lâi--ê!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: long2 si7 ui3 tsia1 oh8--lai5,bat4--lai5--e5!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 攏是對遮學--來、捌--來--的！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lóng sī ùi chia o̍h--lâi,bat--lâi--ê!
en_text: I learned everything from here.

hok_text_tailo: “siû-tsuí ê iàu-líng sī m̄ kiann tsuí, tō sing o̍h tshàng-tsuí-bī...”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “siu5-tsui2 e5 iau3-ling2 si7 m7 kiann1 tsui2, to7 sing1 oh8 tshang3-tsui2-bi7...”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「泅水的要領是毋驚水，就先學藏水沬……」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “siû-chúi ê iàu-léng sī m̄ kiaⁿ chúi, tō seng o̍h chhàng-chúi-bī...”
en_text: The most important thing about swimming is not to be afraid of water. First, learn to hold your breath under the water...

hok_text_tailo: siūnn-khí gín-á sî-tāi, pa-pa kà guán o̍h siû-tsuí ê tsióng-tsióng, sim-kuann-thâu kam-tinn ê tsuânn-tsuí tō ûn-ûn-á ik--tshut-lâi...
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siunn7-khi2 gin2-a2 si5-tai7, pa1-pa1 ka3 guan2 oh8 siu5-tsui2 e5 tsiong2-tsiong2, sim1-kuann1-thau5 kam1-tinn1 e5 tsuann5-tsui2 to7 un5-un5-a2 ik4--tshut4-lai5...
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 想起囡仔時代，爸爸教阮學泅水的種種，心肝頭甘甜的泉水就勻勻仔溢--出-來……
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siūⁿ-khí gín-á sî-tāi, pa-pa kà goán o̍h siû-chúi ê chióng-chióng, sim-koaⁿ-thâu kam-tiⁿ ê chôaⁿ-chúi tō ûn-ûn-á ek--chhut-lâi...
en_text: Reminiscing on my childhood, the time when my father used to teach me to swim, my heart was overwhelmed with bittersweetness.

hok_text_tailo: koh ū bô kâng ê sik-tsuí hun-tsuí-tō suànn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: koh4 u7 bo5 kang5 e5 sik4-tsui2 hun1-tsui2-to7 suann3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣有無仝的色水分水道線。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: koh ū bô kâng ê sek-chúi hun-chúi-tō sòaⁿ.
en_text: Different colours segregate the waterways.

hok_text_tailo: tî-á-pinn bí-puànn-guā sì-khoo uî-khoo ū tshioh-puànn khuah ê âng-mn̂g-thôo tsuí-kau, sī hōo beh lo̍h-tsuí tsìn-tsîng ê lâng hòo-tsuí pī sin, ah-sī sè-hàn gín-á sńg-tsuí, bô lo̍h-tsuí ê tuā-lâng tsìm kha, bak tsuí ê sóo-tsāi;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti5-a2-pinn1 bi2-puann3-gua7 si3-khoo1 ui5-khoo1 u7 tshioh4-puann3 khuah4 e5 ang5-mng5-thoo5 tsui2-kau1, si7 hoo7 beh4 loh8-tsui2 tsin3-tsing5 e5 lang5 hoo3-tsui2 pi7 sin1, ah4-si7 se3-han3 gin2-a2 sng2-tsui2,bo5 loh8-tsui2 e5 tua7-lang5 tsim3 kha1,bak4 tsui2 e5 soo2-tsai7;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 池仔邊米半外四箍圍箍有尺半闊的紅毛塗水溝，是予欲落水進前的人戽水備身，抑是細漢囡仔耍水、無落水的大人浸跤、沐水的所在；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tî-á-piⁿ bí-pòaⁿ-gōa sì-kho͘ ûi-kho͘ ū chhioh-pòaⁿ khoah ê âng-mn̂g-thô͘ chúi-kau, sī hō͘ beh lo̍h-chúi chìn-chêng ê lâng hò͘-chúi pī sin, ah-sī sè-hàn gín-á sńg-chúi,bô lo̍h-chúi ê tōa-lâng chìm kha,bak chúi ê só͘-chāi;
en_text: There is a one-foot-and-a-half wide cement ditch in the four circles about one-and-a-half-meter away from the pool. It is a place for people to warm up before entering the pool, for children to play in, and for adults who were not swimming to soak their feet and feel the water.

hok_text_tailo: too-tshī-sông, tsng-kha-gōng
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: too1-tshi7-song5,tsng1-kha1-gong7
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 都市倯，庄跤戇
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: to͘-chhī-sông,chng-kha-gōng
en_text: They are naive city dwellers and unknowledgeable villagers.

hok_text_tailo: Tshân-tiong-ng?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshan5-tiong1-ng1?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 田中央？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chhân-tiong-ng?
en_text: In the middle of the field?

hok_text_tailo: ah ha̍k-hāu m̄ khí tī “tshân-tē ê tiong-ng”?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ah4 hak8-hau7 m7 khi2 ti7“tshan5-te7 e5 tiong1-ng1”?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啊學校毋起佇「田地的中央」？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ah ha̍k-hāu m̄ khí tī“chhân-tē ê tiong-ng”?
en_text: Ah, is the school not built 'in the middle of the field'?

hok_text_tailo: ( lâi kàu Tshân-tiong-ng ê Tâi-pak gín-á, ū lâng án-ne gī-lūn. too-tshī-gōng )
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: (lai5 kau3 tshan5-tiong1-ng1 e5 tai5-pak4 gin2-a2, u7 lang5 an2-ne1 gi7-lun7. too1-tshi7-gong7)
hok_text_hanlo_tai: （來到田中央的台北囡仔，有人按呢議論。都市戇）
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: (lâi kàu Chhân-tiong-ng ê Tâi-pak gín-á, ū lâng án-ne gī-lūn. to͘-chhī-gōng)
en_text: (The children from Tâi-pak came to the village. Some of them commented — naive people from the city.)

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-pak gín-á lâi--looh, ta̍k-ke kín lâi khuànn--ooh!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-pak4 gin2-a2 lai5--looh4, tak8-ke1 kin2 lai5 khuann3--ooh4!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 台北囡仔來--囉，逐家緊來看--喔！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-pak gín-á lâi--lo͘h, ta̍k-ke kín lâi khòaⁿ--o͘h!
en_text: Tâi-pak kids are here, everyone come and see!

hok_text_tailo: Uâ á!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ua5 a2!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: Uâ á！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ôa á!
en_text: Wow!

hok_text_tailo: ū-kàu hó-tsia̍h, pí gún a-bú  bé--ê khah hó-tsia̍h!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: u7-kau3 ho2-tsiah8, pi2 gun2 a1-bu2 be2--e5 khah4 ho2-tsiah8!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有夠好食，比阮阿母買--的較好食！

en_text: It is so tasty, even tastier than the one my mother bought!

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 半晡仔後，趣味閣鬧熱的齣頭才欲開始，一陣庄跤戇佮都市倯來到田中央（真正的田地的內面），欲創啥？

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這是阮遮的腔口，一般攏講做「炕窯」--啦，就是欲來炕窯pû番薯--啦。

en_text: It is the accent we use here. Usually, when we say 'khòng-iô', it means to bake sweet potatoes in kilns.

hok_text_tailo: uī-tio̍h tsiat-síng sî-kan, iô, tsá tio̍h tha̍h hó-sè, kan-tann thìng-hāu gín-á khioh-tshâ hiânn-hué, koh lâi tio̍h sī tsiōng han-tsî, ōo-á khǹg-khǹg ji̍p-khì pû, būn, hip, tán-hāu nā si̍k tsiah óo khí-lâi tsia̍h.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ui7-tioh8 tsiat4-sing2 si5-kan1, io5,tsa2 tioh8 thah8 ho2-se3, kan1-tann1 thing3-hau7 gin2-a2 khioh4-tsha5 hiann5-hue2, koh4 lai5 tioh8 si7 tsiong7 han1-tsi5,oo7-a2 khng3-khng3 jip8-khi3 pu5,bun7,hip4, tan2-hau7 na7 sik8 tsiah4 oo2 khi2-lai5 tsiah8.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 為著節省時間，窯，早就疊好勢，kan-tann聽候囡仔抾柴燃火，閣來就是tsiōng番薯、芋仔囥囥入去pû、悶、翕，等候若熟才挖起來食。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ūi-tio̍h chiat-séng sî-kan, iô,chá tio̍h tha̍h hó-sè, kan-taⁿ thèng-hāu gín-á khioh-chhâ hiâⁿ-hóe, koh lâi tio̍h sī chiōng han-chî,ō͘-á khǹg-khǹg ji̍p-khì pû,būn,hip, tán-hāu nā se̍k chiah ó͘ khí-lâi chia̍h.
en_text: The kiln was piled early to save time. The kids would gather and burn the firewood. Then, we bury the sweet potatoes and yam for them to bake and braise. Once they are cooked, we can dig them up and eat them.

hok_text_tailo: kiat-sok liáu tsin ū ì-gī ê tsi̍t kang, “siânn-hiong kau-liû”, “too-tshī-sông kah tsng-kha-gōng” kâng it iūnn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: kiat4-sok4 liau2 tsin1 u7 i3-gi7 e5 tsit8 kang1, “siann5-hiong1 kau1-liu5”, “too1-tshi7-song5 kah4 tsng1-kha1-gong7”kang5 it4 iunn7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 結束了真有意義的一工，「城鄉交流」，「都市倯佮庄跤戇」仝一樣。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kiat-sok liáu chin ū ì-gī ê chi̍t kang, “siâⁿ-hiong kau-liû”, “to͘-chhī-sông kah chng-kha-gōng”kâng it iūⁿ.
en_text: The meaningful activities for the city dwellers-villagers exchange have ended. Naive city dwellers or knowledgeable villagers, kids will be kids.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啥物是倯，無經驗就倯，啥物是戇，毋學就戇，「城鄉交流」會當予囡仔學著無仝的智識經驗，值得教育者的重視。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siáⁿ-mih sī sông, bô keng-giām tō sông, siáⁿ-mih sī gōng, m̄ o̍h tō gōng, “siâⁿ-hiong kau-liû”ē-tàng hō͘ gín-á o̍h-tio̍h bô kâng ê tì-sek keng-giām, ta̍t-tit kàu-io̍k-chiá ê tiōng-sī.
en_text: What is silly? Being inexperienced is being silly. What is stupid? Not learning is stupid. Through 'the Urban-Rural Exchange' children can learn different knowledges and experiences. It is something worthy of the attention of educators.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-bûn tsok-ka kah “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1 kah4“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 台文作家佮《台文通訊》
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-bûn chok-ka kah“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”
en_text: Taiwanese writers and 'Taiwanese Hokkien Newsletter”

hok_text_tailo: hōo Tâi-gí hue-ho̍k uân-tsuân ê sènn-miā-li̍k, mā tsō-tsiū tsin tsē Tâi-bûn tsok-ka, ti̍t-tsiap khai-tshòng tsiàn-āu ê Tâi-gí bûn-ha̍k ūn-tōng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hoo7 tai5-gi2 hue1-hok8 uan5-tsuan5 e5 senn3-mia7-lik8, ma7 tso7-tsiu7 tsin1 tse7 tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1, tit8-tsiap4 khai1-tshong3 tsian3-au7 e5 tai5-gi2 bun5-hak8 un7-tong7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 予台語恢復完全的性命力，嘛造就真濟台文作家，直接開創戰後的台語文學運動。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hō͘ Tâi-gí hoe-ho̍k oân-choân ê sèⁿ-miā-le̍k, mā chō-chiū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka, ti̍t-chiap khai-chhòng chiàn-āu ê Tâi-gí bûn-ha̍k ūn-tōng.
en_text: Restoring the Taiwanese language to its full vitality also produced many Taiwanese writers, directly sparking the post-war Taiwanese literature movement.

hok_text_tailo: tī tsit tsióng kuè-tîng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” pān-ián sian-hong-tsiá ê kak-sik, tong-tshoo ê huat-khí-tsiá ê uán-kiàn kah uî-tshî kàu-tann jī-tsa̍p nî sóo-ū tsham-ú-tsiá ê khóo-sim hù-tshut, lóng tsin ta̍t-tit lán kìng-phuè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti7 tsit4 tsiong2 kue3-ting5-tiong1, “tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”pan7-ian2 sian1-hong1-tsia2 e5 kak4-sik4, tong1-tshoo1 e5 huat4-khi2-tsia2 e5 uan2-kian3 kah4 ui5-tshi5 kau3-tann1 ji7-tsap8 ni5 soo2-u7 tsham1-u2-tsia2 e5 khoo2-sim1 hu3-tshut4, long2 tsin1 tat8-tit4 lan2 king3-phue3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 佇這種過程中，《台文通訊》扮演先鋒者的角色，當初的發起者的遠見佮維持到今二十年所有參與者的苦心付出，攏真值得咱敬佩。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tī chit chióng kòe-têng-tiong, “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”pān-ián sian-hong-chiá ê kak-sek, tong-chho͘ ê hoat-khí-chiá ê oán-kiàn kah ûi-chhî kàu-taⁿ jī-cha̍p nî só͘-ū chham-ú-chiá ê khó͘-sim hù-chhut, lóng chin ta̍t-tit lán kèng-phòe.
en_text: In this process, the 'Taiwanese Newsletter' played the role of a pioneer. The vision of the founder and the perseverance of all participants in putting in their efforts for 20 years are worthy of our admiration.

hok_text_tailo: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng tsing-tshú kóng Tâi-gú ê kuân-lī, huàn tshénn bó-gí ì-sik liáu-āu, tsiah liân-tài tsiap-suà it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi “Tâi-uân uē-bûn lūn-tsiàn” buē uân-sîng ê gī-tê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: it4-tit8 kau3 it4 kiu2 pat4 khong3 ni5-tai7 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 tsing1-tshu2 kong2 tai5-gu2 e5 kuan5-li7, huan3 tshenn2 bo2-gi2 i3-sik4 liau2-au7, tsiah4 lian5-tai3 tsiap4-sua3 it4 kiu2 sam1 khong3 ni5-tai7“tai5-uan5 ue7-bun5 lun7-tsian3”bue7 uan5-sing5 e5 gi7-te5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 一直到一九八零年代台語文運動爭取講台語的權利，喚醒母語意識了後，才連帶接紲一九三零年代「台灣話文論戰」未完成的議題。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: it-ti̍t kàu it kiú pat khòng nî-tāi Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng cheng-chhú kóng Tâi-gú ê koân-lī, hoàn chhéⁿ bó-gí ì-sek liáu-āu, chiah liân-tài chiap-sòa it kiú sam khòng nî-tāi“Tâi-oân ōe-bûn lūn-chiàn”bōe oân-sêng ê gī-tê.
en_text: It was not until the Taiwanese language movement in the 1980s, which fought for the right to speak Taiwanese and awakened a mother tongue awareness, that the unresolved issue of the 'Taiwanese Language Debate' from the 1930s could be continued.

hok_text_tailo: tuì Tâi-gú bûn-ha̍k ê luē-hâm kap hîng-sik lâi tsò phîng-kè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tui3 tai5-gu2 bun5-hak8 e5 lue7-ham5 kap4 hing5-sik4 lai5 tso3 phing5-ke3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 對台語文學的內涵佮形式來做評價。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tùi Tâi-gú bûn-ha̍k ê lōe-hâm kap hêng-sek lâi chò phêng-kè.
en_text: To provide comments on the Taiwanese Hokkien literature meanings and styles.

hok_text_tailo: “Tâi-bûn pit-huē” ê sîng-guân ū tsin tsē Tâi-bûn tsok-ka sī ti̍t-tsiap hi̍k-tsiá sī kan-tsiap siū-tio̍h “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” ê íng-hióng kah tsō-tsiū, tī “Tâi-bûn thong-sìn” jī-tsa̍p tsiu-nî ê ji̍t-tsí, sîng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kap tsiok-hok.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “tai5-bun5 pit4-hue7”e5 sing5-guan5 u7 tsin1 tse7 tai5-bun5 tsok4-ka1 si7 tit8-tsiap4 hik8-tsia2 si7 kan1-tsiap4 siu7-tioh8“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”e5 ing2-hiong2 kah4 tso7-tsiu7, ti7“tai5-bun5 thong1-sin3”ji7-tsap8 tsiu1-ni5 e5 jit8-tsi2, sing5-sim1 hian3-siong7 gun2 e5 kam2-sia7 kap4 tsiok4-hok4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「台文筆會」的成員有真濟台文作家是直接或者是間接受著《台文通訊》的影響佮造就，佇《台文通訊》二十週年的日子，誠心獻上阮的感謝佮祝福。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Tâi-bûn pit-hōe”ê sêng-goân ū chin chē Tâi-bûn chok-ka sī ti̍t-chiap he̍k-chiá sī kan-chiap siū-tio̍h“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”ê éng-hióng kah chō-chiū, tī“Tâi-bûn thong-sìn”jī-cha̍p chiu-nî ê ji̍t-chí, sêng-sim hiàn-siōng gún ê kám-siā kap chiok-hok.
en_text: Many Taiwanese writers from the Taiwanese Writers Society are directly or indirectly influenced by the Taiwanese Newsletter. On this day, the 20th anniversary of the Taiwanese Newsletter, the writers thanked the publication and gave their blessings.

hok_text_tailo: ( tsok-tsiá sī Tâi-bûn pit-huē ê lí-sū-tiúnn, Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē ê táng-sū: tsit phinn sī uì “khai-khún, iā-tsíng, senn-thuànn ─ Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē tsa̍p-gōo tsiu-nî ti̍k khan” tiah--tshut-lâi--ê. )
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: (tsok4-tsia2 si7 tai5-bun5 pit4-hue7 e5 li2-su7-tiunn2, li2 kang1 khiok4 tai5-gu2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 e5 tang2-su7: tsit4 phinn1 si7 ui3“khai1-khun2,ia7-tsing2,senn1-thuann3─li2 kang1 khiok4 tai5-gu2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 tsap8-goo7 tsiu1-ni5 tik8 khan1”tiah4--tshut4-lai5--e5.)
hok_text_hanlo_tai: （作者是台文筆會的理事長、李江却台語文教基金會的董事：這篇是對《開墾、掖種、生湠─李江却台語文教基金會十五周年特刊》摘--出-來--的。）
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: (chok-chiá sī Tâi-bûn pit-hōe ê lí-sū-tiúⁿ, Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe ê táng-sū: chit phiⁿ sī ùi“khai-khún,iā-chéng,seⁿ-thòaⁿ─Lí Kang Khiok Tâi-gú bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe cha̍p-gō͘ chiu-nî te̍k khan”tiah--chhut-lâi--ê.)
en_text: (The author is the chairman of the Taiwanese Writers Club and the director of the Lí Kang Khiok Taiwanese Cultural and Educational Foundation. This excerpt is taken from 'Cultivating, Planting, and Proliferating - The Special Issue of the 15th Anniversary of the Lí Kang Khiok Taiwanese Language Education Foundation'.)
