hok_text_hanlo_tai: 毋捌共「媠」講出喙的彼个人。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: m̄ bat kā“súi”kóng chhut-chhùi ê hit ê lâng.
en_text: He is the one who has never uttered the word 'beautiful'.

hok_text_tailo: tsù-bûn ê toh-tsū-á kah pue-tiām-á the̍h--tńg-lâi.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsu3-bun5 e5 toh4-tsu7-a2 kah4 pue1-tiam7-a2 theh8--tng2-lai5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 注文的桌苴仔佮杯墊仔提--轉來。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chù-bûn ê toh-chū-á kah poe-tiām-á the̍h--tńg-lâi.
en_text: Please pick up the table mat and the coasters that I ordered.

hok_text_tailo: Hit-sî-tsūn, khin-kang-gia̍p tsiah khai-sí puh-ínn, tsin tsē kang-tiûnn khiàm kang, tsia-ê thâu-ke tō kā khiàm kang ê būn-tê
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hit4-si5-tsun7,khin1-kang1-giap8 tsiah4 khai1-si2 puh4-inn2, tsin1 tse7 kang1-tiunn5 khiam3 kang1, tsia1-e5 thau5-ke1 to7 ka7 khiam3 kang1 e5 bun7-te5
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 彼時陣，輕工業才開始發穎，真濟工場欠工，遮的頭家就共欠工的問題
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hit-sî-chūn,khin-kang-gia̍p chiah khai-sí puh-íⁿ, chin chē kang-tiûⁿ khiàm kang, chia-ê thâu-ke tō kā khiàm kang ê būn-tê
en_text: At that time, the light industry was still in its early stages. Many factories faced a labour shortage. The business owners here decided to solve the labour shortage issue.

hok_text_tailo: tāng tuì kok-sió pit-gia̍p-sing ê thâu-khak-tíng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tang7 tui3 kok4-sio2 pit4-giap8-sing1 e5 thau5-khak4-ting2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 動對國小畢業生的頭殼頂。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tāng tùi kok-sió pit-gia̍p-seng ê thâu-khak-téng.
en_text: By targeting the elementary school graduates.

hok_text_tailo: Pit-gia̍p tián-lé ê tsi̍t kò gue̍h tsîng, ū tsi̍t kang, A-sing ê kàu-sik hiông-hiông lâi tsi̍t ê thâu-ke beh tshuē sió-kang.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: pit4-giap8 tian2-le2 e5 tsit8 ko3 gueh8 tsing5,u7 tsit8 kang1, a1-sing1 e5 kau3-sik4 hiong5-hiong5 lai5 tsit8 e5 thau5-ke1 beh4 tshue7 sio2-kang1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 畢業典禮的一個月前，有一工，阿生的教室雄雄來一个頭家欲揣小工。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Pit-gia̍p tián-lé ê chi̍t kò goe̍h chêng,ū chi̍t kang, A-seng ê kàu-sek hiông-hiông lâi chi̍t ê thâu-ke beh chhōe sió-kang.
en_text: A month before the graduation ceremony, there was a job, and a boss suddenly came to A-sing's classroom and said he was looking for apprentices here.

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su mn̄g ha̍k-sing kóng: “Kám ū lâng tshut-gia̍p liáu, bô ài kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, beh khì kang-tiûnn thàn-tsînn--ê? Tshiánn gia̍h-tshiú.”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 mng7 hak8-sing1 kong2: “kam2 u7 lang5 tshut4-giap8 liau2,bo5 ai3 ke3-siok8 thak8 kok4-tiong1, beh4 khi3 kang1-tiunn5 than3-tsinn5--e5?tshiann2 giah8-tshiu2.”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師問學生講：「敢有人出業了，無愛繼續讀國中，欲去工場趁錢--的？請攑手。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su mn̄g ha̍k-seng kóng: “Kám ū lâng chhut-gia̍p liáu,bô ài kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, beh khì kang-tiûⁿ thàn-chîⁿ--ê?Chhiáⁿ gia̍h-chhiú.”
en_text: The teacher asked the students, 'Is there anyone here who would not continue middle school and plans to work in the factory after graduation? Please raise your hand.'

hok_text_tailo: A-sing mā gia̍h-tshiú.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 ma7 giah8-tshiu2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生嘛攑手。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng mā gia̍h-chhiú.
en_text: A-sing also raised his hand.

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su tsi̍t-ê-á-tsi̍t-ê kā gia̍h-tshiú ê ha̍k-sing kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-koh, A-sing ê miâ pīng bô tī tíng-bīn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 tsit8-e5-a2-tsit8-e5 ka7 giah8-tshiu2 e5 hak8-sing1 ki3--loh8-lai5, m7-koh4,a1-sing1 e5 mia5 ping7 bo5 ti7 ting2-bin7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師一个仔一个共攑手的學生記--落來，毋過，阿生的名並無佇頂面。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su chi̍t-ê-á-chi̍t-ê kā gia̍h-chhiú ê ha̍k-seng kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-koh,A-seng ê miâ pēng bô tī téng-bīn.
en_text: The teacher takes down the name of the students who raised their hands, one by one.

hok_text_tailo: Hā-khò liáu, lāu-su kā A-sing kiò lâi pinn--á kóng: “Lí ê sîng-tsik tsiah-nī hó, bô beh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, uī-siánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ha7-kho3 liau2,lau7-su1 ka7 a1-sing1 kio3 lai5 pinn1--a2 kong2: “li2 e5 sing5-tsik4 tsiah4-ni7 ho2, bo5 beh4 ke3-siok8 thak8 kok4-tiong1,ui7-siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 下課了，老師共阿生叫來邊--仔講：「你的成績遮爾好，無欲繼續讀國中，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hā-khò liáu,lāu-su kā A-seng kiò lâi piⁿ--á kóng: “Lí ê sêng-chek chiah-nī hó, bô beh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong,ūi-siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: After class, the teacher asked A-sing, 'Your results are good, but you are not going to high school. Why?'

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su suà--lo̍h-khì tuì ha̍k-sing kóng: “Nā án-ne, bîn-á-tsài khí, bô gia̍h-tshiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sik tha̍k-tsheh; ū gia̍h-tshiú--ê tō khì sàu piān-sóo, sàu kàu tshut-gia̍p.”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 sua3--loh8-khi3 tui3 hak8-sing1 kong2: “na7 an2-ne1,bin5-a2-tsai3 khi2, bo5 giah8-tshiu2--e5 lau5 ti7 kau3-sik4 thak8-tsheh4; u7 giah8-tshiu2--e5 to7 khi3 sau3 pian7-soo2,sau3 kau3 tshut4-giap8.”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師紲--落-去對學生講：「若按呢，明仔載起，無攑手--的留佇教室讀冊；有攑手--的就去掃便所，掃到出業。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su sòa--lo̍h-khì tùi ha̍k-seng kóng: “Nā án-ne,bîn-á-chài khí, bô gia̍h-chhiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sek tha̍k-chheh; ū gia̍h-chhiú--ê tō khì sàu piān-só͘,sàu kàu chhut-gia̍p.”
en_text: The teacher then said to the students, 'In this case, tomorrow onwards, those who didn't raise their hand can stay in the classroom to study. Those who raised their hands, you can go sweep the toilets until you graduate.'

hok_text_tailo: A-sing án-tsuánn siūnn to siūnn-bô.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 an2-tsuann2 siunn7 to1 siunn7-bo5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生按怎想都想無。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng án-chóaⁿ siūⁿ to siūⁿ-bô.
en_text: No matter how much A-sing thought about it, he still could not understand.

hok_text_tailo: “Ná ē tsiah bô kong-pênn! Beh tha̍k kok-tiong--ê, tō m̄-bián sàu piān-sóo; bô-huat-tōo koh tha̍k--ê, tō ài sàu piān-sóo, uī-siánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “na2 e7 tsiah4 bo5 kong1-penn5! beh4 thak8 kok4-tiong1--e5,to7 m7-bian2 sau3 pian7-soo2; bo5-huat4-too7 koh4 thak8--e5,to7 ai3 sau3 pian7-soo2,ui7-siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「哪會遮無公平！欲讀國中--的，就毋免掃便所；無法度閣讀--的，就愛掃便所，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Ná ē chiah bô kong-pêⁿ! Beh tha̍k kok-tiong--ê,tō m̄-bián sàu piān-só͘; bô-hoat-tō͘ koh tha̍k--ê,tō ài sàu piān-só͘,ūi-siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: How can it be so unfair? Those who plan to study in middle school do not need to clean the toilet, while those who cannot continue studying will have to clean the toilet. Why?

hok_text_tailo: I sim-lāi it-ti̍t siūnn-bô.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: i1 sim1-lai7 it4-tit8 siunn7-bo5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 伊心內一直想無。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: I sim-lāi it-ti̍t siūⁿ-bô.
en_text: She couldn't figure it out.

hok_text_tailo: Tshut-gia̍p tē-jī kang, A-sing tō koo-tsiânn tshù-pinn ê a-hiann tshuā i khì oo-tshiú-á kang-tshiúnn tsò-kang.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshut4-giap8 te7-ji7 kang1, a1-sing1 to7 koo1-tsiann5 tshu3-pinn1 e5 a1-hiann1 tshua7 i1 khi3 oo1-tshiu2-a2 kang1-tshiunn2 tso3-kang1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 出業第二工，阿生就姑情厝邊的阿兄𤆬伊去烏手仔工廠做工。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chhut-gia̍p tē-jī kang, A-seng tō ko͘-chiâⁿ chhù-piⁿ ê a-hiaⁿ chhōa i khì o͘-chhiú-á kang-chhiúⁿ chò-kang.
en_text: The day after his graduation, A-sing begged his neighbour to get him a job in a blue-collar factory.

hok_text_tailo: A-sing tsiok jīn-tsin, kui-ê hioh-jua̍h tah-tah la̍k-tsa̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 tsiok4 jin7-tsin1, kui1-e5 hioh4-juah8 tah4-tah4 lak8-tsap8 kang1 long2 bo5 hioh4-khun3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生足認真，規个歇熱貼貼六十工攏無歇睏。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng chiok jīn-chin, kui-ê hioh-joa̍h tah-tah la̍k-cha̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
en_text: A-sing was very serious. He never once rested for all sixty days of the summer break.

hok_text_tailo: “A-pah! Guá tsit ê hioh-jua̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah khoo. Sann-pah khoo tàu sio-thinn tshù--lí, sann-pah khoo hōo--guá, hó--bô?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “a1-pah4!gua2 tsit4 e5 hioh4-juah8 than3-tioh8 lak8-pah4 khoo1. sann1-pah4 khoo1 tau3 sio1-thinn1 tshu3--li2,sann1-pah4 khoo1 hoo7--gua2,ho2--bo5?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「阿爸！我這个歇熱趁著六百箍。三百箍鬥相添厝--裡，三百箍予我，好--無？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “A-pah!Góa chit ê hioh-joa̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah kho͘. Saⁿ-pah kho͘ tàu sio-thiⁿ chhù--lí,saⁿ-pah kho͘ hō͘--góa,hó--bô?”
en_text: Dad! I earned six hundred TWD over this summer break. Three hundred TWD for family expenses while the remaining three hundred TWD for myself. Is that okay?

hok_text_tailo: A-sing khin-siann-sè-sueh, tsin kiann in a-pâ pìnn-bīn, in a-pâ tsin pháinn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 khin1-siann1-se3-sueh4,tsin1 kiann1 in1 a1-pa5 pinn3-bin7, in1 a1-pa5 tsin1 phainn2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生輕聲細說，真驚𪜶阿爸變面，𪜶阿爸真歹。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng khin-siaⁿ-sè-soeh,chin kiaⁿ in a-pâ pìⁿ-bīn, in a-pâ chin pháiⁿ.
en_text: A-sing said softly, fearing that his father might snap back at him. His father was very fierce.

hok_text_tailo: “Gín-á-lâng the̍h hiah tsē tsînn beh tshòng siánn-mi̍h?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “gin2-a2-lang5 theh8 hiah4 tse7 tsinn5 beh4 tshong3 siann2-mih8?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「囡仔人提遐濟錢欲創啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Gín-á-lâng the̍h hiah chē chîⁿ beh chhòng siáⁿ-mi̍h?”
en_text: What would a kid need so much money for?

hok_text_tailo: in a-pâ tuā-siann mn̄g.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: in1 a1-pa5 tua7-siann1 mng7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 𪜶阿爸大聲問。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: in a-pâ tōa-siaⁿ mn̄g.
en_text: His father asked loudly.

hok_text_tailo: Tú-thâu-á, khiā tī pinn--á leh la̍k-la̍k-tshuah ê A-sing
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tu2-thau5-a2,khia7 ti7 pinn1--a2 leh4 lak8-lak8-tshuah4 e5 a1-sing1
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 拄頭仔，徛佇邊--仔咧慄慄掣的阿生
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tú-thâu-á,khiā tī piⁿ--á leh la̍k-la̍k-chhoah ê A-seng
en_text: For a moment, A-Sing was trembling as he stood there.

hok_text_tailo: khuànn in a-pâ lóng bô kóng-uē, tsin kiann i m̄ tah-ìng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: khuann3 in1 a1-pa5 long2 bo5 kong2-ue7,tsin1 kiann1 i1 m7 tah4-ing3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 看𪜶阿爸攏無講話，真驚伊毋答應。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: khòaⁿ in a-pâ lóng bô kóng-ōe,chin kiaⁿ i m̄ tah-èng.
en_text: Seeing that his father did not make a sound, he was afraid that his father might reject him.

hok_text_tailo: Hó-ka-tsài! Kuè tsi̍t-tak-kú-á, in a-pâ the̍h-tio̍h he sann-pah khoo tiām-tiām-á kiânn ji̍p-khì pâng-king.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ho2-ka1-tsai3!kue3 tsit8-tak4-ku2-a2, in1 a1-pa5 theh8-tioh8 he1 sann1-pah4 khoo1 tiam7-tiam7-a2 kiann5 jip8-khi3 pang5-king1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 好佳哉！過一觸久仔，𪜶阿爸提著彼三百箍恬恬仔行入去房間。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hó-ka-chài!Kòe chi̍t-tak-kú-á, in a-pâ the̍h-tio̍h he saⁿ-pah kho͘ tiām-tiām-á kiâⁿ ji̍p-khì pâng-keng.
en_text: Luckily, after a while, his father took the three hundred TWD and left for his room quietly.

hok_text_tailo: “Ua̋! Guá ē-tàng khì tha̍k-tsheh--ah!”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “ua9!gua2 e7-tang3 khi3 thak8-tsheh4--ah4!”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「Ua̋!我會當去讀冊--矣！」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Ŏa!Góa ē-tàng khì tha̍k-chheh--ah!”
en_text: Wow! I can continue to study!

hok_text_tailo: tàu thàn tsi̍t-kuá tsînn lâi kā tshù-lāi sio-thinn, A-sing tō sī kî-tiong tsi̍t ê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tau3 than3 tsit8-kua2 tsinn5 lai5 ka7 tshu3-lai7 sio1-thinn1, a1-sing1 to7 si7 ki5-tiong1 tsit8 e5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 鬥趁一寡錢來共厝內相添，阿生就是其中一个。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tàu thàn chi̍t-kóa chîⁿ lâi kā chhù-lāi sio-thiⁿ, A-seng tō sī kî-tiong chi̍t ê.
en_text: A-sing was one of the breadwinners who helped out the household.

hok_text_tailo: siā-huē ê kî-kuài-tāi
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: sia7-hue7 e5 ki5-kuai3-tai7
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 社會的奇怪代
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: siā-hōe ê kî-koài-tāi
en_text: Strange things in the society

hok_text_tailo: tē-sann kiānn sī sì-tsa̍p-guā nî tsîng ê tāi-tsì, kî-kuài bô kî-kuài, tshiánn ta̍k-ke phuànn-tuàn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: te7-sann1 kiann7 si7 si3-tsap8-gua7 ni5 tsing5 e5 tai7-tsi3, ki5-kuai3 bo5 ki5-kuai3,tshiann2 tak8-ke1 phuann3-tuan3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 第三件是四十外年前的代誌，奇怪無奇怪，請逐家判斷。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tē-saⁿ kiāⁿ sī sì-cha̍p-gōa nî chêng ê tāi-chì, kî-koài bô kî-koài,chhiáⁿ ta̍k-ke phòaⁿ-toàn.
en_text: The third thing happened forty years ago. Was it strange? You can be the judge of that.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng sin kai-tuānn: tsò-sing-lí
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 sin1 kai1-tuann7:tso3-sing1-li2
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 臺語文運動新階段：做生理
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng sin kai-tōaⁿ:chò-seng-lí
en_text: A new stage for the Taiwanese Language Movement: Doing business

hok_text_tailo: koh lâi, lán ài kuánn-kín hānn-ji̍p “sin koh to̍k-li̍p” ê kai-tuānn: khai-sí tsún-pī “tsò-sing-lí”!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: koh4 lai5,lan2 ai3 kuann2-kin2 hann7-jip8“sin1 koh4 tok8-lip8”e5 kai1-tuann7: khai1-si2 tsun2-pi7“tso3-sing1-li2”!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣來，咱愛趕緊迒入「新閣獨立」的階段：開始準備「做生理」！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: koh lâi,lán ài kóaⁿ-kín hāⁿ-ji̍p“sin koh to̍k-li̍p”ê kai-tōaⁿ: khai-sí chún-pī“chò-seng-lí”!
en_text: Next, we must quickly step nto the phase of being 'new and independent': start preparing to 'do business'!

hok_text_tailo: tsò-sing-lí tō sī beh thàn-tsînn, tsò-sing-lí tō sī ài ū kīng-tsing, tsò-sing-lí tō sī ài káng-kiù phín-tsit;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tso3-sing1-li2 to7 si7 beh4 than3-tsinn5, tso3-sing1-li2 to7 si7 ai3 u7 king7-tsing1, tso3-sing1-li2 to7 si7 ai3 kang2-kiu3 phin2-tsit4;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 做生理就是欲趁錢，做生理就是愛有競爭，做生理就是愛講究品質；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chò-seng-lí tō sī beh thàn-chîⁿ, chò-seng-lí tō sī ài ū kēng-cheng, chò-seng-lí tō sī ài káng-kiù phín-chit;
en_text: To do business is to make money, to do business is to have competition, to do business is to pay attention to quality.

hok_text_tailo: tse tō sī guá beh kóng ê hong-hiòng kah tiōng-tiám.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tse1 to7 si7 gua2 beh4 kong2 e5 hong1-hiong3 kah4 tiong7-tiam2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這就是我欲講的方向佮重點。

en_text: This is the direction and focus of what I want to talk about.

hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lan2 e5 phin2-tsit4 na7 bo5-kau3 ho2, koh4-khah4 an2-tsuann2 ma7 bo5 lang5 e7 lai5 kau1-kuan1, tse1 si7 ki1-pun2 to7-li2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 咱的品質若無夠好，閣較按怎嘛無人會來交關，這是基本道理。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lán ê phín-chit nā bô-kàu hó, koh-khah án-chóaⁿ mā bô lâng ē lâi kau-koan, che sī ki-pún tō-lí.
en_text: If our quality is not on par, no one will work with us no matter what we do. This is the basic principle.

hok_text_tailo: Sóo-pái lán ê Tâi-gí-bûn tsok-phín tio̍h-ài kè-sio̍k ka-kiông, sing-kip.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: soo2-pai2 lan2 e5 tai5-gi2-bun5 tsok4-phin2 tioh8-ai3 ke3-siok8 ka1-kiong5,sing1-kip4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 所擺咱的臺語文作品著愛繼續加強、升級。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Só͘-pái lán ê Tâi-gí-bûn chok-phín tio̍h-ài kè-sio̍k ka-kiông,seng-kip.
en_text: That is why we must keep on improving and upgrading Taiwanese literature.

hok_text_tailo: tsok-tsiá: Tiunn Ho̍k-tsū
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsok4-tsia2:tiunn1 hok8-tsu7
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 作者：張復聚
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chok-chiá:Tiuⁿ Ho̍k-chū
en_text: Author: Tiunn Ho̍k-tsū .

hok_text_tailo: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khuè tō sī “tsok-phín to-guân-huà”: tshòng-tsok khah tsē bô kâng bûn-luī ê tsok-phín, tshin-tshiūnn bûn-ha̍k, gū-giân, thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k (i-ha̍k, bu̍t-lí, huà-ha̍k, thài-khong, tē-kiû kho-ha̍k......), gē-su̍t, im-ga̍k, bûn-huà, tsìng-tī, king-tsè, sing-bu̍t, khuân-pó, tshiò-khue, si̍t-iōng-bûn (kiat-hun thiap-á, tsè-bûn, tshui-tsiàn-bûn, kiû-tsit-bûn, kong-bûn), sīm-tsì tē-lí, li̍k-sú, tsong-kàu, tiat-ha̍k ê bûn-tsiunn ── ti̍k-pia̍t sī ài tuā-tuā-la̍t tshut-pán gín-á-tsheh, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bó-gí kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hōo kok-sió, kok-tiong ha̍k-sing thang tha̍k, hōo in ē-tàng kā tī ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê, tsin iú-hān ê bó-gí-bûn uî-tshî mài tn̄g-kin!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siong7 ki1-pun2 e5 khang1-khue3 to7 si7“tsok4-phin2 to1-guan5-hua3”: tshong3-tsok4 khah4 tse7 bo5 kang5 bun5-lui7 e5 tsok4-phin2, tshin1-tshiunn7 bun5-hak8,gu7-gian5,thong1-siok8 kho1-hak8(i1-hak8,but8-li2,hua3-hak8,thai3-khong1,te7-kiu5 kho1-hak8......), ge7-sut8,im1-gak8,bun5-hua3,tsing3-ti7,king1-tse3,sing1-but8, khuan5-po2,tshio3-khue1,sit8-iong7-bun5(kiat4-hun1 thiap4-a2,tse3-bun5,tshui1-tsian3-bun5,kiu5-tsit4-bun5,kong1-bun5), sim7-tsi3 te7-li2,lik8-su2,tsong1-kau3,tiat4-hak8 e5 bun5-tsiunn1── tik8-piat8 si7 ai3 tua7-tua7-lat8 tshut4-pan2 gin2-a2-tsheh4, than3 hak8-hau7 u7 bo2-gi2 kau3-iok8, the5-kiong1 hoo7 kok4-sio2,kok4-tiong1 hak8-sing1 thang1 thak8, hoo7 in1 e7-tang3 ka7 ti7 hak8-hau7 oh8--tioh8--e5,tsin1 iu2-han7 e5 bo2-gi2-bun5 ui5-tshi5 mai3 tng7-kin1!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 上基本的工課就是「作品多元化」：創作較濟無仝文類的作品，親像文學、寓言、通俗科學（醫學、物理、化學、太空、地球科學……）、藝術、音樂、文化、政治、經濟、生物、環保、笑詼、實用文（結婚帖仔、祭文、推薦文、求職文、公文），甚至地理、歷史、宗教、哲學的文章──特別是愛大大力出版囡仔冊，趁學校有母語教育，提供予國小、國中學生通讀，予𪜶會當共佇學校學--著--的、真有限的母語文維持莫斷根！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khòe tō sī“chok-phín to-goân-hòa”: chhòng-chok khah chē bô kâng bûn-lūi ê chok-phín, chhin-chhiūⁿ bûn-ha̍k,gū-giân,thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k(i-ha̍k,bu̍t-lí,hòa-ha̍k,thài-khong,tē-kiû kho-ha̍k......), gē-su̍t,im-ga̍k,bûn-hòa,chèng-tī,keng-chè,seng-bu̍t, khoân-pó,chhiò-khoe,si̍t-iōng-bûn(kiat-hun thiap-á,chè-bûn,chhui-chiàn-bûn,kiû-chit-bûn,kong-bûn), sīm-chì tē-lí,le̍k-sú,chong-kàu,tiat-ha̍k ê bûn-chiuⁿ── te̍k-pia̍t sī ài tōa-tōa-la̍t chhut-pán gín-á-chheh, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bó-gí kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hō͘ kok-sió,kok-tiong ha̍k-seng thang tha̍k, hō͘ in ē-tàng kā tī ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê,chin iú-hān ê bó-gí-bûn ûi-chhî mài tn̄g-kin!
en_text: The most basic step would be 'the diversification of work', which is to create more works in different genres. For example, literature, folktales, common science (like medicine, physics, chemistry, space, geoscience...), art, music, culture, politics, economics, biology, greenness, comedy, practical writing (like a wedding invitation, funeral oration, foreword, cover letter, official memo), and even articles about geography, history, religion, and philosophy. More importantly, we should publish more children's books. As we still provide our mother tongue education in school, we must offer these books to students in both primary and middle schools. The mother tongue materials that they learn in school are already very limited. We must ensure that our mother tongue lives on.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng kàu tsit-má í-king ū tshiau-kuè sì-tsa̍p tang--ah!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 kau3 tsit4-ma2 i2-king1 u7 tshiau1-kue3 si3-tsap8 tang1--ah4!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 臺語文運動到這馬已經有超過四十冬--矣！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng kàu chit-má í-keng ū chhiau-kòe sì-cha̍p tang--ah!
en_text: The Taiwanese Language Movement has been around for more than forty years!

hok_text_tailo: Ū hó ê tsok-phín tsiah ē-tàng tsìng-bîng tsit ê gí-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thuân bān nî, kiánn-sun mā tsiah khíng, tsiah ē beh pó-tsûn, tshái-iōng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: u7 ho2 e5 tsok4-phin2 tsiah4 e7-tang3 tsing3-bing5 tsit4 e5 gi2-gian5 u7 ke3-tat8 liu5-thuan5 ban7 ni5, kiann2-sun1 ma7 tsiah4 khing2,tsiah4 e7 beh4 po2-tsun5,tshai2-iong7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有好的作品才會當證明這个語言有價值流傳萬年，囝孫嘛才肯、才會欲保存、採用。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ū hó ê chok-phín chiah ē-tàng chèng-bêng chit ê gí-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thoân bān nî, kiáⁿ-sun mā chiah khéng,chiah ē beh pó-chûn,chhái-iōng.
en_text: Only good works can prove that this language is valuable and can be passed down for thousands of years, and future generations will be willing and want to preserve and adopt it.

hok_text_tailo: Koh lâi sī kīng-tsing: tsok-phín ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k, sin-suí ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k, su-ji̍p-huat mā ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: koh4 lai5 si7 king7-tsing1: tsok4-phin2 ai3 u7 king7-tsing1-lik8, sin1-sui2 ai3 u7 king7-tsing1-lik8, su1-jip8-huat4 ma7 ai3 u7 king7-tsing1-lik8!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣來是競爭：作品愛有競爭力、薪水愛有競爭力、輸入法嘛愛有競爭力！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Koh lâi sī kēng-cheng: chok-phín ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k, sin-súi ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k, su-ji̍p-hoat mā ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k!
en_text: Another thing is competition. Our work must be competitive! Our pay must be competitive! Our input method engine must also be competitive!

hok_text_tailo: tn̂g-kî thui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē tsú-tiunn tsit-uân sin-suí ài pí guā-kháu khah kuân, hōo tsò Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū tsū-sìn kah kong-îng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tng5-ki5 thui1-sak4 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 e5 li2 kang1-khioh4 tai5-gi2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 tsu2-tiunn1 tsit4-uan5 sin1-sui2 ai3 pi2 gua7-khau2 khah4 kuan5, hoo7 tso3 tai5-gi2-bun5 e5 tong5-kang1 u7 tsu7-sin3 kah4 kong1-ing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 長期推捒臺語文運動的李江却臺語文教基金會主張職員薪水愛比外口較懸，予做臺語文的同工有自信佮光榮。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tn̂g-kî thui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe chú-tiuⁿ chit-oân sin-súi ài pí gōa-kháu khah koân, hō͘ chò Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū chū-sìn kah kong-êng.
en_text: The Lí Kang Khiok Taiwanese Cultural and Educational Foundation, which has been promoting the Taiwanese Language Movement, advocates that the staff pay needs to be higher than that of the outside world so that our comrades in the Taiwanese language industry can be confident and proud.

hok_text_tailo: Koh ū, tsit-má siōng iàu-kín ê phah-jī kang-kū sī tshiú-ki-á.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣有，這馬上要緊的拍字工具是手機仔。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Koh ū,chit-má siōng iàu-kín ê phah-jī kang-kū sī chhiú-ki-á.
en_text: Also, the most urgent typing tool right now is the mobile phone.

hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshiu2-ki1-a2 e5 tai5-gi2 su1-jip8-huat4 ti7 IOS he7-thong2 kan1-na1 u7 lo5-han3-kha1 tai5-gi2 su1-jip8-huat4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 手機仔的臺語輸入法佇 IOS系統干焦有羅漢跤臺語輸入法。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiú-ki-á ê Tâi-gí su-ji̍p-hoat tī IOS hē-thóng kan-na ū lô-hàn-kha Tâi-gí su-ji̍p-hoat.
en_text: The only Taiwanese Hokkien input method engine for smart phones is the Lô-hàn-kha Taiwanese Hokkien input method engine on iOS.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 加減嘛有寡成就。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ke-kiám mā ū kóa sêng-chiū.
en_text: We have more or less accomplished something.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 羅漢跤雖罔好用，嘛有袂少問題一直攏無解決。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lô-hàn-kha sui-bóng hó iōng, mā ū bē chió būn-tê it-ti̍t lóng bô kái-koat.
en_text: Although Lô-hàn-kha comes in handy, there are still many problems that it couldn't solve.

hok_text_tailo: tsuè-kīn lán mā teh kóo-bú koh khai-huat līng-guā tsi̍t thò lâi kah lô-hàn-kha kīng-tsing, hōo-siong làu-khuì kiû tsìn-pōo.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 最近咱嘛咧鼓舞閣開發另外一套來佮羅漢跤競爭，互相落氣求進步。

en_text: Lately, we are also encouraging the development of another approach to competing with Lô-hàn-kha. We can give each other constructive criticism and improve together.

hok_text_tailo: Mā ài pài-thok khah tsē siàu-liân-lâng tha̍k gí-giân-ha̍k phok-sū, jīn-tsin gián-kiù Tâi-gí-bûn, án-ne ha̍k-su̍t thîng-tōo ē thê-sing, tuì Tâi-gí-bûn huat-tián ē ū tuā pang-tsān.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ma7 ai3 pai3-thok4 khah4 tse7 siau3-lian5-lang5 thak8 gi2-gian5-hak8 phok4-su7, jin7-tsin1 gian2-kiu3 tai5-gi2-bun5, an2-ne1 hak8-sut8 thing5-too7 e7 the5-sing1, tui3 tai5-gi2-bun5 huat4-tian2 e7 u7 tua7 pang1-tsan7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 嘛愛拜託較濟少年人讀語言學博士，認真研究臺語文，按呢學術程度會提升，對臺語文發展會有大幫贊。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Mā ài pài-thok khah chē siàu-liân-lâng tha̍k gí-giân-ha̍k phok-sū, jīn-chin gián-kiù Tâi-gí-bûn, án-ne ha̍k-su̍t thêng-tō͘ ē thê-seng, tùi Tâi-gí-bûn hoat-tián ē ū tōa pang-chān.
en_text: We should also encourage more young people to pursue PhD in linguistics and put more effort into studying the Taiwanese language. By doing so, the academic level will improve and that supports the development of the Taiwanese language.

hok_text_tailo: ū phín-tsit koh ū kīng-tsing, tse tō sī tsò-sing-lí beh sîng-kong ê thâu-sing-sòo.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有品質閣有競爭，這就是做生理欲成功的頭先素。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ū phín-chit koh ū kēng-cheng, che tō sī chò-seng-lí beh sêng-kong ê thâu-seng-sò͘.
en_text: To have quality and to be competitive. These are the main criteria for success in business.

hok_text_tailo: Hi-bāng ū tsi̍t kang, tsò Tâi-gí-bûn tsin-tsiànn ū tsînn thàn, ū sîng-tsiū, koh hó miâ-siann.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 希望有一工，做臺語文真正有錢趁、有成就、閣好名聲。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hi-bāng ū chi̍t kang, chò Tâi-gí-bûn chin-chiàⁿ ū chîⁿ thàn,ū sêng-chiū,koh hó miâ-siaⁿ.
en_text: Let’s hope that one day the Taiwanese language industry will be lucrative, successful, and famous.

hok_text_tailo: Án-ne Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê tsiân-puè tsiah ē-tàng sió-khuá hioh-tshuán, kóng “Tâi-gí-bûn tshut-thâu-thinn!”

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 按呢臺語文運動的前輩才會當小可歇喘，講「臺語文出頭天！」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Án-ne Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê chiân-pòe chiah ē-tàng sió-khóa hioh-chhoán, kóng“Tâi-gí-bûn chhut-thâu-thiⁿ!”
en_text: So that the forefathers of the Taiwanese Language Movement can finally take a rest and say, “The Taiwanese language has finally made it to the top!”

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「臺語公共電視台」嘛陸續有咧討論，毋過針對運動本身欲按怎閣較進步的檢討，總--是嘛袂當無。

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 我有時嘛去參𪜶食茶練痟話，消遣拍抐涼。捌寡啦。

hok_text_tailo: tē-sann kiānn sī sì-tsa̍p-guā nî tsîng ê tāi-tsì, kî-kuài bô kî-kuài, tshiánn ta̍k-ke phuànn-tuàn.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 第三件是四十外年前的代誌，奇怪無奇怪，請逐家判斷。

en_text: The third thing happened forty years ago. Was it strange? You can be the judge of that.

hok_text_tailo: Tiunn Siông sī Tiong-kok Sam-kok Sî-tāi ê lâng, uī-tio̍h beh tâu-phun Tsô Tshò, i thau uē pún-kok tē-tôo, tsò-uî tâu-hâng Tsô Tshò ê hiàn-lé, tō sī bē kang-san, kiû îng-huâ--lah.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tiunn1 siong5 si7 tiong1-kok4 sam1-kok4 si5-tai7 e5 lang5, ui7-tioh8 beh4 tau5-phun1 tso5 tsho3, i1 thau1 ue7 pun2-kok4 te7-too5, tso3-ui5 tau5-hang5 tso5 tsho3 e5 hian3-le2, to7 si7 be7 kang1-san1,kiu5 ing5-hua5--lah4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 張松是中國三國時代的人，為著欲投奔曹操，伊偷畫本國地圖，做為投降曹操的獻禮，就是賣江山，求榮華--啦。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tiuⁿ Siông sī Tiong-kok Sam-kok Sî-tāi ê lâng, ūi-tio̍h beh tâu-phun Chô Chhò, i thau ōe pún-kok tē-tô͘, chò-ûi tâu-hâng Chô Chhò ê hiàn-lé, tō sī bē kang-san,kiû êng-hôa--lah.
en_text: Tiunn Siông was a figure from China during the Three Kingdoms period. To seek asylum from Tsô Tshò, he secretly drew a map of his country as a gift for Tsô Tshò when he surrenders. This means that he betrayed his country for money and fame.

hok_text_tailo: Uī-tio̍h sann-pah khoo
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ui7-tioh8 sann1-pah4 khoo1
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 為著三百箍
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ūi-tio̍h saⁿ-pah kho͘
en_text: For 300 dollar.

hok_text_tailo: Hit-sî-tsūn, khin-kang-gia̍p tsiah khai-sí puh-ínn, tsin tsē kang-tiûnn khiàm kang, tsia-ê thâu-ke tō kā khiàm kang ê būn-tê
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hit4-si5-tsun7,khin1-kang1-giap8 tsiah4 khai1-si2 puh4-inn2, tsin1 tse7 kang1-tiunn5 khiam3 kang1, tsia1-e5 thau5-ke1 to7 ka7 khiam3 kang1 e5 bun7-te5
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 彼時陣，輕工業才開始發穎，真濟工場欠工，遮的頭家就共欠工的問題
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hit-sî-chūn,khin-kang-gia̍p chiah khai-sí puh-íⁿ, chin chē kang-tiûⁿ khiàm kang, chia-ê thâu-ke tō kā khiàm kang ê būn-tê
en_text: At that time, light industry was just beginning to develop, and many factories were short of workers, and these bosses took the problem of lack of workers.

hok_text_tailo: tāng tuì kok-sió pit-gia̍p-sing ê thâu-khak-tíng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tang7 tui3 kok4-sio2 pit4-giap8-sing1 e5 thau5-khak4-ting2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 動對國小畢業生的頭殼頂。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tāng tùi kok-sió pit-gia̍p-seng ê thâu-khak-téng.
en_text: By targeting the elementary school graduates.

hok_text_tailo: Pit-gia̍p tián-lé ê tsi̍t kò gue̍h tsîng, ū tsi̍t kang, A-sing ê kàu-sik hiông-hiông lâi tsi̍t ê thâu-ke beh tshuē sió-kang.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: pit4-giap8 tian2-le2 e5 tsit8 ko3 gueh8 tsing5,u7 tsit8 kang1, a1-sing1 e5 kau3-sik4 hiong5-hiong5 lai5 tsit8 e5 thau5-ke1 beh4 tshue7 sio2-kang1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 畢業典禮的一個月前，有一工，阿生的教室雄雄來一个頭家欲揣小工。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Pit-gia̍p tián-lé ê chi̍t kò goe̍h chêng,ū chi̍t kang, A-seng ê kàu-sek hiông-hiông lâi chi̍t ê thâu-ke beh chhōe sió-kang.
en_text: One month before the graduation ceremony, a factory owner suddenly came to A-Sing's classroom one day, looking for part-timers.

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su mn̄g ha̍k-sing kóng: “Kám ū lâng tshut-gia̍p liáu, bô ài kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, beh khì kang-tiûnn thàn-tsînn--ê? Tshiánn giâ-tshiú.”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 mng7 hak8-sing1 kong2: “kam2 u7 lang5 tshut4-giap8 liau2,bo5 ai3 ke3-siok8 thak8 kok4-tiong1, beh4 khi3 kang1-tiunn5 than3-tsinn5--e5?tshiann2 gia5-tshiu2.”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師問學生講：「敢有人出業了，無愛繼續讀國中，欲去工場趁錢的？請夯手。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su mn̄g ha̍k-seng kóng: “Kám ū lâng chhut-gia̍p liáu,bô ài kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, beh khì kang-tiûⁿ thàn-chîⁿ--ê?Chhiáⁿ giâ-chhiú.”
en_text: The teacher asked the students, 'After graduation, is there anyone here who won't continue studying secondary school, but instead plan to work in the factories for money? Please raise up your hand.

hok_text_tailo: A-sing mā giâ-tshiú.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 ma7 gia5-tshiu2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生嘛夯手。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng mā giâ-chhiú.
en_text: So, A-Sing raised his hand.

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su tsi̍t-ê-á-tsi̍t-ê kā giâ-tshiú ê ha̍k-sing kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-koh, A-sing ê miâ pīng bô tī tíng-bīn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 tsit8-e5-a2-tsit8-e5 ka7 gia5-tshiu2 e5 hak8-sing1 ki3--loh8-lai5, m7-koh4,a1-sing1 e5 mia5 ping7 bo5 ti7 ting2-bin7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師一个仔一个共夯手的學生記落來，毋過，阿生的名並無佇頂面。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su chi̍t-ê-á-chi̍t-ê kā giâ-chhiú ê ha̍k-seng kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-koh,A-seng ê miâ pēng bô tī téng-bīn.
en_text: The teacher noted down the students who raised their hands one by one. However, A-sing's name was not there.

hok_text_tailo: Hā-khò liáu, lāu-su kā A-sing kiò lâi pinn--á kóng: “Lí ê sîng-tsik tsiah-nī hó, bô beh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, uī-sánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ha7-kho3 liau2,lau7-su1 ka7 a1-sing1 kio3 lai5 pinn1--a2 kong2: “li2 e5 sing5-tsik4 tsiah4-ni7 ho2, bo5 beh4 ke3-siok8 thak8 kok4-tiong1,ui7-sann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 下課了，老師共阿生叫來邊仔講：「你的成績遮爾好，無欲繼續讀國中，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hā-khò liáu,lāu-su kā A-seng kiò lâi piⁿ--á kóng: “Lí ê sêng-chek chiah-nī hó, bô beh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong,ūi-sáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: After class, the teacher called A-Sing and said to him,' You have good grades, why won't you study in junior high?'

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su suà--lo̍h-khì tuì ha̍k-sing kóng: “Nā án-ne, bîn-á-tsài khí, bô giâ-tshiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sik tha̍k-tsheh; ū giâ-tshiú--ê tō khì sàu piān-sóo, sàu kàu tshut-gia̍p.”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 sua3--loh8-khi3 tui3 hak8-sing1 kong2: “na7 an2-ne1,bin5-a2-tsai3 khi2, bo5 gia5-tshiu2--e5 lau5 ti7 kau3-sik4 thak8-tsheh4; u7 gia5-tshiu2--e5 to7 khi3 sau3 pian7-soo2,sau3 kau3 tshut4-giap8.”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師紲落去對學生講：「若按呢，明仔載起，無夯手的留佇教室讀冊；有夯手的就去掃便所，掃到出業。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su sòa--lo̍h-khì tùi ha̍k-seng kóng: “Nā án-ne,bîn-á-chài khí, bô giâ-chhiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sek tha̍k-chheh; ū giâ-chhiú--ê tō khì sàu piān-só͘,sàu kàu chhut-gia̍p.”
en_text: The teacher then told the students, 'If that's the case, from tomorrow onwards, those who didn't raise their hands get to stay in the classroom and study. Those who raised their hands, you can go clean the toilets. Clean it until you graduate.'

hok_text_tailo: A-sing án-tsuánn siūnn to siūnn-bô.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 an2-tsuann2 siunn7 to1 siunn7-bo5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生按怎想都想無。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng án-chóaⁿ siūⁿ to siūⁿ-bô.
en_text: No matter how much A-sing thought about it, he still could not understand.

hok_text_tailo: “ná ē tsiah bô kong-pênn! Beh tha̍k kok-tiong--ê, tō m̄-bián sàu piān-sóo; bô-huat-tōo koh tha̍k--ê, tō ài sàu piān-sóo, uī-sánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “na2 e7 tsiah4 bo5 kong1-penn5! beh4 thak8 kok4-tiong1--e5,to7 m7-bian2 sau3 pian7-soo2; bo5-huat4-too7 koh4 thak8--e5,to7 ai3 sau3 pian7-soo2,ui7-sann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「哪會遮無公平！欲讀國中--的，就毋免掃便所；無法度閣讀的，就愛掃便所，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “ná ē chiah bô kong-pêⁿ! Beh tha̍k kok-tiong--ê,tō m̄-bián sàu piān-só͘; bô-hoat-tō͘ koh tha̍k--ê,tō ài sàu piān-só͘,ūi-sáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: How can it be so unfair! Those who want to study in junior high school don't have to clean the toilet, and those who can't continue to study have to clean the toilet. Why?

hok_text_tailo: I sim-lāi it-ti̍t siūnn-bô.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: i1 sim1-lai7 it4-tit8 siunn7-bo5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 伊心內一直想無。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: I sim-lāi it-ti̍t siūⁿ-bô.
en_text: He kept thinking about it in his mind but couldn't understand it.

hok_text_tailo: Tshut-gia̍p tē-jī kang, A-sing tō koo-tsiânn tshù-pinn ê a-hiann tshuā i khì oo-tshiú-á kang-tshiáng tsò-kang.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshut4-giap8 te7-ji7 kang1, a1-sing1 to7 koo1-tsiann5 tshu3-pinn1 e5 a1-hiann1 tshua7 i1 khi3 oo1-tshiu2-a2 kang1-tshiang2 tso3-kang1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 出業第二工，阿生就姑情厝邊的阿兄𤆬伊去烏手仔工廠做工。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chhut-gia̍p tē-jī kang, A-seng tō ko͘-chiâⁿ chhù-piⁿ ê a-hiaⁿ chhōa i khì o͘-chhiú-á kang-chhiáng chò-kang.
en_text: The day after his graduation, A-sing begged his neighbour to get him a job in a blue-collar factory.

hok_text_tailo: A-sing tsok līn-tsin, kui-ê hioh-lua̍h tah-tah la̍k-tsa̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 tsok4 lin7-tsin1, kui1-e5 hioh4-luah8 tah4-tah4 lak8-tsap8 kang1 long2 bo5 hioh4-khun3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生足認真，規个歇熱貼貼六十工攏無歇睏。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng chok līn-chin, kui-ê hioh-loa̍h tah-tah la̍k-cha̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
en_text: A-sing was very serious. He never once rested for all sixty days of the summer break.

hok_text_tailo: “A-pah! Guá tsit ê hioh-lua̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah khoo. Sann-pah khoo tàu sio-thinn tshù--lí, sann-pah khoo hōo--guá, hó--bô?”

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “A-pah!Góa chit ê hioh-loa̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah kho͘. Saⁿ-pah kho͘ tàu sio-thiⁿ chhù--lí,saⁿ-pah kho͘ hō͘--góa,hó--bô?”
en_text: Dad! I earned 600 dollars in total during summer vacation. $300 for family expenses, the rest $300 for me, is that okay?

hok_text_tailo: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khuè tō sī “tsok-phín to-guân-huà”: tshòng-tsok khah tsē bô kāng bûn-luī ê tsok-phín, tshin-tshiūnn bûn-ha̍k, gū-giân, thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k (i-ha̍k, bu̍t-lí, huà-ha̍k, thài-khong, tē-kiû kho-ha̍k......), gē-su̍t, im-ga̍k, bûn-huà, tsìng-tī, king-tsè, sing-bu̍t, khuân-pó, tshiò-khue, si̍t-iōng-bûn (kiat-hun thiap-á, tsè-bûn, tshui-tsiàn-bûn, kiû-tsit-bûn, kong-bûn), sīm-tsì tē-lí, li̍k-sú, tsong-kàu, thiat-ha̍k ê bûn-tsiong── ti̍k-pia̍t sī ài tuā-tuā-la̍t tshut-pán gín-á-tsheh, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bú-gí kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hōo kok-sió, kok-tiong ha̍k-sing thang tha̍k, hōo in ē-tàng kā tī ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê, tsin iú-hān ê bó-gí-bûn îuî-tshî mài tn̄g-kin!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siong7 ki1-pun2 e5 khang1-khue3 to7 si7“tsok4-phin2 to1-guan5-hua3”: tshong3-tsok4 khah4 tse7 bo5 kang7 bun5-lui7 e5 tsok4-phin2, tshin1-tshiunn7 bun5-hak8,gu7-gian5,thong1-siok8 kho1-hak8(i1-hak8,but8-li2,hua3-hak8,thai3-khong1,te7-kiu5 kho1-hak8......), ge7-sut8,im1-gak8,bun5-hua3,tsing3-ti7,king1-tse3,sing1-but8, khuan5-po2,tshio3-khue1,sit8-iong7-bun5(kiat4-hun1 thiap4-a2,tse3-bun5,tshui1-tsian3-bun5,kiu5-tsit4-bun5,kong1-bun5), sim7-tsi3 te7-li2,lik8-su2,tsong1-kau3,thiat4-hak8 e5 bun5-tsiong1── tik8-piat8 si7 ai3 tua7-tua7-lat8 tshut4-pan2 gin2-a2-tsheh4, than3 hak8-hau7 u7 bu2-gi2 kau3-iok8, the5-kiong1 hoo7 kok4-sio2,kok4-tiong1 hak8-sing1 thang1 thak8, hoo7 in1 e7-tang3 ka7 ti7 hak8-hau7 oh8--tioh8--e5,tsin1 iu2-han7 e5 bo2-gi2-bun5 îuî-tshi5 mai3 tng7-kin1!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 上基本的工課就是「作品多元化」：創作較濟無仝文類的作品，親像文學、寓言、通俗科學（醫學、物理、化學、太空、地球科學……）、藝術、音樂、文化、政治、經濟、生物、環保、笑詼、實用文（結婚帖仔、祭文、推薦文、求職文、公文），甚至地理、歷史、宗教、哲學的文章──特別是愛大大力出版囡仔冊，趁學校有母語教育，提供予國小、國中學生通讀，予𪜶會當共佇學校學著的、真有限的母語文維持莫斷根！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khòe tō sī“chok-phín to-goân-hòa”: chhòng-chok khah chē bô kāng bûn-lūi ê chok-phín, chhin-chhiūⁿ bûn-ha̍k,gū-giân,thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k(i-ha̍k,bu̍t-lí,hòa-ha̍k,thài-khong,tē-kiû kho-ha̍k......), gē-su̍t,im-ga̍k,bûn-hòa,chèng-tī,keng-chè,seng-bu̍t, khoân-pó,chhiò-khoe,si̍t-iōng-bûn(kiat-hun thiap-á,chè-bûn,chhui-chiàn-bûn,kiû-chit-bûn,kong-bûn), sīm-chì tē-lí,le̍k-sú,chong-kàu,thiat-ha̍k ê bûn-chiong── te̍k-pia̍t sī ài tōa-tōa-la̍t chhut-pán gín-á-chheh, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bú-gí kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hō͘ kok-sió,kok-tiong ha̍k-seng thang tha̍k, hō͘ in ē-tàng kā tī ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê,chin iú-hān ê bó-gí-bûn îuî-chhî mài tn̄g-kin!
en_text: The most basic lesson is 'diversity of works': create more different types of works, such as literature, fables, popular science (medicine, physics, chemistry, space, earth science ......), art, music, culture, politics, economy, biology, environmental protection, jokes, practical texts (marriage invitation, ritual, recommendation, job application The articles of geography, history, religion, and philosophy are also available. The most important thing is to do our best to publish children's books and to provide comprehensive reading to elementary and junior high school students while the schools are promoting mother tongue education. This will allow them to carry on the limited mother-tongue text they have learned in school without interruption.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng kàu tsit-má í-king ū tshiau-kuè sì-tsa̍p tang--ah!

en_text: It has been 40 years since the Taiwanese Hokkien Movement started.

hok_text_tailo: Ū hó ê tsok-phín tsiah ē-tàng tsìng-bîng tsit ê gí-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thuân bān nî, kiánn-sun mā tsiah khíng, tsiah ē beh pó-tsûn, tshái-iōng.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有好的作品才會當證明這个語言有價值流傳萬年，囝孫嘛才肯、才會欲保存、採用。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ū hó ê chok-phín chiah ē-tàng chèng-bêng chit ê gí-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thoân bān nî, kiáⁿ-sun mā chiah khéng,chiah ē beh pó-chûn,chhái-iōng.
en_text: Only when there are good works, can we prove that the language is precious and deserves to be passed down for centuries to come. And only then will the future generations be willing to preserve and adopt it.

hok_text_tailo: Koh lâi sī kīng-tsing: tsok-phín ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k, sin-suí ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k, su-li̍p-huat mā ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k!

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣來是競爭：作品愛有競爭力、薪水愛有競爭力、輸入法嘛愛有競爭力！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Koh lâi sī kēng-cheng: chok-phín ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k, sin-súi ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k, su-li̍p-hoat mā ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k!
en_text: Another thing is competition. Our work must be competitive! Our pay must be competitive! Our input method engine must also be competitive!

hok_text_tailo: tn̂g-kî thui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē tsú-tiunn tsit-guân sin-suí ài pí guā-kháu khah kuân, hōo tsò Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū tsū-sìn kah kong-îng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tng5-ki5 thui1-sak4 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 e5 li2 kang1-khioh4 tai5-gi2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 tsu2-tiunn1 tsit4-guan5 sin1-sui2 ai3 pi2 gua7-khau2 khah4 kuan5, hoo7 tso3 tai5-gi2-bun5 e5 tong5-kang1 u7 tsu7-sin3 kah4 kong1-ing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 長期推捒台語文運動的李江却台語文教基金會主張職員薪水愛比外口較懸，予做台語文的同工有自信佮光榮。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tn̂g-kî thui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe chú-tiuⁿ chit-goân sin-súi ài pí gōa-kháu khah koân, hō͘ chò Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū chū-sìn kah kong-êng.
en_text: Lí Kang-khiok Foundation, a long-time promoter of the Taiwanese language movement, advocates that the salaries of the Foundation's staff must be higher than the average salary. The employees of the Foundation are proud of the company and feel confident.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣有，這馬上要緊的拍字工具是手機仔。

en_text: Also, the most urgent typing tool right now is the mobile phone.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 手機仔的台語輸入法佇IOS系統干焦有羅漢跤台語輸入法。

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 嘛愛拜託較濟少年人讀語言學博士，認真研究台語文，按呢學術程度會提升，對台語文發展會有大幫贊。

en_text: We should also encourage more young people to pursue PhD in linguistics and put more effort into studying the Taiwanese language. By doing so, the academic level will improve and that supports the development of the Taiwanese language.

en_text: The pioneers who participated in the activities of the Taiwanese Hokkien language can take a break and say that the 'Taiwanese Hokkien language has made a name for itself'.

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hit-chām-á piān ū-êng, i ē chio góa khì Eng-ko khòaⁿ hûi-á, kóng iā kî-koài,siang-lâng tâng-chê ta̍h-ji̍p tiàm-mn̂g, chiah bô saⁿ,nn̄g hun-cheng, bô-lūn cha-po͘,cha-bó͘ ê tiàm-thâu-ke, chin kín tō ē kah i ū kóng ū chhiò.

en_text: Reading this work would calm your heart. This is the product of the divergent thinking from the rice culture of Taiwan.

hok_text_tailo: koh-lâi tsit hāng ū tsok-tsiá pún-lâng tìm-táu ê sìng-keh.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 按怎配色、寸尺欲裁偌大，是早佇厝--裡就決定好--的，請頭家娘照做就是；

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Thâu-tú-chiah teh khǹg ê sî, ū te̍k-pia̍t chù-ì phòe-ha̍p ê só͘-chāi,kng-sòaⁿ, koh ū khòng-chè-tio̍h khǹg kúi tè, pún-chiâⁿ lia̍h-chò siōng pháiⁿ phòe ê tōa-âng siù kim-chhang, lo̍h-bóe kā khòaⁿ--khaih, soah kám-kak khah súi kòe

en_text: We have to first compare with cloths bought on the spot, only then we can decide.

hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hit4 king1 tiam3,poo3 e5 sik4-ti7 iu2-han7, ka1-tsai3 u7 kui2 te3 ni5-a2 tseh4-a2 hah8-ing7 e5 ang5 si1-a2-poo3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 彼間店，布的色緻有限，佳哉有幾塊年仔節仔合用的紅絲仔布。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hit keng tiàm,pò͘ ê sek-tī iú-hān, ka-chài ū kúi tè nî-á cheh-á ha̍h-ēng ê âng si-á-pò͘.
en_text: The clothes in that store are not in all kinds of colors. But fortunately, there were some red silk clothes suitable for the Chinese New Year.

hok_text_tailo: Tuā-âng--ê... sông, sī í-tsá guá m̄ bat teh khó-lū ê ki-ka sik-tsuí!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tua7-ang5--e5...song5, si7 i2-tsa2 gua2 m7 bat4 teh4 kho2-lu7 e5 ki1-ka1 sik4-tsui2!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 大紅--的……倯，是以早我毋捌咧考慮的居家色水！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tōa-âng--ê...sông, sī í-chá góa m̄ bat teh khó-lū ê ki-ka sek-chúi!
en_text: It is bright red. It is an old-fashioned color that I would never think to use for my home in the past.

hok_text_tailo: lóng-tsóng tsò tsa̍p-jī tè, kin-á-ji̍t the̍h--tńg-lâi, hìng-tshuh-tshuh, kuánn-kín beh pòo-tì tsng-thānn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: long2-tsong2 tso3 tsap8-ji7 te3, kin1-a2-jit8 theh8--tng2-lai5, hing3-tshuh4-tshuh4, kuann2-kin2 beh4 poo3-ti3 tsng1-thann7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 攏總做十二塊，今仔日提--轉-來，興tshuh-tshuh，趕緊欲佈置妝娗。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lóng-chóng chò cha̍p-jī tè, kin-á-ji̍t the̍h--tńg-lâi, hèng-chhuh-chhuh, kóaⁿ-kín beh pò͘-tì chng-thāⁿ.
en_text: We made twelve pieces in total, took them back today, and hurry up to decorate.

hok_text_tailo: Thâu-tú-tsiah teh khǹg ê sî, ū ti̍k-pia̍t tsù-ì phuè-ha̍p ê sóo-tsāi, kng-suànn, koh ū khòng-tsè-tio̍h khǹg kuí tè, pún-tsiânn lia̍h-tsò siōng pháinn phuè ê tuā-âng siù kim-tshang, lo̍h-bué kā khuànn--khaih, suah kám-kak khah suí kuè
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: thau5-tu2-tsiah4 teh4 khng3 e5 si5, u7 tik8-piat8 tsu3-i3 phue3-hap8 e5 soo2-tsai7,kng1-suann3, koh4 u7 khong3-tse3-tioh8 khng3 kui2 te3, pun2-tsiann5 liah8-tso3 siong7 phainn2 phue3 e5 tua7-ang5 siu3 kim1-tshang1, loh8-bue2 ka7 khuann3--khaih4, suah4 kam2-kak4 khah4 sui2 kue3
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 頭拄才咧囥的時，有特別注意配合的所在、光線，閣有控制著囥幾塊，本成掠做上歹配的大紅繡金蔥，落尾共看--khaih，煞感覺較媠過
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Thâu-tú-chiah teh khǹg ê sî, ū te̍k-pia̍t chù-ì phòe-ha̍p ê só͘-chāi,kng-sòaⁿ, koh ū khòng-chè-tio̍h khǹg kúi tè, pún-chiâⁿ lia̍h-chò siōng pháiⁿ phòe ê tōa-âng siù kim-chhang, lo̍h-bóe kā khòaⁿ--khaih, soah kám-kak khah súi kòe
en_text: When I was placing it just now, I paid special attention to the place to be matched, the light, and the quantity to be placed. I thought the bright red embroidered glitter was the most difficult color to match, but at the last look, it felt even more beautiful...

hok_text_tailo: Tuā-âng nā khǹg tio̍h sóo-tsāi, ē ū tiám tsing khai gán ê hāu-kó, m̄-koh nā-sī siunn kuè-thâu  tsē--lâi, iu-guân sī... sông.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tua7-ang5 na7 khng3 tioh8 soo2-tsai7, e7 u7 tiam2 tsing1 khai1 gan2 e5 hau7-ko2, m7-koh4 na7-si7 siunn1 kue3-thau5 tse7--lai5, iu1-guan5 si7...song5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 大紅若囥著所在，會有點睛開眼的效果，毋過若是傷過頭濟--來，猶原是……倯。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tōa-âng nā khǹg tio̍h só͘-chāi, ē ū tiám cheng khai gán ê hāu-kó, m̄-koh nā-sī siuⁿ kòe-thâu chē--lâi, iu-goân sī...sông.
en_text: If the bright red colour is used in the right place, it would add an attractive effect. However, if it is used too much, then it would still look...Old-fashioned.

hok_text_tailo: Hit kù “tsē--lâi tō sī suí” sī siánn-lâng kóng--ê, kui sè-kí--ah, kà pháinn gín-á tuā-sè.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hit4 ku3“tse7--lai5 to7 si7 sui2”si7 siann2-lang5 kong2--e5, kui1 se3-ki2--ah4,ka3 phainn2 gin2-a2 tua7-se3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 彼句「濟--來就是媠」是啥人講--的，規世紀--矣，教歹囡仔大細。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hit kù“chē--lâi tō sī súi”sī siáⁿ-lâng kóng--ê, kui sè-kí--ah,kà pháiⁿ gín-á tōa-sè.
en_text: Who was the one who said that 'It'd be great if more were to come'? The kids were taught the wrong thing the whole century.

hok_text_tailo: Ah, tsit-sî suah hiông-hiông siūnn-khí
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ah4,tsit4-si5 suah4 hiong5-hiong5 siunn7-khi2
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 啊，這時煞雄雄想起
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ah,chit-sî soah hiông-hiông siūⁿ-khí
en_text: Ah, this time even suddenly remembered.

hok_text_tailo: m̄ bat kā “suí” kóng tshut-tshuì ê hit ê lâng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: m7 bat4 ka7“sui2”kong2 tshut4-tshui3 e5 hit4 e5 lang5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 毋捌共「媠」講出喙的彼个人。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: m̄ bat kā“súi”kóng chhut-chhùi ê hit ê lâng.
en_text: He is the one who has never uttered the word 'beautiful'.

hok_text_tailo: tsù-bûn ê toh-tsū-á kah pue-tiām-á the̍h--tńg-lâi.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsu3-bun5 e5 toh4-tsu7-a2 kah4 pue1-tiam7-a2 theh8--tng2-lai5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 注文的桌苴仔佮杯墊仔提--轉來。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chù-bûn ê toh-chū-á kah poe-tiām-á the̍h--tńg-lâi.
en_text: Bring back the pre-ordered table mats and coasters.

hok_text_tailo: Hit-sî-tsūn, khin-kang-gia̍p tsiah khai-sí puh-ínn, tsin tsē kang-tiûnn khiàm kang, tsia-ê thâu-ke tō kā khiàm kang ê būn-tê
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: hit4-si5-tsun7,khin1-kang1-giap8 tsiah4 khai1-si2 puh4-inn2, tsin1 tse7 kang1-tiunn5 khiam3 kang1, tsia1-e5 thau5-ke1 to7 ka7 khiam3 kang1 e5 bun7-te5
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 彼時陣，輕工業才開始發穎，真濟工場欠工，遮的頭家就共欠工的問題
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hit-sî-chūn,khin-kang-gia̍p chiah khai-sí puh-íⁿ, chin chē kang-tiûⁿ khiàm kang, chia-ê thâu-ke tō kā khiàm kang ê būn-tê
en_text: At that time, the light industry was still in its early stages. Many factories faced a labour shortage. The business owners here decided to solve the labour shortage issue.

hok_text_tailo: tāng uì kok-sió pit-gia̍p-sing ê thâu-khak-tíng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tang7 ui3 kok4-sio2 pit4-giap8-sing1 e5 thau5-khak4-ting2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 動對國小畢業生的頭殼頂。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tāng ùi kok-sió pit-gia̍p-seng ê thâu-khak-téng.
en_text: By targeting the elementary school graduates.

hok_text_tailo: Pit-gia̍p tián-lé ê tsi̍t kò gue̍h tsîng, ū tsi̍t kang, A-sing ê kàu-sik hiông-hiông lâi tsi̍t ê thâu-ke beh tshuē sió-kang.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: pit4-giap8 tian2-le2 e5 tsit8 ko3 gueh8 tsing5,u7 tsit8 kang1, a1-sing1 e5 kau3-sik4 hiong5-hiong5 lai5 tsit8 e5 thau5-ke1 beh4 tshue7 sio2-kang1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 畢業典禮的一個月前，有一工，阿生的教室雄雄來一个頭家欲揣小工。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Pit-gia̍p tián-lé ê chi̍t kò goe̍h chêng,ū chi̍t kang, A-seng ê kàu-sek hiông-hiông lâi chi̍t ê thâu-ke beh chhōe sió-kang.
en_text: One month before the graduation ceremony, a factory owner suddenly came to A-Sing's classroom one day, looking for part-timers.

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su mn̄g ha̍k-sing kóng: “Kám ū lâng tshut-gia̍p liáu, bô ài kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, beh khì kang-tiûnn thàn-tsînn--ê? Tshiánn gia̍h-tshiú.”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 mng7 hak8-sing1 kong2: “kam2 u7 lang5 tshut4-giap8 liau2,bo5 ai3 ke3-siok8 thak8 kok4-tiong1, beh4 khi3 kang1-tiunn5 than3-tsinn5--e5?tshiann2 giah8-tshiu2.”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師問學生講：「敢有人出業了，無愛繼續讀國中，欲去工場趁錢--的？請攑手。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su mn̄g ha̍k-seng kóng: “Kám ū lâng chhut-gia̍p liáu,bô ài kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, beh khì kang-tiûⁿ thàn-chîⁿ--ê?Chhiáⁿ gia̍h-chhiú.”
en_text: The teacher asked the students, 'Is there anyone here who would not continue middle school and plans to work in the factory after graduation? Please raise your hand.'

hok_text_tailo: A-sing mā gia̍h-tshiú.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 ma7 giah8-tshiu2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生嘛攑手。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng mā gia̍h-chhiú.
en_text: A-sing also has a hand.

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su tsi̍t-ê-á-tsi̍t-ê kā gia̍h-tshiú ê ha̍k-sing kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-koh, A-sing ê miâ pīng bô tī tíng-bīn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 tsit8-e5-a2-tsit8-e5 ka7 giah8-tshiu2 e5 hak8-sing1 ki3--loh8-lai5, m7-koh4,a1-sing1 e5 mia5 ping7 bo5 ti7 ting2-bin7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師一个仔一个共攑手的學生記--落來，毋過，阿生的名並無佇頂面。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su chi̍t-ê-á-chi̍t-ê kā gia̍h-chhiú ê ha̍k-seng kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-koh,A-seng ê miâ pēng bô tī téng-bīn.
en_text: The teacher recorded the students who were raising their hands one by one, but A-Sing's name was not on the list.

hok_text_tailo: Hā-khò liáu, lāu-su kā A-sing kiò lâi pinn--á kóng: “Lí ê sîng-tsik tsiah-nī hó, bô beh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, uī-siánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ha7-kho3 liau2,lau7-su1 ka7 a1-sing1 kio3 lai5 pinn1--a2 kong2: “li2 e5 sing5-tsik4 tsiah4-ni7 ho2, bo5 beh4 ke3-siok8 thak8 kok4-tiong1,ui7-siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 下課了，老師共阿生叫來邊--仔講：「你的成績遮爾好，無欲繼續讀國中，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hā-khò liáu,lāu-su kā A-seng kiò lâi piⁿ--á kóng: “Lí ê sêng-chek chiah-nī hó, bô beh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong,ūi-siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: After class, the teacher called A-Sing to the side and asked, 'You have very good grades, why don’t you want to go to middle school anymore?'

hok_text_tailo: Lāu-su suà--lo̍h-khì tuì ha̍k-sing kóng: “Nā án-ne, bîn-á-tsài khí, bô gia̍h-tshiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sik tha̍k-tsheh; ū gia̍h-tshiú--ê tō khì sàu piān-sóo, sàu kàu tshut-gia̍p.”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau7-su1 sua3--loh8-khi3 tui3 hak8-sing1 kong2: “na7 an2-ne1,bin5-a2-tsai3 khi2, bo5 giah8-tshiu2--e5 lau5 ti7 kau3-sik4 thak8-tsheh4; u7 giah8-tshiu2--e5 to7 khi3 sau3 pian7-soo2,sau3 kau3 tshut4-giap8.”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師紲--落-去對學生講：「若按呢，明仔載起，無攑手--的留佇教室讀冊；有攑手--的就去掃便所，掃到出業。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lāu-su sòa--lo̍h-khì tùi ha̍k-seng kóng: “Nā án-ne,bîn-á-chài khí, bô gia̍h-chhiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sek tha̍k-chheh; ū gia̍h-chhiú--ê tō khì sàu piān-só͘,sàu kàu chhut-gia̍p.”
en_text: The teacher then told the students, 'If that's the case, from tomorrow onwards, those who didn't raise their hands get to stay in the classroom and study. Those who raised their hands, you can go clean the toilets. Clean it until you graduate.'

hok_text_tailo: A-sing án-tsuánn siūnn to siūnn-bô.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 an2-tsuann2 siunn7 to1 siunn7-bo5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生按怎想都想無。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng án-chóaⁿ siūⁿ to siūⁿ-bô.
en_text: A Sing, can't figure out how to do it.

hok_text_tailo: “Ná ē tsiah bô kong-pênn! Beh tha̍k kok-tiong--ê, tō m̄-bián sàu piān-sóo; bô-huat-tōo koh tha̍k--ê, tō ài sàu piān-sóo, uī-siánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “na2 e7 tsiah4 bo5 kong1-penn5! beh4 thak8 kok4-tiong1--e5,to7 m7-bian2 sau3 pian7-soo2; bo5-huat4-too7 koh4 thak8--e5,to7 ai3 sau3 pian7-soo2,ui7-siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「哪會遮無公平！欲讀國中--的，就毋免掃便所；無法度閣讀--的，就愛掃便所，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Ná ē chiah bô kong-pêⁿ! Beh tha̍k kok-tiong--ê,tō m̄-bián sàu piān-só͘; bô-hoat-tō͘ koh tha̍k--ê,tō ài sàu piān-só͘,ūi-siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: This is so unfair! Those students going to high school do not need to clean the toilets while the rest are responsible for cleaning. Why?

hok_text_tailo: I sim-lāi it-ti̍t siūnn-bô.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: i1 sim1-lai7 it4-tit8 siunn7-bo5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 伊心內一直想無。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: I sim-lāi it-ti̍t siūⁿ-bô.
en_text: He kept thinking about it in his mind but couldn't understand it.

hok_text_tailo: Tshut-gia̍p tē-jī kang, A-sing tō koo-tsiânn tshù-pinn ê a-hiann tshuā i khì oo-tshiú-á kang-tshiúnn tsò-kang.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshut4-giap8 te7-ji7 kang1, a1-sing1 to7 koo1-tsiann5 tshu3-pinn1 e5 a1-hiann1 tshua7 i1 khi3 oo1-tshiu2-a2 kang1-tshiunn2 tso3-kang1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 出業第二工，阿生就姑情厝邊的阿兄𤆬伊去烏手仔工廠做工。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chhut-gia̍p tē-jī kang, A-seng tō ko͘-chiâⁿ chhù-piⁿ ê a-hiaⁿ chhōa i khì o͘-chhiú-á kang-chhiúⁿ chò-kang.
en_text: The second day he worked, A-Sing asked the brother next door to work in the mechanical factory.

hok_text_tailo: A-sing tsiok jīn-tsin, kui-ê hioh-jua̍h tah-tah la̍k-tsa̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 tsiok4 jin7-tsin1, kui1-e5 hioh4-juah8 tah4-tah4 lak8-tsap8 kang1 long2 bo5 hioh4-khun3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生足認真，規个歇熱貼貼六十工攏無歇睏。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng chiok jīn-chin, kui-ê hioh-joa̍h tah-tah la̍k-cha̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
en_text: A-sing was very serious. He never once rested for all sixty days of the summer break.

hok_text_tailo: “A-pa! Guá tsit ê hioh-jua̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah khoo. Sann-pah khoo tàu sio-thinn tshù--lí, sann-pah khoo hōo--guá, hó--bô?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “a1-pa1!gua2 tsit4 e5 hioh4-juah8 than3-tioh8 lak8-pah4 khoo1. sann1-pah4 khoo1 tau3 sio1-thinn1 tshu3--li2,sann1-pah4 khoo1 hoo7--gua2,ho2--bo5?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「阿爸！我這个歇熱趁著六百箍。三百箍鬥相添厝--裡，三百箍予我，好--無？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “A-pa!Góa chit ê hioh-joa̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah kho͘. Saⁿ-pah kho͘ tàu sio-thiⁿ chhù--lí,saⁿ-pah kho͘ hō͘--góa,hó--bô?”
en_text: Dad! I earned six hundred TWD over this summer break. Three hundred TWD for family expenses while the remaining three hundred TWD for myself. Is that okay?

hok_text_tailo: A-sing khin-siann-sè-sueh, tsin kiann in a-pa pìnn-bīn, in a-pa tsin pháinn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 khin1-siann1-se3-sueh4,tsin1 kiann1 in1 a1-pa1 pinn3-bin7, in1 a1-pa1 tsin1 phainn2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生輕聲細說，真驚𪜶阿爸變面，𪜶阿爸真歹。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng khin-siaⁿ-sè-soeh,chin kiaⁿ in a-pa pìⁿ-bīn, in a-pa chin pháiⁿ.
en_text: A-sing said softly, fearing that his father might snap back at him. His father was very fierce.

hok_text_tailo: “Gín-á-lâng the̍h hiah tsē tsînn beh tshòng siánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “gin2-a2-lang5 theh8 hiah4 tse7 tsinn5 beh4 tshong3 siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「囡仔人提遐濟錢欲創啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Gín-á-lâng the̍h hiah chē chîⁿ beh chhòng siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: What would a kid need so much money for?

hok_text_tailo: in a-pa tuā-siann mn̄g.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: in1 a1-pa1 tua7-siann1 mng7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 𪜶阿爸大聲問。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: in a-pa tōa-siaⁿ mn̄g.
en_text: His father asked loudly.

hok_text_tailo: Tú-thâu-á, khiā tī pinn--á teh la̍k-la̍k-tshuah ê A-sing

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 張松是中國三國時代的人，為著欲投奔曹操，伊偷畫本國地圖，做為投降曹操的獻禮，就是賣江山，求榮華--啦。

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 咱的品質若無夠好，閣較按怎嘛無人會來交關，這是基本道理。

en_text: Author: Tiunn Ho̍k-tsū

hok_text_tailo: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khuè tō  sī “tsok-phín to-guân-huà”: tshòng-tsok khah tsē bô kâng bûn-luī ê tsok-phín, tshin-tshiūnn bûn-ha̍k, gū-giân, thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k (i-ha̍k, bu̍t-lí, huà-ha̍k, thài-khong, tē-kiû kho-ha̍k...), gē-su̍t, im-ga̍k, bûn-huà, tsìng-tī, king-tsè, sing-bu̍t, khuân-pó, tshiò-khue, si̍t-iōng-bûn (kiat-hun thiap-á, tsè-bûn, thui-tsiàn-bûn, kiû-tsit-bûn, kong-bûn), sīm-tsì tē-lí, li̍k-sú, tsong-kàu, tiat-ha̍k ê bûn-tsiunn ── ti̍k-pia̍t sī ài tuā-tuā-la̍t tshut-pán gín-á-tsheh, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bó-gí kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hōo kok-sió, kok-tiong ha̍k-sing thang tha̍k, hōo in ē-tàng kā tī ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê, tsin iú-hān ê bó-gí-bûn uî-tshî mài tn̄g-kin!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siong7 ki1-pun2 e5 khang1-khue3 to7 si7“tsok4-phin2 to1-guan5-hua3”: tshong3-tsok4 khah4 tse7 bo5 kang5 bun5-lui7 e5 tsok4-phin2, tshin1-tshiunn7 bun5-hak8,gu7-gian5,thong1-siok8 kho1-hak8(i1-hak8,but8-li2,hua3-hak8,thai3-khong1,te7-kiu5 kho1-hak8...), ge7-sut8,im1-gak8,bun5-hua3,tsing3-ti7,king1-tse3,sing1-but8, khuan5-po2,tshio3-khue1,sit8-iong7-bun5(kiat4-hun1 thiap4-a2,tse3-bun5,thui1-tsian3-bun5,kiu5-tsit4-bun5,kong1-bun5), sim7-tsi3 te7-li2,lik8-su2,tsong1-kau3,tiat4-hak8 e5 bun5-tsiunn1── tik8-piat8 si7 ai3 tua7-tua7-lat8 tshut4-pan2 gin2-a2-tsheh4, than3 hak8-hau7 u7 bo2-gi2 kau3-iok8, the5-kiong1 hoo7 kok4-sio2,kok4-tiong1 hak8-sing1 thang1 thak8, hoo7 in1 e7-tang3 ka7 ti7 hak8-hau7 oh8--tioh8--e5,tsin1 iu2-han7 e5 bo2-gi2-bun5 ui5-tshi5 mai3 tng7-kin1!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 上基本的工課就是「作品多元化」：創作較濟無仝文類的作品，親像文學、寓言、通俗科學（醫學、物理、化學、太空、地球科學……）、藝術、音樂、文化、政治、經濟、生物、環保、笑詼、實用文（結婚帖仔、祭文、推薦文、求職文、公文），甚至地理、歷史、宗教、哲學的文章──特別是愛大大力出版囡仔冊，趁學校有母語教育，提供予國小、國中學生通讀，予𪜶會當共佇學校學--著--的、真有限的母語文維持莫斷根！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khòe tō sī“chok-phín to-goân-hòa”: chhòng-chok khah chē bô kâng bûn-lūi ê chok-phín, chhin-chhiūⁿ bûn-ha̍k,gū-giân,thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k(i-ha̍k,bu̍t-lí,hòa-ha̍k,thài-khong,tē-kiû kho-ha̍k...), gē-su̍t,im-ga̍k,bûn-hòa,chèng-tī,keng-chè,seng-bu̍t, khoân-pó,chhiò-khoe,si̍t-iōng-bûn(kiat-hun thiap-á,chè-bûn,thui-chiàn-bûn,kiû-chit-bûn,kong-bûn), sīm-chì tē-lí,le̍k-sú,chong-kàu,tiat-ha̍k ê bûn-chiuⁿ── te̍k-pia̍t sī ài tōa-tōa-la̍t chhut-pán gín-á-chheh, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bó-gí kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hō͘ kok-sió,kok-tiong ha̍k-seng thang tha̍k, hō͘ in ē-tàng kā tī ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê,chin iú-hān ê bó-gí-bûn ûi-chhî mài tn̄g-kin!
en_text: The most basic step would be 'the diversification of work', which is to create more works in different genres. For example, literature, folktales, common science (like medicine, physics, chemistry, space, geoscience...), art, music, culture, politics, economics, biology, greenness, comedy, practical writing (like a wedding invitation, funeral oration, foreword, cover letter, official memo), and even articles about geography, history, religion, and philosophy. More importantly, we should publish more children's books. As we still provide our mother tongue education in school, we must offer these books to students in both primary and middle schools. The mother tongue materials that they learn in school are already very limited. We must ensure that our mother tongue lives on.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng kàu tsit-má í-king ū tshiau-kuè sì-tsa̍p tang--ah!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 kau3 tsit4-ma2 i2-king1 u7 tshiau1-kue3 si3-tsap8 tang1--ah4!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 臺語文運動到這馬已經有超過四十冬--矣！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng kàu chit-má í-keng ū chhiau-kòe sì-cha̍p tang--ah!
en_text: The Taiwanese Language Movement has been around for more than 40 years since its inception!

hok_text_tailo: Ū hó ê tsok-phín tsiah ē-tàng tsìng-bîng tsit ê gí-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thuân bān nî, kiánn-sun mā tsiah khíng, tsiah ē beh pó-tsûn, tshái-iōng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: u7 ho2 e5 tsok4-phin2 tsiah4 e7-tang3 tsing3-bing5 tsit4 e5 gi2-gian5 u7 ke3-tat8 liu5-thuan5 ban7 ni5, kiann2-sun1 ma7 tsiah4 khing2,tsiah4 e7 beh4 po2-tsun5,tshai2-iong7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有好的作品才會當證明這个語言有價值流傳萬年，囝孫嘛才肯、才會欲保存、採用。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ū hó ê chok-phín chiah ē-tàng chèng-bêng chit ê gí-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thoân bān nî, kiáⁿ-sun mā chiah khéng,chiah ē beh pó-chûn,chhái-iōng.
en_text: Only when there are good works, can we prove that the language is precious and deserves to be passed down for centuries to come. And only then will the future generations be willing to preserve and adopt it.

hok_text_tailo: Koh lâi sī kīng-tsing: tsok-phín ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k, sin-suí ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k, su-ji̍p-huat mā ài ū kīng-tsing-li̍k!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: koh4 lai5 si7 king7-tsing1: tsok4-phin2 ai3 u7 king7-tsing1-lik8, sin1-sui2 ai3 u7 king7-tsing1-lik8, su1-jip8-huat4 ma7 ai3 u7 king7-tsing1-lik8!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣來是競爭：作品愛有競爭力、薪水愛有競爭力、輸入法嘛愛有競爭力！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Koh lâi sī kēng-cheng: chok-phín ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k, sin-súi ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k, su-ji̍p-hoat mā ài ū kēng-cheng-le̍k!
en_text: Another thing is competition. Our work must be competitive! Our pay must be competitive! Our input method engine must also be competitive!

hok_text_tailo: tn̂g-kî tshui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē tsú-tiunn tsit-uân sin-suí ài pí guā-kháu khah kuân, hōo tsò Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū tsū-sìn kah kong-îng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tng5-ki5 tshui1-sak4 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 e5 li2 kang1-khioh4 tai5-gi2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 tsu2-tiunn1 tsit4-uan5 sin1-sui2 ai3 pi2 gua7-khau2 khah4 kuan5, hoo7 tso3 tai5-gi2-bun5 e5 tong5-kang1 u7 tsu7-sin3 kah4 kong1-ing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 長期推捒臺語文運動的李江却臺語文教基金會主張職員薪水愛比外口較懸，予做臺語文的同工有自信佮光榮。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tn̂g-kî chhui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gí bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe chú-tiuⁿ chit-oân sin-súi ài pí gōa-kháu khah koân, hō͘ chò Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū chū-sìn kah kong-êng.
en_text: The Lí Kang Khiok Taiwanese Cultural and Educational Foundation, which has been promoting the Taiwanese Language Movement, advocates that the staff pay needs to be higher than that of the outside world so that our comrades in the Taiwanese language industry can be confident and proud.

hok_text_tailo: Koh ū, tsit-má siōng iàu-kín ê phah-jī kang-kū sī tshiú-ki-á.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣有，這馬上要緊的拍字工具是手機仔。

en_text: Also, the most urgent typing tool right now is the mobile phone.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 手機仔的臺語輸入法佇IOS系統干焦有羅漢跤臺語輸入法。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiú-ki-á ê Tâi-gí su-ji̍p-hoat tī IOS hē-thóng kan-na ū lô-hàn-kha Tâi-gí su-ji̍p-hoat.
en_text: The only Taiwanese Hokkien input method engine for smart phones is the Lô-hàn-kha Taiwanese Hokkien input method engine on iOS.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師問學生講：「敢有人出業了，無愛繼續讀國中，欲去工場趁錢--的？請攑手。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lǎu-sir mn̄g ha̍k-seng kóng: “Kám ū lâng chhut-gia̍p liáu,bô ài kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, berh khìr kang-tiûⁿ thàn-chîⁿ--ê?Chhiáⁿ gia̍h-chhiú.”
en_text: The teacher asked the students, 'Is there anyone who wants to go to work in a factory instead of going to middle school after graduation? Please raise your hand.'

hok_text_tailo: A-sing mā gia̍h-tshiú.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 ma7 giah8-tshiu2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生嘛攑手。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng mā gia̍h-chhiú.
en_text: A-sing also raised his hand.

hok_text_tailo: Lǎu-sir tsi̍t-ê-á-tsi̍t-ê kā gia̍h-tshiú ê ha̍k-sing kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-kù, A-sing ê miâ pīng bô tǐr tíng-bīn.

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lǎu-sir chi̍t-ê-á-chi̍t-ê kā gia̍h-chhiú ê ha̍k-seng kì--lo̍h-lâi, m̄-kù,A-seng ê miâ pēng bô tǐr téng-bīn.
en_text: The teacher recorded the students who were raising their hands one by one, but A-Sing's name was not on the list.

hok_text_tailo: Hā-khò liáu, lǎu-sir kā A-sing kiò lâi pinn-thâu kóng: “Lír ê sîng-tsik tsiah-nī hó, bô berh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong, uī-siánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ha7-kho3 liau2,lau6-sir1 ka7 a1-sing1 kio3 lai5 pinn1-thau5 kong2: “lir2 e5 sing5-tsik4 tsiah4-ni7 ho2, bo5 berh4 ke3-siok8 thak8 kok4-tiong1,ui7-siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 下課了，老師共阿生叫來邊頭講：「你的成績遮爾好，無欲繼續讀國中，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hā-khò liáu,lǎu-sir kā A-seng kiò lâi piⁿ-thâu kóng: “Lír ê sêng-chek chiah-nī hó, bô berh kè-sio̍k tha̍k kok-tiong,ūi-siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: After class, the teacher called A-Sing and said to him,' You have good grades, why won't you study in junior high?'

hok_text_tailo: lǎu-sir suà--lo̍h-khìr tuì ha̍k-sing kóng: “Nā án-ni, bîn-á-tsài khí, bô gia̍h-tshiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sik tha̍k-tsir; ū gia̍h-tshiú--ê tiō khì sàu piān-sóo, sàu kàu tshut-gia̍p.”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lau6-sir1 sua3--loh8-khir3 tui3 hak8-sing1 kong2: “na7 an2-ni1,bin5-a2-tsai3 khi2, bo5 giah8-tshiu2--e5 lau5 ti7 kau3-sik4 thak8-tsir1; u7 giah8-tshiu2--e5 tio7 khi3 sau3 pian7-soo2,sau3 kau3 tshut4-giap8.”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 老師紲--落-去對學生講：「若按呢，明仔載起，無攑手--的留佇教室讀書；有攑手--的就去掃便所，掃到出業。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lǎu-sir sòa--lo̍h-khìr tùi ha̍k-seng kóng: “Nā án-ni,bîn-á-chài khí, bô gia̍h-chhiú--ê lâu tī kàu-sek tha̍k-chir; ū gia̍h-chhiú--ê tiō khì sàu piān-só͘,sàu kàu chhut-gia̍p.”
en_text: The teacher then said to the students: 'If this is the case, from tomorrow, those who do not raise their hands will stay in the classroom to study; those who have raised their hands will sweep the toilet until graduation.'

hok_text_tailo: A-sing án-tsuánn siūnn to siūnn-bô.

en_text: No matter how much A-sing thought about it, he still could not understand.

hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “na2 e7 tsiah4 bo5 kong1-pinn5! berh4 thak8 kok4-tiong1--e5,tio7 m7-bian2 sau3 pian7-soo2; bo5-huat4-too7 koh4 thak8--e5,tio7 ai3 sau3 pian7-soo2,ui7-siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「哪會遮無公平！欲讀國中--的，就毋免掃便所；無法度閣讀--的，就愛掃便所，為啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Ná ē chiah bô kong-pîⁿ! Berh tha̍k kok-tiong--ê,tiō m̄-bián sàu piān-só͘; bô-hoat-tō͘ koh tha̍k--ê,tiō ài sàu piān-só͘,ūi-siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: How can it be so unfair? Those who plan to study in middle school do not need to clean the toilet, while those who cannot continue studying will have to clean the toilet. Why?

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: I sim-lāi it-ti̍t siūⁿ-bô.
en_text: He kept thinking about it in his mind but couldn't understand it.

hok_text_tailo: Tshut-gia̍p terē-jī kang, A-sing tiō koo-tsiânn tshù-pinn ê a-hiann tshuā i khìr oo-tshiú-á kang-tshiáng tsuè-kang.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshut4-giap8 tere7-ji7 kang1, a1-sing1 tio7 koo1-tsiann5 tshu3-pinn1 e5 a1-hiann1 tshua7 i1 khir3 oo1-tshiu2-a2 kang1-tshiang2 tsue3-kang1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 出業第二工，阿生就姑情厝邊的阿兄𤆬伊去烏手仔工廠做工。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chhut-gia̍p tērē-jī kang, A-seng tiō ko͘-chiâⁿ chhù-piⁿ ê a-hiaⁿ chhōa i khìr o͘-chhiú-á kang-chhiáng chòe-kang.
en_text: The day after his graduation, A-sing begged his neighbour to get him a job in a blue-collar factory.

hok_text_tailo: A-sing tsiok līn-tsin--ê, kui-ê hioh-lua̍h tah-tah la̍k-tsa̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 tsiok4 lin7-tsin1--e5, kui1-e5 hioh4-luah8 tah4-tah4 lak8-tsap8 kang1 long2 bo5 hioh4-khun3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生足認真的，規个歇熱貼貼六十工攏無歇睏。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng chiok līn-chin--ê, kui-ê hioh-loa̍h tah-tah la̍k-cha̍p kang lóng bô hioh-khùn.
en_text: A-sing was very serious. He never once rested for all sixty days of the summer break.

hok_text_tailo: “A-pah! Guá tsit ê hioh-lua̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah khoo. Sann-pah khoo tàu sann-thinn tshù--lí, sann-pah khoo hōo--guá, hó--bô?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “a1-pah4!gua2 tsit4 e5 hioh4-luah8 than3-tioh8 lak8-pah4 khoo1. sann1-pah4 khoo1 tau3 sann1-thinn1 tshu3--li2,sann1-pah4 khoo1 hoo7--gua2,ho2--bo5?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「阿爸！我這个歇熱趁著六百箍。三百箍鬥相添厝--裡，三百箍予我，好--無？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “A-pah!Góa chit ê hioh-loa̍h thàn-tio̍h la̍k-pah kho͘. Saⁿ-pah kho͘ tàu saⁿ-thiⁿ chhù--lí,saⁿ-pah kho͘ hō͘--góa,hó--bô?”
en_text: Dad! I earned $600 this summer. $300 is for helping the family. Can I have the other $300 for myself?

hok_text_tailo: A-sing khin-siann-suè-serh, tsin kiann in a-pah pìnn-bīn, in a-pah tsin phái.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-sing1 khin1-siann1-sue3-serh4,tsin1 kiann1 in1 a1-pah4 pinn3-bin7, in1 a1-pah4 tsin1 phai2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿生輕聲細說，真驚𪜶阿爸變面，𪜶阿爸真歹。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-seng khin-siaⁿ-sòe-serh,chin kiaⁿ in a-pah pìⁿ-bīn, in a-pah chin phái.
en_text: A-sing said softly, fearing that his father might snap back at him. His father was very fierce.

hok_text_tailo: “Gín-á-lâng the̍h hiah tsuē tsînn berh tshòng siánn-mih?”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “gin2-a2-lang5 theh8 hiah4 tsue7 tsinn5 berh4 tshong3 siann2-mih4?”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「囡仔人提遐濟錢欲創啥物？」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Gín-á-lâng the̍h hiah chōe chîⁿ berh chhòng siáⁿ-mih?”
en_text: What would a kid need so much money for?

hok_text_tailo: in a-pah tuā-siann mn̄g.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: in1 a1-pah4 tua7-siann1 mng7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 𪜶阿爸大聲問。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: in a-pah tōa-siaⁿ mn̄g.
en_text: His father asked him loudly.

hok_text_tailo: Tú-thâu-á, khiā tī pinn-thâu leh la̍k-la̍k-tshuah ê A-sing
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tu2-thau5-a2,khia7 ti7 pinn1-thau5 leh4 lak8-lak8-tshuah4 e5 a1-sing1
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 拄頭仔，徛佇邊頭咧慄慄掣的阿生
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tú-thâu-á,khiā tī piⁿ-thâu leh la̍k-la̍k-chhoah ê A-seng
en_text: Just now, Ah Sheng, who was standing beside him, was shaking.

hok_text_tailo: khuànn in a-pah lóng bô kóng-uē, tsin kiann i m̄ tah-ìng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: khuann3 in1 a1-pah4 long2 bo5 kong2-ue7,tsin1 kiann1 i1 m7 tah4-ing3.

en_text: Seeing that his father did not make a sound, he was afraid that his father might reject him.

hok_text_tailo: Hó-ka-tsài! Kèr tsi̍t-tak-kú-á, in a-pah the̍h-tio̍h hit sann-pah khoo tiām-tiām-á kiânn ji̍p-khìr pâng-king.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 好佳哉！過一觸久仔，𪜶阿爸提著彼三百箍恬恬仔行入去房間。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hó-ka-chài!Kèr chi̍t-tak-kú-á, in a-pah the̍h-tio̍h hit saⁿ-pah kho͘ tiām-tiām-á kiâⁿ ji̍p-khìr pâng-keng.
en_text: Luckily, after a while, his father took the three hundred TWD and left for his room quietly.

hok_text_tailo: “Ua̋! Guá ē-tàng khì tha̍k-tsir--ah!”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: “ua9!gua2 e7-tang3 khi3 thak8-tsir1--ah4!”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「Ua̋!我會當去讀書--矣！」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Ŏa!Góa ē-tàng khì tha̍k-chir--ah!”
en_text: Woo-hoo! I got the chance to study!

hok_text_tailo: tàu thàn tsi̍t-kuá tsînn lâi kā tshù-lāi sann-thinn, A-sing tiō sī kî-tiong tsi̍t ê.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tau3 than3 tsit8-kua2 tsinn5 lai5 ka7 tshu3-lai7 sann1-thinn1, a1-sing1 tio7 si7 ki5-tiong1 tsit8 e5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 鬥趁一寡錢來共厝內相添，阿生就是其中一个。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tàu thàn chi̍t-kóa chîⁿ lâi kā chhù-lāi saⁿ-thiⁿ, A-seng tiō sī kî-tiong chi̍t ê.
en_text: A-sing was one of the breadwinners who helped out the household.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 社會的奇怪代

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 第三件是四十外年前的代誌，奇怪無奇怪，請逐家判斷。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tērē-saⁿ kiāⁿ sī sì-cha̍p-gōa nî chêng ê tāi-chì, kî-koài bô kî-koài,chhiáⁿ ta̍k-ke phòaⁿ-toàn.
en_text: The third thing happened forty years ago. Was it strange? You can be the judge of that.

hok_text_tailo: Tiunn Siông sī Tiong-kok Sam-kok Sî-tāi ê lâng, uī-tio̍h berh tâu-phun Tsô Tshò, i thau uē pún-kok tuē-tôo, tsuè-uî tâu-hâng Tsô Tshò ê hiàn-lé, tiō sī buē kang-san, kiû îng-huâ--lah.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tiunn1 siong5 si7 tiong1-kok4 sam1-kok4 si5-tai7 e5 lang5, ui7-tioh8 berh4 tau5-phun1 tso5 tsho3, i1 thau1 ue7 pun2-kok4 tue7-too5, tsue3-ui5 tau5-hang5 tso5 tsho3 e5 hian3-le2, tio7 si7 bue7 kang1-san1,kiu5 ing5-hua5--lah4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 張松是中國三國時代的人，為著欲投奔曹操，伊偷畫本國地圖，做為投降曹操的獻禮，就是賣江山，求榮華--啦。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tiuⁿ Siông sī Tiong-kok Sam-kok Sî-tāi ê lâng, ūi-tio̍h berh tâu-phun Chô Chhò, i thau ōe pún-kok tōe-tô͘, chòe-ûi tâu-hâng Chô Chhò ê hiàn-lé, tiō sī bōe kang-san,kiû êng-hôa--lah.
en_text: Tiunn Siông was a figure from China during the Three Kingdoms period. To seek asylum from Tsô Tshò, he secretly drew a map of his country as a gift for Tsô Tshò when he surrenders. This means that he betrayed his country for money and fame.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-gír-bûn ūn-tōng sin kai-tuānn: tsuè-sing-lí

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 臺語文運動新階段：做生理
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-gír-bûn ūn-tōng sin kai-tōaⁿ:chòe-seng-lí
en_text: A new stage for the Taiwanese Language Movement: Doing business

hok_text_tailo: koh lâi, lán ài kuánn-kín hānn-li̍p “sin koh to̍k-li̍p” ê kai-tuānn: khai-sí tsún-pī “tsuè-sing-lí”!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: koh4 lai5,lan2 ai3 kuann2-kin2 hann7-lip8“sin1 koh4 tok8-lip8”e5 kai1-tuann7: khai1-si2 tsun2-pi7“tsue3-sing1-li2”!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣來，咱愛趕緊迒入「新閣獨立」的階段：開始準備「做生理」！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: koh lâi,lán ài kóaⁿ-kín hāⁿ-li̍p“sin koh to̍k-li̍p”ê kai-tōaⁿ: khai-sí chún-pī“chòe-seng-lí”!
en_text: Next, we must quickly step nto the phase of being 'new and independent': start preparing to 'do business'!

hok_text_tailo: tsuè-sing-lí tiō sī beh thàn-tsînn, tsuè-sing-lí tiō sī ài ū kìng-tsing, tsuè-sing-lí tiō sī ài káng-kiù phín-tsit;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsue3-sing1-li2 tio7 si7 beh4 than3-tsinn5, tsue3-sing1-li2 tio7 si7 ai3 u7 king3-tsing1, tsue3-sing1-li2 tio7 si7 ai3 kang2-kiu3 phin2-tsit4;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 做生理就是欲趁錢，做生理就是愛有競爭，做生理就是愛講究品質；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chòe-seng-lí tiō sī beh thàn-chîⁿ, chòe-seng-lí tiō sī ài ū kèng-cheng, chòe-seng-lí tiō sī ài káng-kiù phín-chit;
en_text: Doing business is about making money. Doing business is about being competitive. Doing business is about paying attention to quality.

hok_text_tailo: tse tiō sī guá berh kóng ê hong-hiòng kap tiōng-tiám.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tse1 tio7 si7 gua2 berh4 kong2 e5 hong1-hiong3 kap4 tiong7-tiam2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 這就是我欲講的方向佮重點。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: che tiō sī góa berh kóng ê hong-hiòng kap tiōng-tiám.
en_text: This is the direction and focus of what I want to say.

hok_text_tailo: lán ê phín-tsit nā bô-kàu hó, koh-khah án-tsuánn mā bô lâng ē lâi kau-kuan, tse sī ki-pún tō-lí.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lan2 e5 phin2-tsit4 na7 bo5-kau3 ho2, koh4-khah4 an2-tsuann2 ma7 bo5 lang5 e7 lai5 kau1-kuan1, tse1 si7 ki1-pun2 to7-li2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 咱的品質若無夠好，閣較按怎嘛無人會來交關，這是基本道理。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lán ê phín-chit nā bô-kàu hó, koh-khah án-chóaⁿ mā bô lâng ē lâi kau-koan, che sī ki-pún tō-lí.
en_text: If our quality is not on par, no one will work with us no matter what we do. This is the basic principle.

hok_text_tailo: Sóo-pái lán ê Tâi-gír-bûn tsok-phín tio̍h-ài kè-sio̍k ka-kiông, sing-kip.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: soo2-pai2 lan2 e5 tai5-gir2-bun5 tsok4-phin2 tioh8-ai3 ke3-siok8 ka1-kiong5,sing1-kip4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 所擺咱的臺語文作品著愛繼續加強、升級。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Só͘-pái lán ê Tâi-gír-bûn chok-phín tio̍h-ài kè-sio̍k ka-kiông,seng-kip.
en_text: That is why we must keep on improving and upgrading Taiwanese literature.

hok_text_tailo: tsok-tsiá: Tiunn Ho̍k-tsū
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsok4-tsia2:tiunn1 hok8-tsu7
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 作者：張復聚
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chok-chiá:Tiuⁿ Ho̍k-chū
en_text: Author: Tiunn Ho̍k-tsū

hok_text_tailo: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khèr tiō sī “tsok-phín to-guân-huà”: tshòng-tsok khah tsuē bô sâng bûn-luī ê tsok-phín, tshin-tshiūnn bûn-ha̍k, gū-giân, thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k (i-ha̍k, bu̍t-lí, huà-ha̍k, thài-khong, tuē-kiû kho-ha̍k...), gē-su̍t, im-ga̍k, bûn-huà, tsìng-tī, king-tsè, sing-bu̍t, huân-pó, tshiò-kher, si̍t-iōng-bûn (kiat-hun thiap-á, tsè-bûn, tshui-tsiàn-bûn, kiû-tsit-bûn, kong-bûn), sīm-tsì tē-lí, li̍k-sír, tsong-kàu, tiat-ha̍k ê bûn-tsiunn ── ti̍k-pia̍t sī ài tuā-tuā-la̍t tshut-pán gín-á-tsir, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bú-gír kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hōo kok-sió, kok-tiong ha̍k-sing thang tha̍k, hōo in ē-tàng kā tǐr  ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê, tsin iú-hān ê bú-gí-bûn î-tshî mài tn̄g-kun!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: siong7 ki1-pun2 e5 khang1-kher3 tio7 si7“tsok4-phin2 to1-guan5-hua3”: tshong3-tsok4 khah4 tsue7 bo5 sang5 bun5-lui7 e5 tsok4-phin2, tshin1-tshiunn7 bun5-hak8,gu7-gian5,thong1-siok8 kho1-hak8(i1-hak8,but8-li2,hua3-hak8,thai3-khong1,tue7-kiu5 kho1-hak8...), ge7-sut8,im1-gak8,bun5-hua3,tsing3-ti7,king1-tse3,sing1-but8, huan5-po2,tshio3-kher1,sit8-iong7-bun5(kiat4-hun1 thiap4-a2,tse3-bun5,tshui1-tsian3-bun5,kiu5-tsit4-bun5,kong1-bun5), sim7-tsi3 te7-li2,lik8-sir2,tsong1-kau3,tiat4-hak8 e5 bun5-tsiunn1── tik8-piat8 si7 ai3 tua7-tua7-lat8 tshut4-pan2 gin2-a2-tsir1, than3 hak8-hau7 u7 bu2-gir2 kau3-iok8, the5-kiong1 hoo7 kok4-sio2,kok4-tiong1 hak8-sing1 thang1 thak8, hoo7 in1 e7-tang3 ka7 tir6 hak8-hau7 oh8--tioh8--e5,tsin1 iu2-han7 e5 bu2-gi2-bun5 i5-tshi5 mai3 tng7-kun1!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 上基本的工課就是「作品多元化」：創作較濟無𫝛文類的作品，親像文學、寓言、通俗科學（醫學、物理、化學、太空、地球科學……）、藝術、音樂、文化、政治、經濟、生物、環保、笑詼、實用文（結婚帖仔、祭文、推薦文、求職文、公文），甚至地理、歷史、宗教、哲學ê文章──特別是愛大大力出版囡仔書，趁學校有母語教育，提供予國小、國中學生通讀，予𪜶會當共佇學校學--著--的、真有限的母語文維持莫斷根！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Siōng ki-pún ê khang-khèr tiō sī“chok-phín to-goân-hòa”: chhòng-chok khah chōe bô sâng bûn-lūi ê chok-phín, chhin-chhiūⁿ bûn-ha̍k,gū-giân,thong-sio̍k kho-ha̍k(i-ha̍k,bu̍t-lí,hòa-ha̍k,thài-khong,tōe-kiû kho-ha̍k...), gē-su̍t,im-ga̍k,bûn-hòa,chèng-tī,keng-chè,seng-bu̍t, hoân-pó,chhiò-kher,si̍t-iōng-bûn(kiat-hun thiap-á,chè-bûn,chhui-chiàn-bûn,kiû-chit-bûn,kong-bûn), sīm-chì tē-lí,le̍k-sír,chong-kàu,tiat-ha̍k ê bûn-chiuⁿ── te̍k-pia̍t sī ài tōa-tōa-la̍t chhut-pán gín-á-chir, thàn ha̍k-hāu ū bú-gír kàu-io̍k, thê-kiong hō͘ kok-sió,kok-tiong ha̍k-seng thang tha̍k, hō͘ in ē-tàng kā tǐr ha̍k-hāu o̍h--tio̍h--ê,chin iú-hān ê bú-gí-bûn î-chhî mài tn̄g-kun!
en_text: The basic work is 'diverse works': create more works in different literary categories, like literature, fable, common science(medicine, physics, chemistry, space, geoscience), art, music, culture, politics, economics, biology, environmentally friendly, joke, practical article(wedding invitation, funeral oration, foreword, cover letter, official document), and even articles about geography, history, religion, philosophy-- especially we should widely publish children's books. While mother tongue education is being practiced in school, we can offer these books to children, make the mother tongue which they learn very limited in school can still maintain.

hok_text_tailo: Tâi-gír-bûn ūn-tōng kàu tsit-má í-king ū tshiau-kèr sì-tsa̍p tang--ah!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tai5-gir2-bun5 un7-tong7 kau3 tsit4-ma2 i2-king1 u7 tshiau1-ker3 si3-tsap8 tang1--ah4!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 臺語文運動到這馬已經有超過四十冬--矣！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tâi-gír-bûn ūn-tōng kàu chit-má í-keng ū chhiau-kèr sì-cha̍p tang--ah!
en_text: The Taiwanese Language Movement has been around for more than forty years!

hok_text_tailo: Ū hó ê tsok-phín tsiah ē-tàng tsìng-bîng tsit ê gír-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thuân bān nî, kánn-sun mā tsiah khíng, tsiah ē berh pó-tsûn, tshái-iōng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: u7 ho2 e5 tsok4-phin2 tsiah4 e7-tang3 tsing3-bing5 tsit4 e5 gir2-gian5 u7 ke3-tat8 liu5-thuan5 ban7 ni5, kann2-sun1 ma7 tsiah4 khing2,tsiah4 e7 berh4 po2-tsun5,tshai2-iong7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有好的作品才會當證明這个語言有價值流傳萬年，囝孫嘛才肯、才會欲保存、採用。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ū hó ê chok-phín chiah ē-tàng chèng-bêng chit ê gír-giân ū kè-ta̍t liû-thoân bān nî, káⁿ-sun mā chiah khéng,chiah ē berh pó-chûn,chhái-iōng.
en_text: Only when there are good works, can we prove that the language is precious and deserves to be passed down for centuries to come. And only then will the future generations be willing to preserve and adopt it.

hok_text_tailo: Koh lâi sī kìng-tsing: tsok-phín ài ū kìng-tsing-li̍k, sin-suí ài ū kìng-tsing-li̍k, su-ji̍p-huat mā ài ū kìng-tsing-li̍k!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: koh4 lai5 si7 king3-tsing1: tsok4-phin2 ai3 u7 king3-tsing1-lik8, sin1-sui2 ai3 u7 king3-tsing1-lik8, su1-jip8-huat4 ma7 ai3 u7 king3-tsing1-lik8!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣來是競爭：作品愛有競爭力、薪水愛有競爭力、輸入法嘛愛有競爭力！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Koh lâi sī kèng-cheng: chok-phín ài ū kèng-cheng-le̍k, sin-súi ài ū kèng-cheng-le̍k, su-ji̍p-hoat mā ài ū kèng-cheng-le̍k!
en_text: Then there is the competition: the works must be competitive, the salary must be competitive, and the input method must be competitive!

hok_text_tailo: tn̂g-kî tshui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gír bûn-kàu ki-kim-huē tsú-tiunn tsit-uân sin-suí ài pí guā-kháu khah kuân, hōo tsuè Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū tsǐr-sìn kah kong-îng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tng5-ki5 tshui1-sak4 tai5-gi2-bun5 un7-tong7 e5 li2 kang1-khioh4 tai5-gir2 bun5-kau3 ki1-kim1-hue7 tsu2-tiunn1 tsit4-uan5 sin1-sui2 ai3 pi2 gua7-khau2 khah4 kuan5, hoo7 tsue3 tai5-gi2-bun5 e5 tong5-kang1 u7 tsir6-sin3 kah4 kong1-ing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 長期推捒臺語文運動的李江却臺語文教基金會主張職員薪水愛比外口較懸，予做臺語文的同工有自信佮光榮。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tn̂g-kî chhui-sak Tâi-gí-bûn ūn-tōng ê Lí Kang-khioh Tâi-gír bûn-kàu ki-kim-hōe chú-tiuⁿ chit-oân sin-súi ài pí gōa-kháu khah koân, hō͘ chòe Tâi-gí-bûn ê tông-kang ū chǐr-sìn kah kong-êng.
en_text: Lí Kang-khiok Foundation, a long-time promoter of the Taiwanese Hokkien language movement, advocates that the salaries of the Foundation's staff must be higher than the average salary. The employees of the Foundation are proud of the company and feel confident.

hok_text_tailo: Koh ū, tsit-má siōng iàu-kín ê phah-lī kang-kū sī tshiú-ki-á.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 閣有，這馬上要緊的拍字工具是手機仔。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Koh ū,chit-má siōng iàu-kín ê phah-lī kang-kū sī chhiú-ki-á.
en_text: And, right now, the most important typing tool is the cell phone.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 手機仔的臺語輸入法佇IOS系統干焦有羅漢跤臺語輸入法。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiú-ki-á ê Tâi-gír su-li̍p-hoat tǐr IOS hē-thóng kan-na ū lô-hàn-kha Tâi-gír su-li̍p-hoat.
en_text: If you use the cell phone's Taiwanese input method, there is only the Lô-hàn-kha Taiwanese input method available in the IOS system.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 加減嘛有寡成就。

en_text: Although Lô-hàn-kha comes in handy, there are still many problems that it couldn't solve.
