hok_text_hanlo_tai: 最近咱嘛咧鼓舞閣開發另外一套來佮羅漢跤競爭，互相落氣求進步。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chòe-kūn lán mā leh kó͘-bú koh khai-hoat lēng-gōa chi̍t thò lâi kah lô-hàn-kha kèng-cheng, hō͘-siong làu-khùi kiû chìn-pō͘.
en_text: Lately, we are also encouraging the development of another approach to competing with Lô-hàn-kha. We can give each other constructive criticism and improve together.

hok_text_tailo: Mā ài pài-thok khah tsuē siàu-liân-lâng tha̍k giân-gír-ha̍k phok-sū, līn-tsin gián-kiù Tâi-gír-bûn, án-ni ha̍k-su̍t thîng-tōo ē thê-sing, tuì Tâi-gír-bûn huat-tián ē ū tuā pang-tsān.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ma7 ai3 pai3-thok4 khah4 tsue7 siau3-lian5-lang5 thak8 gian5-gir2-hak8 phok4-su7, lin7-tsin1 gian2-kiu3 tai5-gir2-bun5, an2-ni1 hak8-sut8 thing5-too7 e7 the5-sing1, tui3 tai5-gir2-bun5 huat4-tian2 e7 u7 tua7 pang1-tsan7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 嘛愛拜託較濟少年人讀言語學博士，認真研究臺語文，按呢學術程度會提升，對臺語文發展會有大幫贊。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Mā ài pài-thok khah chōe siàu-liân-lâng tha̍k giân-gír-ha̍k phok-sū, līn-chin gián-kiù Tâi-gír-bûn, án-ni ha̍k-su̍t thêng-tō͘ ē thê-seng, tùi Tâi-gír-bûn hoat-tián ē ū tōa pang-chān.
en_text: We should also ask more young people to study Ph.D. in linguistics and study Taiwanese Hokkien seriously, so that the overall academic level will be improved, and it will be of great help to the development of Taiwanese Hokkien.

hok_text_tailo: ū phín-tsit koh ū kìng-tsing, tse tiō sī tsuè-sing-lí beh sîng-kong ê thâu-sing-sòo.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有品質閣有競爭，這就是做生理欲成功的頭先素。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ū phín-chit koh ū kèng-cheng, che tiō sī chòe-seng-lí beh sêng-kong ê thâu-seng-sò͘.
en_text: To have quality and to be competitive. These are the main criteria for success in business.

hok_text_tailo: Hi-bāng ū tsi̍t kang, tsuè Tâi-gír-bûn tsin-tsiànn ū tsînn thàn, ū sîng-tsiū, koh hó miâ-siann.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 希望有一工，做臺語文真正有錢趁、有成就、閣好名聲。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Hi-bāng ū chi̍t kang, chòe Tâi-gír-bûn chin-chiàⁿ ū chîⁿ thàn,ū sêng-chiū,koh hó miâ-siaⁿ.
en_text: I hope that one day, working in the Taiwanese Hokkien Language can earn a decent living with achievements and prestige.

hok_text_tailo: Án-ni Tâi-gír-bûn ūn-tōng ê tsiân-puè tsiah ē-tàng sió-khuá hioh-tshuán, kóng “Tâi-gír-bûn tshut-thâu-thinn!”

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 按呢臺語文運動的前輩才會當小可歇喘，講「臺語文出頭天！」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Án-ni Tâi-gír-bûn ūn-tōng ê chiân-pòe chiah ē-tàng sió-khóa hioh-chhoán, kóng“Tâi-gír-bûn chhut-thâu-thiⁿ!”
en_text: So that the forefathers of the Taiwanese Language Movement can finally take a rest and say, “The Taiwanese language has finally made it to the top!”

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 「臺語公共電視台」嘛陸續有咧討論，毋過針對運動本身欲按怎閣較進步的檢討，總--是嘛袂當無。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: “Tâi-gír kong-kiōng tiān-sī-tâi”mā lio̍k-sio̍k ū leh thó-lūn, m̄-kù chiam-tùi ūn-tōng pún-sin berh án-chóaⁿ koh-khah chìn-pō͘ ê kiám-thó, chóng--sī mā bōe-tàng bô.
en_text: Taiwan Language Public Television is also being discussed one after another. However, reviewing how the Taiwanese language movement itself should be improved cannot be done without it.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 天氣遮熱，用行--的抑騎鐵馬驚傷忝，我想欲騎oo-tóo-bái來去。

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 騎oo-tóo-bái是上蓋緊--啦，毋過著愛有駕駛閣著愛戴安全帽。你敢有紮？

en_text: It's true that you drove your motorbike quite fast, but you must have your driving license and wear a safety helmet. Did you have one on?

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 真濟流行歌仔ê歌詞、節奏lóng深深刻tī濟濟人ê頭殼內，不時lán就ē唱歌來表達心聲，甚至kā感動傳到全世界。

en_text: If you sing when you are nervous, your heart will slowly return to normal.

hok_text_tailo: tsóng-kóng--tsi̍t-kù siánn-mih sim-tsîng lóng tshuē ū tsi̍t siú kua lâi ha̍h.

hok_text_tailo: thàu-kuè kua-sû guá liáu-kái tio̍h guân-lâi mā ū lâng ū kah guá kāng-khuán ê kám-kak, ū gōo-hue-tsa̍p-sik ê sing-ua̍h king-giām.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 透過歌詞我了解著原來mā有人有kap我仝款ê感覺，有五花十色ê生活經驗。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: thàu-kòe koa-sû góa liáu-kái tio̍h goân-lâi mā ū lâng ū kah góa kāng-khoán ê kám-kak, ū gō͘-hoe-cha̍p-sek ê seng-oa̍h keng-giām.
en_text: Through the artistic conception in the lyrics, I learned that there are people who have the same feelings as me and have various life experiences.

hok_text_tailo: tsò-lâng ē-tàng tsioh tshiùnn-kua hōo-siong liáu-kái, tō bē koo-koo-tuann-tuann.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 做人ē-tàng藉唱歌互相了解，就bē孤孤單單。

en_text: We can get to know each other through singing, so we don't feel very lonely.

hok_text_tailo: tī ha̍k-hāu siōng im-ga̍k khò, khò-pún ū tsi̍t siú “bāng tshun-hong”: “koo-tuann bô phuānn siú ting-ē, tshing-hong tuì-bīn tshue ;

hok_text_hanlo_tai: Tī學校上音樂課，課本有一首〈望春風〉：「孤單無伴守燈下，清風對面吹」；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tī ha̍k-hāu siōng im-ga̍k khò, khò-pún ū chi̍t siú“bāng chhun-hong”: “ko͘-toaⁿ bô phōaⁿ siú teng-ē,chheng-hong tùi-bīn chhoe;
en_text: In the music class at school, there is a song in the textbook called 'Watching the Spring Breeze': 'I stand alone under the street lamp without anyone to accompany me, and the refreshing wind blows towards my face.'

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 逐家一聲一聲陪我催--落去……」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ta̍k-ke chi̍t siaⁿ chi̍t siaⁿ pôe góa chhui--lo̍h-khì...”
en_text: Everyone applauded and sang with me all the way.

hok_text_tailo: tshiùnn-kua hōo kám-tsîng khiā sio-uá, kiò-tshínn lán tuì ka-kī sîng-tióng ê thóo-tē/thóo-tuē ê tiōng-sī, sán-sing ài kok-ka ài kòo-hiong ê kám-tsîng.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 唱歌hōo感情徛sio倚，叫醒lán對家己成長ê土地ê重視，產生愛國家愛故鄉ê感情。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiùⁿ-koa hō͘ kám-chêng khiā sio-óa, kiò-chhíⁿ lán tùi ka-kī sêng-tióng ê thó͘-tē/thó͘-tōe ê tiōng-sī, sán-seng ài kok-ka ài kò͘-hiong ê kám-chêng.
en_text: The singing brought all of our emotions together, reminding us of the importance of the land we grew up in and generating feelings of patriotism and love for our homeland.

hok_text_tailo: tī ha̍k-hāu, ta̍k-ke tsò-hué  tshiùnn-kua siōng tshù-bī, siōng sî-kiânn ê liû-hîng-kua sian tshiùnn mā bē ià-siān, tiōng-iàu ê tseh-ji̍t it-tīng ài ū kua-siann lâi tàu-lāu-jia̍t;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti7 hak8-hau7,tak8-ke1 tso3-hue2 tshiunn3-kua1 siong7 tshu3-bi7, siong7 si5-kiann5 e5 liu5-hing5-kua1 sian1 tshiunn3 ma7 be7 ia3-sian7, tiong7-iau3 e5 tseh4-jit8 it4-ting7 ai3 u7 kua1-siann1 lai5 tau3-lau7-jiat8;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: Tī學校，逐家做伙唱歌上趣味，上時行ê流行歌sian唱mā bē厭siān，重要ê節日一定ài有歌聲來tàu鬧熱；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: tī ha̍k-hāu,ta̍k-ke chò-hóe chhiùⁿ-koa siōng chhù-bī, siōng sî-kiâⁿ ê liû-hêng-koa sian chhiùⁿ mā bē ià-siān, tiōng-iàu ê cheh-ji̍t it-tēng ài ū koa-siaⁿ lâi tàu-lāu-jia̍t;
en_text: It was fun to sing together in school. The most popular pop songs of the day were always sung and they never get boring. We must sing to make the atmosphere more lively at important festivals.

hok_text_tailo: tshiùnn-kua tsiong siōng tiōng-iàu ê ji̍t-tsí tshng tsò tsi̍t tiâu pó-kuì ê tsin-tsu phua̍h-liān, hōo sing-ua̍h koh-khah bí-lē.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshiunn3-kua1 tsiong1 siong7 tiong7-iau3 e5 jit8-tsi2 tshng1 tso3 tsit8 tiau5 po2-kui3 e5 tsin1-tsu1 phuah8-lian7, hoo7 sing1-uah8 koh4-khah4 bi2-le7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 唱歌將上重要ê日子穿做一條寶貴ê真珠phua̍h鍊，hōo生活koh-khah美麗。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiùⁿ-koa chiong siōng tiōng-iàu ê ji̍t-chí chhng chò chi̍t tiâu pó-kùi ê chin-chu phoa̍h-liān, hō͘ seng-oa̍h koh-khah bí-lē.
en_text: Sing until you could string the most important days into a precious pearl necklace, just to make life more beautiful.

hok_text_tailo: kuan-tsiòng ē-tàng lâu-lo̍h tshim-tshim-tshim ê ìn-siōng/ìn-sióng.

en_text: The viewer can leave a deep impression.

hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-khîm thiaⁿ-bô, chí-sī chiong i ê gín-á lú khiú lú ân, chi̍t pái koh chi̍t pái tōa-siaⁿ hoah: “lín beh chhòng sáⁿ!?”,“lín beh chhòng sáⁿ!?”

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿琴ê目屎一直流、一直流，親像雨一直落、一直落，伊心內一直kā腹肚內ê囡仔會失禮：「可憐ê囡仔，你bē赴出世，m̄是阿母無愛--你，咱做伙落來陰間，阿母仝款ē kā你惜命命。」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-khîm ê ba̍k-sái it-ti̍t lâu,it-ti̍t lâu, chhin-chhiūⁿ hō͘ it-ti̍t lo̍h,it-ti̍t lo̍h, i sim-lāi it-ti̍t kā pak-tó͘-lāi ê gín-á hōe-sit-lé: “khó-liân ê gín-á, lí bē-hù chhut-sì, m̄ sī a-bú bô ài--lí, lán chò-hóe lo̍h-lâi im-kan, a-bú kâng-khoán ē kā lí sioh-miā-miā.”
en_text: A-Khîm’s tears kept flowing like rain. In her heart, she kept on saying to the child in her stomach, 'Poor child, it's not that I don't love you because you were not born in time, let's go to the underworld together and mommy will love you just as much.”

en_text: The most spoken and heard proverb is probably, 'It kiam jī kòo, bong lâ-á kiam sé khòo' (similar to kill two birds with one stone, it means doing two things at the same time, washing one's pants while digging for clams.)

en_text: It was not that long ago. I remember when I was a child 50 to 60 years ago, I often heard the elders say, 'work hard so you can get a harvest'.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: Hit當時咱台灣無論是坑溝、圳溝、溪仔、埤仔抑是田--裡，攏猶真清氣，隨時去tó位攏有可能掠tio̍h、當tio̍h、釣tio̍h鰗鰡、蝦仔、溪哥仔、鯽魚仔、毛蟹、水雞等等。

en_text: Taiwan, whether in puddles, ditches, large drainage ditches, dams, or fields, was still clean at the time. You can catch, wait for, and fish for aquatic products whenever you go to those places. For example: pond loach, shrimp, Zacco platypus, Oreochromis mossambicus, crabs, frogs, etc.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 坐十一號仔有較遠--啦，你聽好騎鐵馬、oo-tóo-bái，坐公車、計程車抑是駛自家用--的。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Chē cha̍p-it-hō-á ū khah hn̄g--lah, lí thèng-hó khiâ thih-bé、o͘-tó͘-bái,chē kong-chhia、kè-têng-chhia ia̍h-sī sái chū-ka-iōng--ê.
en_text: It is a little farther to walk to that place. Listen carefully, ride a bicycle, ride a motorcycle, take a bus, take a cab or drive your car.

hok_text_tailo: Ū siánn bô-kāng? Tshiánn kóng lâi tsò tsham-khó--tsi̍t-ē.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有啥無仝？請講來做參考--一下。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Ū siáⁿ bô-kāng?Chhiáⁿ kóng lâi chò chham-khó--chi̍t-ē.
en_text: What would be the difference? Please share with us for reference.

hok_text_tailo: Iōng kiânn--ê nn̄g-tiám-guā-tsing kú m̄-tsai ē kàu--bē?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: iong7 kiann5--e5 nng7-tiam2-gua7-tsing1 ku2 m7-tsai1 e7 kau3--be7?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 用行--的兩點外鐘久毋知會到--袂？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Iōng kiâⁿ--ê nn̄g-tiám-gōa-cheng kú m̄-chai ē kàu--bē?
en_text: If you choose walking, I am not sure if you would reach there in 2 hours.

hok_text_tailo: guá siōng kah-ì tsò ê tāi-tsì
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: gua2 siong7 kah4-i3 tso3 e5 tai7-tsi3
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 我上kah意做ê代誌
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: góa siōng kah-ì chò ê tāi-chì
en_text: My favorite thing to do.

hok_text_tailo: ū-sî pí kuí-nā pah-bān lī ê sió-suat íng-hióng koh-khah tuā.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: u7-si5 pi2 kui2-na7 pah4-ban7 li7 e5 sio2-suat4 ing2-hiong2 koh4-khah4 tua7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 有時比幾若百萬字ê小說影響koh-khah大。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ū-sî pí kúi-nā pah-bān lī ê sió-soat éng-hióng koh-khah tōa.
en_text: Sometimes this is even bigger than a multi-million-word novel.

hok_text_tailo: khak-si̍t sī án-ne!
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: khak4-sit8 si7 an2-ne1!
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 確實是án-ne！
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: khak-si̍t sī án-ne!
en_text: Indeed it is.

hok_text_tailo: tsin tsē liû-hîng kua-á ê kua-sû, tsiat-tsàu lóng tshim-tshim khik tī tsē-tsē lâng ê thâu-khak-lāi, put-sî lán tiō ē tshiòr-kua lâi piáu-ta̍t sim-siann, sīm-tsì kā kám-tōng thuân kàu tsuân sè-kài.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsin1 tse7 liu5-hing5 kua1-a2 e5 kua1-su5,tsiat4-tsau3 long2 tshim1-tshim1 khik4 ti7 tse7-tse7 lang5 e5 thau5-khak4-lai7, put4-si5 lan2 tio7 e7 tshior3-kua1 lai5 piau2-tat8 sim1-siann1, sim7-tsi3 ka7 kam2-tong7 thuan5 kau3 tsuan5 se3-kai3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 真濟流行歌仔ê歌詞、節奏lóng深深刻tī濟濟人ê頭殼內，不時lán就ē唱歌來表達心聲，甚至kā感動傳到全世界。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chin chē liû-hêng koa-á ê koa-sû,chiat-chàu lóng chhim-chhim khek tī chē-chē lâng ê thâu-khak-lāi, put-sî lán tiō ē chhiòr-koa lâi piáu-ta̍t sim-siaⁿ, sīm-chì kā kám-tōng thoân kàu choân sè-kài.
en_text: The lyrics and rhythms of many popular songs are deeply engraved in many people's minds. We often sing to express what is in our hearts, and it can even touch the whole world.

hok_text_tailo: guá siōng kah-ì tsò ê tāi-tsì tiō sī tshiùnn-kua, huann-hí ê sî tshiùnn-kua kā khuài-lo̍k hun-hióng hōo pa̍t-lâng;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: gua2 siong7 kah4-i3 tso3 e5 tai7-tsi3 tio7 si7 tshiunn3-kua1, huann1-hi2 e5 si5 tshiunn3-kua1 ka7 khuai3-lok8 hun1-hiong2 hoo7 pat8-lang5;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 我上kah意做ê代誌就是唱歌，歡喜ê時唱歌kā快樂分享hōo別人；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: góa siōng kah-ì chò ê tāi-chì tiō sī chhiùⁿ-koa, hoaⁿ-hí ê sî chhiùⁿ-koa kā khoài-lo̍k hun-hióng hō͘ pa̍t-lâng;
en_text: My favourite thing to do is to sing. I sing when I am happy to share my happiness with others.

hok_text_tailo: huân-ló ê sî tshiùnn-kua kiám-khin sim-lāi ê ut-tsut;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: huan5-lo2 e5 si5 tshiunn3-kua1 kiam2-khin1 sim1-lai7 e5 ut4-tsut4;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 煩惱ê時唱歌減輕心內ê鬱卒；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: hoân-ló ê sî chhiùⁿ-koa kiám-khin sim-lāi ê ut-chut;
en_text: Singing when you feel troubled can relieve your inner melancholy.

hok_text_tailo: kan-khóo ê sî tshiùnn-kua, ióng-khì put-ti-put-kak tiō it-ti̍t tsing-ka;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: kan1-khoo2 e5 si5 tshiunn3-kua1, iong2-khi3 put4-ti1-put4-kak4 tio7 it4-tit8 tsing1-ka1;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 艱苦ê時唱歌，勇氣不知不覺就一直增加；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kan-khó͘ ê sî chhiùⁿ-koa, ióng-khì put-ti-put-kak tiō it-ti̍t cheng-ka;
en_text: By singing when you are sad, your courage will increase unconsciously.

hok_text_tailo: tsok-tsiá: Lîm Kuì-hiong
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsok4-tsia2:lim5 kui3-hiong1
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 作者：林桂鄉
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chok-chiá:Lîm Kùi-hiong
en_text: Author: Lîm Kuì-hiong.

hok_text_tailo: kín-tionn ê sî tshiùnn-kua, phi̍h-pho̍k-tshái ê sim-tsōng tiō ē ta̍uh-ta̍uh-á bān--lo̍h-lâi.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: kin2-tionn1 e5 si5 tshiunn3-kua1, phih8-phok8-tshai2 e5 sim1-tsong7 tio7 e7 tauh8-tauh8-a2 ban7--loh8-lai5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 緊張ê時唱歌，phi̍h-pho̍k-tshái-ê心臟就ē沓沓仔慢--落來。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: kín-tioⁿ ê sî chhiùⁿ-koa, phi̍h-pho̍k-chhái ê sim-chōng tiō ē tau̍h-tau̍h-á bān--lo̍h-lâi.
en_text: Singing when you are tense, the beating heart will gradually relax.

hok_text_tailo: tsóng-kóng--tsi̍t-kù siánn-mih sim-tsîng lóng tshuē ū tsi̍t siú kua lâi ha̍h.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tsong2-kong2--tsit8-ku3 siann2-mih4 sim1-tsing5 long2 tshue7 u7 tsit8 siu2 kua1 lai5 hah8.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 總講--一句啥mih心情lóng揣有一首歌來ha̍h。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chóng-kóng--chi̍t-kù siáⁿ-mih sim-chêng lóng chhōe ū chi̍t siú koa lâi ha̍h.
en_text: Overall, there's always a song for every emotion.

hok_text_tailo: thàu-kuè kua-sû guá liáu-kái tio̍h guân-lâi mā ū lâng ū kah guá kāng-khuán ê kám-kak, ū gōo-hue-tsa̍p-sik ê sing-ua̍h king-giām.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: thau3-kue3 kua1-su5 gua2 liau2-kai2 tioh8 guan5-lai5 ma7 u7 lang5 u7 kah4 gua2 kang7-khuan2 e5 kam2-kak4, u7 goo7-hue1-tsap8-sik4 e5 sing1-uah8 king1-giam7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 透過歌詞我了解著原來mā有人有佮我仝款ê感覺，有五花十色ê生活經驗。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: thàu-kòe koa-sû góa liáu-kái tio̍h goân-lâi mā ū lâng ū kah góa kāng-khoán ê kám-kak, ū gō͘-hoe-cha̍p-sek ê seng-oa̍h keng-giām.
en_text: From the lyrics, I realized some people felt the same way as I did, having a kaleidoscope of experiences.

hok_text_tailo: tsò-lâng ē-tàng tsioh tshiùnn-kua hōo-siong liáu-kái, tiō bē koo-koo-tuann-tuann.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tso3-lang5 e7-tang3 tsioh4 tshiunn3-kua1 hoo7-siong1 liau2-kai2, tio7 be7 koo1-koo1-tuann1-tuann1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 做人ē-tàng藉唱歌互相了解，就bē孤孤單單。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chò-lâng ē-tàng chioh chhiùⁿ-koa hō͘-siong liáu-kái, tiō bē ko͘-ko͘-toaⁿ-toaⁿ.
en_text: People can get to know each other through singing, so they do not feel lonely.

hok_text_tailo: Tī ha̍k-hāu siōng im-ga̍k khò, khò-pún ū tsi̍t siú “bāng tshun-hong”: “koo-tuann bô phuānn siú ting-hā, tshing-hong tuì-bīn tshue”;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti7 hak8-hau7 siong7 im1-gak8 kho3, kho3-pun2 u7 tsit8 siu2“bang7 tshun1-hong1”: “koo1-tuann1 bo5 phuann7 siu2 ting1-ha7,tshing1-hong1 tui3-bin7 tshue1”;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: Tī學校上音樂課，課本有一首〈望春風〉：「孤單無伴守燈下，清風對面吹」；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tī ha̍k-hāu siōng im-ga̍k khò, khò-pún ū chi̍t siú“bāng chhun-hong”: “ko͘-toaⁿ bô phōaⁿ siú teng-hā,chheng-hong tùi-bīn chhoe”;
en_text: During a music lesson at school, there was a song in the textbook called 'Bāng Tshun-hong'. The song goes, 'I'm alone without a partner under the streetlight, the cool breeze blows on my face.'

hok_text_tailo: ta̍k-ke tsi̍t siann tsi̍t siann puê guá tshui--lo̍h-khì...”
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tak8-ke1 tsit8 siann1 tsit8 siann1 pue5 gua2 tshui1--loh8-khi3...”
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 逐家一聲一聲陪我催--落去……」
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: ta̍k-ke chi̍t siaⁿ chi̍t siaⁿ pôe góa chhui--lo̍h-khì...”
en_text: Everyone applauded and sang with me all the way.

hok_text_tailo: tshiùnn-kua hōo kám-tsîng khiā sio-uá, kiò-tshínn lán tuì ka-tī sîng-tsióng ê thóo-tē ê tiōng-sī, sán-sing ài kok-ka ài kòo-hiong ê kám-tsîng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshiunn3-kua1 hoo7 kam2-tsing5 khia7 sio1-ua2, kio3-tshinn2 lan2 tui3 ka1-ti7 sing5-tsiong2 e5 thoo2-te7 e5 tiong7-si7, san2-sing1 ai3 kok4-ka1 ai3 koo3-hiong1 e5 kam2-tsing5.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 唱歌hōo感情徛sio倚，叫醒lán對家己成長ê土地ê重視，產生愛國家愛故鄉ê感情。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiùⁿ-koa hō͘ kám-chêng khiā sio-óa, kiò-chhíⁿ lán tùi ka-tī sêng-chióng ê thó͘-tē ê tiōng-sī, sán-seng ài kok-ka ài kò͘-hiong ê kám-chêng.
en_text: Singing makes our emotions bind together, wakes up our values for the land we grew up in, and makes us have affection for our country and homeland.

hok_text_tailo: Tī ha̍k-hāu, ta̍k-ke tsò-hué tshiùnn-kua siōng tshù-bī, siōng sî-kiânn ê liû-hîng-kua sian tshiùnn mā bē ià-siān, tiōng-iàu ê tsueh-li̍t it-tīng ài ū kua-siann lâi tàu-lāu-jia̍t;
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: ti7 hak8-hau7,tak8-ke1 tso3-hue2 tshiunn3-kua1 siong7 tshu3-bi7, siong7 si5-kiann5 e5 liu5-hing5-kua1 sian1 tshiunn3 ma7 be7 ia3-sian7, tiong7-iau3 e5 tsueh4-lit8 it4-ting7 ai3 u7 kua1-siann1 lai5 tau3-lau7-jiat8;
hok_text_hanlo_tai: Tī學校，逐家做伙唱歌上趣味，上時行ê流行歌sian唱mā bē厭siān，重要ê節日一定ài有歌聲來tàu鬧熱；
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Tī ha̍k-hāu,ta̍k-ke chò-hóe chhiùⁿ-koa siōng chhù-bī, siōng sî-kiâⁿ ê liû-hêng-koa sian chhiùⁿ mā bē ià-siān, tiōng-iàu ê choeh-li̍t it-tēng ài ū koa-siaⁿ lâi tàu-lāu-jia̍t;
en_text: In school, singing together is the most fun, and the most popular pop songs are not boring, and there must be singing at important festivals to make it lively.

hok_text_tailo: tshiùnn-kua tsiong siōng tiōng-iàu ê li̍t-tsí tshīng tsò tsi̍t tiâu pó-kuì ê tsin-tsu phua̍h-liān, hōo sing-ua̍h koh-khah bí-lē.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshiunn3-kua1 tsiong1 siong7 tiong7-iau3 e5 lit8-tsi2 tshing7 tso3 tsit8 tiau5 po2-kui3 e5 tsin1-tsu1 phuah8-lian7, hoo7 sing1-uah8 koh4-khah4 bi2-le7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 唱歌將上重要ê日子穿做一條寶貴ê真珠phua̍h鍊，hōo生活koh-khah美麗。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiùⁿ-koa chiong siōng tiōng-iàu ê li̍t-chí chhēng chò chi̍t tiâu pó-kùi ê chin-chu phoa̍h-liān, hō͘ seng-oa̍h koh-khah bí-lē.
en_text: To sing is to wear the most important day into a precious pearl necklace to make life more beautiful.

hok_text_tailo: kuan-tsiòng ē-tàng lâu-lo̍h tshim-tshim-tshim ê ìn-siōng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: kuan1-tsiong3 e7-tang3 lau5-loh8 tshim1-tshim1-tshim1 e5 in3-siong7.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 觀眾ē-tàng留落深深深ê印象。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: koan-chiòng ē-tàng lâu-lo̍h chhim-chhim-chhim ê ìn-siōng.
en_text: This will leave a long-lasting deep impression on the audience.

hok_text_tailo: Lán muí tsi̍t ê lâng mā ū ka-tī ê tsú-tê khik, khuann-khuann-á tshiùnn, hōo-siong liáu-kái, hōo-siong him-sióng, bô su-iàu gōo-kái ònn-ònn-jiáng.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lan2 mui2 tsit8 e5 lang5 ma7 u7 ka1-ti7 e5 tsu2-te5 khik4, khuann1-khuann1-a2 tshiunn3, hoo7-siong1 liau2-kai2,hoo7-siong1 him1-siong2, bo5 su1-iau3 goo7-kai2 onn3-onn3-jiang2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: Lán每一个人mā有家己ê主題曲，khuann-khuann仔唱，互相了解，互相欣賞，無需要誤解ònn-ònn嚷。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: Lán múi chi̍t ê lâng mā ū ka-tī ê chú-tê khek, khoaⁿ-khoaⁿ-á chhiùⁿ, hō͘-siong liáu-kái,hō͘-siong him-sióng, bô su-iàu gō͘-kái òⁿ-òⁿ-jiáng.
en_text: Each of us has our own theme song, we sing slowly, get to know each other, appreciate each other, we don't need to cause misunderstandings and quarrel loudly.

hok_text_tailo: bián kè-kàu kua-siann sī hó sī bái, sim-lāi ū kua tiō bē koo-tuann.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: bian2 ke3-kau3 kua1-siann1 si7 ho2 si7 bai2, sim1-lai7 u7 kua1 tio7 be7 koo1-tuann1.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 免計較歌聲是好是bái，心內有歌就bē孤單。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: bián kè-kàu koa-siaⁿ sī hó sī bái, sim-lāi ū koa tiō bē ko͘-toaⁿ.
en_text: Don't worry about whether the singing is good or bad, you will not feel lonely if you have a song in your heart.

hok_text_tailo: lín sī m̄ sī kám-kak kha-té ngiau-ngiau siūnn-beh tián-khui kha-pōo thiàu-bú--leh?
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: lin2 si7 m7 si7 kam2-kak4 kha1-te2 ngiau1-ngiau1 siunn7-beh4 tian2-khui1 kha1-poo7 thiau3-bu2--leh4?
hok_text_hanlo_tai: lín是m̄是感覺跤底ngiau-ngiau想beh展開跤步跳舞--leh？
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: lín sī m̄ sī kám-kak kha-té ngiau-ngiau siūⁿ-beh tián-khui kha-pō͘ thiàu-bú--leh?
en_text: Do you feel the momentum under your feet and want to step out and start dancing?

hok_text_tailo: tshiùnn-kua sī guá siōng kah-ì tsò ê tāi-tsì, ǹg-bāng ta̍k-ke mā lâi hiáng-siū tshiùnn-kua ê huann-hí.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: tshiunn3-kua1 si7 gua2 siong7 kah4-i3 tso3 e5 tai7-tsi3, ng3-bang7 tak8-ke1 ma7 lai5 hiang2-siu7 tshiunn3-kua1 e5 huann1-hi2.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 唱歌是我上kah意做ê代誌，ǹg望逐家mā來享受唱歌ê歡喜。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: chhiùⁿ-koa sī góa siōng kah-ì chò ê tāi-chì, ǹg-bāng ta̍k-ke mā lâi hiáng-siū chhiùⁿ-koa ê hoaⁿ-hí.
en_text: My favourite thing to do is to sing. We hope everyone will come and enjoy the joy of singing.

hok_text_tailo: In ang thiann-liáu, tiō kuánn-kín khì i ê hàn-io̍h tiàm.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: in1 ang1 thiann1-liau2, tio7 kuann2-kin2 khi3 i1 e5 han3-ioh8 tiam3.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: In翁聽了，就趕緊去伊ê漢藥店。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: In ang thiaⁿ-liáu, tiō kóaⁿ-kín khì i ê hàn-io̍h tiàm.
en_text: When his husband heard it, he rushed to his Chinese medicine store.

hok_text_tailo: A-hok--á thàu-tsá khí-lâi khuànn bô Tsài-tshik, tiō tsai-iánn tāi-tsì hāi--looh.
hok_text_tailo_number_tone: a1-hok4--a2 thau3-tsa2 khi2-lai5 khuann3 bo5 tsai3-tshik4, tio7 tsai1-iann2 tai7-tsi3 hai7--looh4.
hok_text_hanlo_tai: 阿福--á透早起來看無再策，就知影代誌害--囉。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: A-hok--á thàu-chá khí-lâi khòaⁿ bô Chài-chhek, tiō chai-iáⁿ tāi-chì hāi--lo͘h.
en_text: A-hok did not see Tsài-tshik in the morning and immediately knew something was wrong.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 現代ê台灣少年人連「摸蜊仔」都m̄知啥意思，beh按怎kā解說「兼洗褲」？

hok_text_tailo: thiann a-bú kóng, tsū guá tsi̍t, nn̄g huè khai-sí, i tō tiānn-tiānn kóng kòo-sū hōo guá thiann, lî-tshiánn tsi̍t kang kòo-tīng ài kóng kuí-nā pún, ū-sî-tsūn sī tsi̍t pún ài kóng kuí-nā páinn, piān-nā a-bú bô-îng, guá mā ē ka-tī tsi̍t ê lâng kuai-kuai tī pinn--á khuànn tsheh, o̍h a-bú ê khuì-kháu kóng kòo-sū, guân-lâi guá tsit-má tsiah-nī ài khuànn tsheh, lóng sī in-uī a-bú ê iōng-sim.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 聽阿母講，自我一、兩歲開始，伊就tiānn-tiānn講故事hōo我聽，而且一工固定ài講幾若本，有時tsūn是一本ài講幾若擺，便若阿母無閒，我mā-ē家己一个人乖乖tī邊--仔看冊，學阿母ê氣口講故事，原來我tsit-má tsiah-nī愛看冊，lóng是因為阿母ê用心。
hok_text_pei_oe_ji: thiaⁿ a-bú kóng, chū góa chi̍t,nn̄g hòe khai-sí, i tō tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ kóng kò͘-sū hō͘ góa thiaⁿ, lî-chhiáⁿ chi̍t kang kò͘-tēng ài kóng kúi-nā pún, ū-sî-chūn sī chi̍t pún ài kóng kúi-nā páiⁿ, piān-nā a-bú bô-êng, góa mā ē ka-tī chi̍t ê lâng koai-koai tī piⁿ--á khòaⁿ chheh, o̍h a-bú ê khùi-kháu kóng kò͘-sū, goân-lâi góa chit-má chiah-nī ài khòaⁿ chheh, lóng sī in-ūi a-bú ê iōng-sim.
en_text: I heard my mother say that when I was one or two years old, my mother began to tell me stories, and she did so several times a day. Even if my mother was not available, I would read books by myself and imitate my mother's tone of voice when she was not available. I know that I love reading so much because of my mother's teaching at that time.

hok_text_hanlo_tai: 你問我現此時khah-kah意看--ê是佗一種，當然是歷史傳奇類排頭名，像《三國演義》、《封神榜》、《隋唐演義》tsit幾部，按怎看mā bē厭siān；

en_text: You ask me, which one do I prefer to watch now? Of course, the historical legends are ranked first, such as 'Sam-kok Ián-gī', 'Hong-sîn-pńg', and 'Suî Tông Ián-gī'. No matter how you look at them, you will not be bored.
